name: NRSC Digital Team
subject: Should they be prosecuted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

Justice Scalia once said to an incoming class of Supreme Court law clerks that “he would do ‘everything in [his] power’ to ‘ruin’ the career of any law clerk who betrayed his confidences.”

We have one very simple question for you: [**Do you believe that if it turns out to be an employee of the Supreme Court who leaked the draft reversal of Roe V. Wade they should be prosecuted to the full extent of federal law?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd359f9c91544eaebd55763d5d6a4929&_e=9HGo5KQFwI_WHZsg5uDp7fxab5twkh1_dsJhAbEQu1LjBaTMlAVx_WIr_E2mr3sG1ZVj7qgkkDUB3Xkfmi4rOq6AIQbYOht9dQVJ343xrPWBDfPAtdgBI-IRsDOFiUxJbfMvt29jq6BB5tOYYImmrQDRysLCUX0Zb1kb8jBujWxH_zxfhV9oapy3iNhJrzlzIIpubTlG4hoh1YD52lYsSsz5E7Kv59ei780p_OxrCDY42kuUup4v9ny_GsxTQnT2cxXf-jQ7L7nCvIv30ntU9fNgI1wHRJu4lduUAXWlRWX8XR5ieP_cC9qUrsPZC2ITuaHalOXTLD6pgXNq_aClHyDNmpotXrSLo95bdeTj55DupSF8NMFar14Yy_b9DEnbOAFW3XayZB7f0qNYo23MFLv4UfnVwBMIUbY4yfy3kzmJRJRBEGJfepIJTX9G676KPqWczjp9MPFNYUNZzUXO9hosu9fm5F_5_rW41qxnsjI%3D)

[**yes, prosecute crooks -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd359f9c91544eaebd55763d5d6a4929&_e=9HGo5KQFwI_WHZsg5uDp7fxab5twkh1_dsJhAbEQu1LjBaTMlAVx_WIr_E2mr3sG1ZVj7qgkkDUB3Xkfmi4rOq6AIQbYOht9dQVJ343xrPWBDfPAtdgBI-IRsDOFiUxJbfMvt29jq6BB5tOYYImmrQDRysLCUX0Zb1kb8jBujWxH_zxfhV9oapy3iNhJrzlzIIpubTlG4hoh1YD52lYsSsz5E7Kv59ei780p_OxrCDY42kuUup4v9ny_GsxTQnT2cxXf-jQ7L7nCvIv30ntU9SUoDLImzP9BIus9SDz5Nv55ABih696rdUSSADaCPGGN4z7lfC7tY7zeQ1tiFvvnZIOr__x28fdh4XcAwnpTS3tlvv5sw8lz8hKjxPriRuPXdCOplbaqGzp2S-21CQOF73JOi0nI1Nd4HiskAQBE2PJ6k4DR_oREWUVXc0LTaKCDgfZsfYFk9UxFK43UqRbd5bgR51vOHbabiJFrJIsN_u4%3D)
[**no, let them off the hook -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd359f9c91544eaebd55763d5d6a4929&_e=9HGo5KQFwI_WHZsg5uDp7fxab5twkh1_dsJhAbEQu1LjBaTMlAVx_WIr_E2mr3sG1ZVj7qgkkDUB3Xkfmi4rOq6AIQbYOht9dQVJ343xrPWBDfPAtdgBI-IRsDOFiUxJbfMvt29jq6BB5tOYYImmrQDRysLCUX0Zb1kb8jBujWxH_zxfhV9oapy3iNhJrzlzIIpubTlG4hoh1YD52lYsSsz5E7Kv59ei780p_OxrCDY42kuUup4v9ny_GsxTQnT2cxXf-jQ7L7nCvIv30ntU9Qmwcgdc_otvgP4ukLX8j2Tp003oDfdHHU-aO5MHFVVyzNAojZxSGvXQ4EJrfCjwQQVZ5UhjTXPUAjgJkKZWe70QOk80WpmD_xyzHC0bwAPOC2VUle4AbSqDaXgKtPpZE2xn6rf18I7MozAIAxdxZTW2CUTopK6yLNpeU6FdEcVY7Fv5XlH9d6ste_VDQfVGOCmiDIP6T62IlhBKQWcuW9I%3D)
Once again, as is becoming increasingly typical, the Supreme Court, or matters closely related to the court, is becoming the focal point of this year’s midterm elections.

Dems are raising MILLIONS of dollars to save their Senate majority in hopes that they can rebuild their liberal majority on the Court. We’re of the belief that DEMS don’t mind the leak but are instead grateful that the news from the Supreme Court helped to super charge their fundraising mere months before voters start filling out their general election ballots.

[**Let us know where you stand on all of this by taking our brief survey today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd359f9c91544eaebd55763d5d6a4929&_e=9HGo5KQFwI_WHZsg5uDp7fxab5twkh1_dsJhAbEQu1LjBaTMlAVx_WIr_E2mr3sG1ZVj7qgkkDUB3Xkfmi4rOq6AIQbYOht9dQVJ343xrPWBDfPAtdgBI-IRsDOFiUxJbfMvt29jq6BB5tOYYImmrQDRysLCUX0Zb1kb8jBujWxH_zxfhV9oapy3iNhJrzlzIIpubTlG4hoh1YD52lYsSsz5E7Kv59ei780p_OxrCDY42kuUup4v9ny_GsxTQnT2cxXf-jQ7L7nCvIv30ntU9YQKaQkDuRVlt4oxhMtWCBN9sXLqN2IBQvFZXjHRbrR6C1tdHoQcfi5KoGYwRddaKDliSEghwazUpMkYl3vfwKKLmnegBrXisOrG9scKOXpr1E1QR4moy4PXGAvzgX0QwzRtKzpLeY6Qu3xwbR4ezl7EmWWj-FyC_W4bxP2ql6-EyrK2Qf8TwsUNGzPFCHGkXspodJZ3SNbO1eJjE2_bac8%3D)

Fellow American,

This package was only made possible by one man: _**Senator Raphael Warnock.**_ His vote was the deciding vote on the bill.

Because of this and other votes for the disastrous Biden agenda, you can thank Senator Warnock for:
1. Surging gas prices

body:
Friend,

Justice Scalia once said to an incoming class of Supreme Court law clerks that “he would do ‘everything in [his] power’ to ‘ruin’ the career of any law clerk who betrayed his confidences.”

name: Mark and Patty McCloskey
subject: Help fill up the tank?
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-r/) Friends, We are currently driving all over the State of Missouri to reach as many voters as possible before Election Day. Thanks to Joe Biden's war on American energy and Bidenflation, this has turned out to be an even more expensive undertaking than expected. We just had to fill up the tank. Check it out: [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-y/) Traveling the state is absolutely critical to our mission, but we're worried we won't be able to afford to do it much longer with gas prices the way they are. That's why we're reaching out...**Do you think you could help us fill up the tank so we can keep going for as long as possible?** [FULL TANK: $100](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-j/) [HALF TANK: $50](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-t/) [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-i/) Unlike everyone else in this race, we aren't politicians. Our opponents have huge out-of-state support coming in from PACs and special interests in the swamp. We don't have that, nor would we ever want it.But we can't let the radical left and RINOs win, so that means we need you all to come through for us. Thank you in advance for your help!Sincerely,Mark and Patty [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-d/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-h/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-o/) | [McCloskeyforM](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-n/)[issouri](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiklja-bjututkitk-p/) | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108[Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyiklja-bjututkitk-x/) [Preferences](https://markmccloskeyformissouri.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyiklja-9A790A88-bjututkitk-m) | [Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyiklja-bjututkitk-c/)
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zibj9pfgkas9gobcq6h4baui0hgp32b27qrdc8vo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb2edq3ecrlm5r76t5nc1jmec5geth39chkm1h74obgs6qr6ojmcjgn2pb2corjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplmgrrcob6e4qb6p77m2qmash5u)
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zphqqpvj4vkcuc1igt64fc4nv3i4r5il3nve59f8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8g852rbl866gkpo77gvc8053lo0q3i33uoceeh0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4cjh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z95ovbj1aq3v9hpar1oa7s8jcrtviqrar044iag8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z374skh26svp7isod1d89883o5fj7dkjd2dr64dg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: T.W. Shannon
subject: Democrats are targeting our KIDS to transform America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by T.W
body:
Democrats LOVE spreading the lie that America was “never great.” Right now, the radical Left is rewriting America’s hi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3pjnc8thfah3re2rv0gl25pd7d088biljvi76so_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uqojcstje5h78s5jm1r72t1km5imcpll6dir4o35cep3cc9iedhbbcb0e8pn4s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shkcoorecr4sup72phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c5im0p73chge49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5imj0r8ms0vifa1ibr0bhkrm2evhm7pcog263qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
Fellow patriot, **Democrats LOVE spreading the lie that America was “never great.”** Right now, the radical Left is rewriting America’s history by indoctrinating our children to REJECT the three things that made our country so GREAT:
* The Constitution
* Christian values
* Capitalism

**For American greatness, prosperity, and freedom to continue, we MUST win this fight for the next generation.**[**If you have a minute, I explained more in this video****⬇️**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2p3cfqcb5pe2sd955p6c3nr3jobpf1qvqve2fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjk4jfe6lg2tg81et7sk0bgbf33gjsm4qh1ofdi8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
[**WATCH THE CLIP >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfl3sg2g7j3tc6rtoqdau8sdcm0sup617ehr363o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
Instead of the **Constitution** , liberals teach our children to embrace **big government**. Instead of **Christian values** , liberals teach our children to live a **godless lifestyle**. Instead of **capitalism** , liberals teach our children to love **socialism**. _We need to stop this evil, un-American, and downright destructive agenda._ **But let me tell you a bit about myself...** **My name is T.W. Shannon. I’m a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in protecting our constitutional rights and going ALL IN for America. **
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z85h1lbnr6kt5manacpaeuhg1qjmtcrkufc9h7n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
| | I’ve spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the State House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpk97pe2bgkadjf0hdheh7jrdp7irjvnuulq7lp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
[**SUPPORT T.W. SHANNON >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi3lp470u95drfiqnbg3vhdmaucjdg5dfdfjk5o8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
During my time in the state legislature, I successfully...
* Led Oklahoma’s fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students’ skin color over merit.
* Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients – which became the national model.
* Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children.
* Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans.
* Balanced the Oklahoma state budget.

**_And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help._**
---
[**FEND OFF WOKE POLITICS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zct1rl6o9hqslusij7sgcrq1q9dst73mvqonqm60_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
Even though I’ve been successful in the legislative arena, I’ve also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half-billion in assets – an accomplishment I’m extremely proud of.
**What makes my story so remarkable, Friend, is that the woke Left tells people who look like me that achieving the American Dream is**** _impossible, yet here I am!_**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6mhdf9vofe9bs54kbkkav3mi77bn6pcpr1rglc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
[**STOP THE WOKE LEFT: JOIN T.W.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6pg7kqv4ukhv2tj0n14iepqo090f31re6drp8so_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---
**Friend, I’m running for the U.S. Senate so I can take on the woke Left, tell our kids the truth about America, and fight for the America First agenda.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfq36p013qpt89v61k1nnmmbvd1bg0v70eflioi0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---

---
[**DONATE $75 >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ohhhq5bc8a6gi2ibtotciuilr8et73mcd02d38_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c3h2bs)
---

clean_body: Democrats LOVE spreading the lie that America was “never great.” Right now, the radical Left is rewriting America’s hi | | | Fellow patriot, Democrats LOVE spreading the lie that America was “never great.” Right now, the radical Left is rewriting America’s history by indoctrinating our children to REJECT the three things that made our country so GREAT: The Constitution Christian values Capitalism For American greatness, prosperity, and freedom to continue, we MUST win this fight for the next generation. Instead of the Constitution , liberals teach our children to embrace big government. Instead of Christian values , liberals teach our children to live a godless lifestyle. Instead of capitalism , liberals teach our children to love socialism. We need to stop this evil, un-American, and downright destructive agenda. But let me tell you a bit about myself... My name is T.W. Shannon. I’m a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in protecting our constitutional rights and going ALL IN for America. | | I’ve spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the State House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first. During my time in the state legislature, I successfully... Led Oklahoma’s fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students’ skin color over merit. Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients – which became the national model. Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children. Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans. Balanced the Oklahoma state budget. And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help. Even though I’ve been successful in the legislative arena, I’ve also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half-billion in assets – an accomplishment I’m extremely proud of. What makes my story so remarkable, Friend, is that the woke Left tells people who look like me that achieving the American Dream is impossible, yet here I am! Friend, I’m running for the U.S. Senate so I can take on the woke Left, tell our kids the truth about America, and fight for the America First agenda. Thank you for going All In for America, T.W. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stop the anti-life movement
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2o4oeaipoub9v5h73h35t05f3io9t106os2rgs8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3k66pj9cb4eqq6adj6csob0ob1mdoj0t1ge5q7bdj1c5qm1p5iemr34p9he9rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phhmspm9ptie5j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zle8jhc1ilt13qcgtpj79mm1ivho262edskiam78_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c5h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcgv94542gv85hd3p61eb2jrcdut3ckonm2e22k0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c5h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0oe24ignhahe5fojdd4pthf8qqj4v3pdffc0fs8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clg69or4c5h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

body:

You know me.
I’m not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you’ll listen to me when I tell you that I’m devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It’s more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I’ll cut to the chase:_
I know it’s a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62169%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PZrh%2biY%2bF0Fu%2fL50bkVMUQ&sysid=1) ASAP if we’re going to save President Trump’s closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I’m hoping you’ll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62160%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dIKZf%2f%2fS0x3puLAAFhLirg&sysid=1)
[**Help Save President Trump’s Top Allies >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62161%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JG2YE0e4zEJ4XFSCy9THDg&sysid=1)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump’s most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62162%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fmNlRJrypnqtgAoXiId%2bMg&sysid=1)
I’ve made my decision. I’m standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

name: Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke
subject: fwd: I'm a coward?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
Their attacks are getting worse
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60524598:64mK2Xo_N:m:1:3299561967:A0C2273DC8D612E7FC0A3ABE40BF26DB:r)** Patriot, this is Ryan again. I can't believe I'm having to write to you again on this subject, but the attacks on my military record have only increased since I last wrote. The last time I contacted you, I told you that the liberal media was labeling my 22 years of honorable service in the Navy SEALs a "pencil-pushing career". _**But on Memorial Day, they doubled down on their attacks: on the day we honor those who have fought and died for our country, they called on me to remove my Navy SEAL Trident from my uniform and rescind my honor as a SEAL all together.**_ Apparently, hunting down Middle Eastern warlords and toppling genocidal regimes isn't enough to merit an honorable service in the Navy SEALs. The only reason they would do something as atrocious as this is because of their hatred for everything that America stands for. They will stop at nothing to force their radical anti-American agenda on us, even if that means slandering every Veterans' military record in the process. _**The stakes couldn 't be any higher. **_ **My election to secure Trump 's Majority is now just 5 DAYS away and I'm getting CRUSHED.** Their attacks have only boosted my radical opponent's chances of winning. We're in serious danger of losing our one chance of taking back the House. Not to mention Pelosi's $200 million for my Democratic opponent. Our only hope of taking the House rests on me winning this one race. To make up ground, I've been authorized to extend the deadline for my crucial May fundraising deadline. [**We have ONE MORE DAY to give me, an America First Patriot, Navy SEAL veteran, and Trump Cabinet Member, a fighting chance to win this race.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60524599:64mK2Xo_N:m:1:3299561967:A0C2273DC8D612E7FC0A3ABE40BF26DB:r) But if we fail tonight, all hope is lost for the America First movement. I'm humbly asking, as a warrior willing to risk everything for America, [**will you please chip in just $5 or $6 before midnight to help me crush my goal and win this race?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60524599:64mK2Xo_N:m:1:3299561967:A0C2273DC8D612E7FC0A3ABE40BF26DB:r) [**CHIP IN TODAY -> SEND THIS SEAL TO CONGRESS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60524598:64mK2Xo_N:m:1:3299561967:A0C2273DC8D612E7FC0A3ABE40BF26DB:r) If we win, it will be because of you and your support for our America First movement. Thank you, Ryan Zinke
_Fmr Navy SEAL Commander_ **\---------- Forwarded message ---------**

subject: Let’s put America First
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWmAG58hmN

Now or never

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWmAG58hmN

This is so important that I'm reaching out to you
personally, Friend.

Please read my email below.

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

--------------------------------------------

Friend,

The Radical Democrats will do anything to line their
pockets and destroy our great country. They've attacked OUR
values, destroyed OUR economy, put America Last, called us racist
and deplorable. It's disgusting really. If we're going to win in
2022 and 2024, we need to do something NOW.

Democrats won't stop until AMERICA IS UNRECOGNIZABLE.

It's time we fight back like never before, Friend. I
just launched my 2022 American Defense Task Force, and I need YOU
to join me and get on the frontlines of taking our country back.

With you on my team, we can show the Left that America
will NEVER believe their LIES and that real Patriots will always
put AMERICA FIRST.

I'm calling on you to make one of the most important
contributions in the history of American politics.

This is SO CRITICAL that I've activated an EMERGENCY
600%-IMPACT ON ALL CONTRIBUTIONS FOR 3 HOURS ONLY.

Please contribute $25 in the NEXT 3 HOURS to join my 2022
American Defense Task Force and your gift will make 600% more of
an impact. >>

2022 AMERICAN DEFENSE TASK FORCE

PATRIOT: Friend
STATUS: PENDING
600%-IMPACT: AVAILABLE
DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY

CONTRIBUTE NOW >>

I wouldn't be reaching out if this wasn't critical.

That's why I'm asking you to step up and join my Task
Force, Friend. Together, we will be an unstoppable force and we
can SAVE AMERICA.

I've asked to see the first list of Patriots who join my
Task Force TONIGHT. Will I see your name?

Please contribute $25 in the NEXT 3 HOURS to join my 2022
American Defense Task Force and your gift will make 600% more of
an impact. >>

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

CONTRIBUTE NOW >>

committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not

I’ll get right to it: Sen. Grassley just launched his first vile attack ad against me after national Republicans failed to kick me off the ballot not once, but twice. Sen. Grassley and the Republican establishment are scared – and they should be.
Here’s why: Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings, and a mere 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect him. This is our best opportunity in _decades_ to flip this seat blue, and Republicans know that if we win, it will virtually guarantee Democrats the Senate majority. **But to do it, I need your help to fight back against their attacks, though, particularly since national Republicans have over $44 million in the bank to keep attacking candidates like me.**
**[So please, Peter: Will you make a contribution of $5 or more to help me defeat Sen. name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Roswell Mayor Pro-Tem Mike Palermo today announced that he’ll vote for Jake Evans in the June 21 Republican runoff for the 6th Congressional District.
body:
Roswell Mayor Pro-Tem Mike Palermo today announced that he’ll vote for Jake Evans in the June 21 Republican runoff for the 6th Congressional District.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_MUuDImguJcabH7JMZcdCd_I6p1U60wDqU7hPiDzS9gTCsnvbbrB2yFQb98bPHg8doOITj2A-04UNibodaWPTb6eLtSUBsRcoMCG7rwC7FVoNOC3ew9R1oX6aRNAdA41TIUUS8YpiY=&c=eHI1PXsQ3D0PUYqIa5jMGXLkcxww1piPBHdAELpbi3142GVofC9qPQ==&ch=inj7gEe1ufim6PITgnjDe-72EEpx1NNU8-FTxPBbWur0e8f4_gqUig==)
---
| For immediate release June 6th, 2022
Roswell Mayor Pro-Tem Mike Palermo today announced that he'll vote for Jake Evans in the June 21st Republican runoff for the 6th Congressional District. "Those of us who serve in local government appreciate the importance of a congressman who's responsive to local concerns and takes action to deliver," said Palermo. "I have no doubt Jake will run an office that prioritizes constituent services representing our region. He will partner with leaders in Roswell and other cities throughout the district to plan for a prosperous future." Jake agreed that serving the people means serving the community. "Mayor Pro-Tem Palermo is exactly right: The top reason to seek this job is to help others and make our communities the envy of the nation," Jake said. "I appreciate his support, and I assure him that, in office, the cities in this district will have no better friend than me."
---
| |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_MUuDImguJcabH7JMZcdCd_I6p1U60wDqU7hPiDzS9gTCsnvbbrB1mEBrY6sf96OrnxylEG8OYjyUWRbjOmdGCtWgjY_XiDPBNBzm0-1oniDysV8DBKHzfOhuAAZuwy-91Id0JPbVGZe1WAKwG31j6WoEgr8GCD&c=eHI1PXsQ3D0PUYqIa5jMGXLkcxww1piPBHdAELpbi3142GVofC9qPQ==&ch=inj7gEe1ufim6PITgnjDe-72EEpx1NNU8-FTxPBbWur0e8f4_gqUig==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_MUuDImguJcabH7JMZcdCd_I6p1U60wDqU7hPiDzS9gTCsnvbbrB1mEBrY6sf96OyrZkgPK5c7GfhPu0fDeoxoQyYJk25_YlkarZgtlyVrMJcU6FtE1YsmC1WVIpACTzMbaZAcmKq8Ur9haPY6BPBS373xBPRcM&c=eHI1PXsQ3D0PUYqIa5jMGXLkcxww1piPBHdAELpbi3142GVofC9qPQ==&ch=inj7gEe1ufim6PITgnjDe-72EEpx1NNU8-FTxPBbWur0e8f4_gqUig==)

name: Sgt. Tony Palmer (ret)
subject: Biden Doubles Down on Defund the Police
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAW ENFORCEMENT LOYALTY PAC**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60511033:60VgoXoMN:m:1:3325945326:42FDAB9F72AF0E278C023350F3FB1AA1:r "Headline") Peter, It's been 2 years. 2 years since Black Lives Matter and the Left have exploited the death of George Floyd and turned it into an all-out war against cops. Despite a record number of police officers shot while on duty and crime at record highs, Biden double-downed on blaming the police by issuing a new executive order aimed at law enforcement on the 2-year anniversary of George Floyd's death. And if we don't get more pro-law enforcement candidates elected to Congress, I'm afraid Biden's efforts to demonize the police are going to cause irreparable damage to the safety of all Americans. **[We can't wait a moment longer! We desperately need your $25, $50, or $100 donation to get these pro-cop candidates elected today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60511033:60VgoXoMN:m:1:3325945326:42FDAB9F72AF0E278C023350F3FB1AA1:r "We can’t wait a moment longer! We desperately need your $25,
$50, or $100 donation to get these pro-cop candidates elected today.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60511033:60VgoXoMN:m:1:3325945326:42FDAB9F72AF0E278C023350F3FB1AA1:r "Protest")These past two years have been tough for cops - as BLM burned American cities, the media was cheering them on while framing all cops as racist murderers. **Nobody is standing up for cops, but we at the Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC are.** Our primary mission is to support pro-cop candidates and to defeat the Defund Democrats. But the simple truth is that we're running out of time. We're just months away from the November election while Biden, Pelosi, and The Squad rile up their base with unfounded accusations and calls to Defund the Police. I can't imagine a worse time for cops and the people dependent for their safety. **But if you think the Defund and Blame the Cops talk is bad now ... just wait if the Democrats hold off any red wave.** **[That's why we need your donation of $50, $100, or $250 IMMEDIATELY if we have any chance of pushing these pro-cop candidates over their Defund Democrat opponents this November.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60511033:60VgoXoMN:m:1:3325945326:42FDAB9F72AF0E278C023350F3FB1AA1:r "That’s why we need your donation of $50, $100, or $250
IMMEDIATELY if we have any chance of pushing these pro-cop candidates over their Defund Democrat opponents this November.")** Listen, Biden and Pelosi are trying EVERYTHING they can to halt the GOP's red wave. And their favorite target has been and will continue to be demonizing our law enforcement officers. Maybe you're the one person who has done just find under Biden's destruction of our country. If so, do me a favor... print out this email, wad it up in a ball, and throw it in the trash. But for everyone else suffering under Biden and Pelosi's Defund policies, then I'm calling on you to step and donate today... and donate big. **[We are going up against Woke billionaires like George Soros who are donating millions to elect Woke leftists dedicated to supporting the Defund and Criminal first agendas. So we need you all in with your $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60511033:60VgoXoMN:m:1:3325945326:42FDAB9F72AF0E278C023350F3FB1AA1:r "We are going up against Woke billionaires like George Soros who
are donating millions to elect Woke leftists dedicated to supporting the Defund and Criminal first agendas. So we need you all in with your $100,
$500, or $1,000 donation today.")** We're well past the point of platitudes and well-wishes. I need you fully engaged with skin in the game to get these pro-cop candidates elected this November. **[For the sake of your community, your family and our nation, please donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60511033:60VgoXoMN:m:1:3325945326:42FDAB9F72AF0E278C023350F3FB1AA1:r "For the sake of your community, your family
and our nation, please donate TODAY!")** For your safety, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60511033:60VgoXoMN:m:1:3325945326:42FDAB9F72AF0E278C023350F3FB1AA1:r "Tony Palmer")
Tony Palmer, SGT (Ret), Virginia Beach Police Dept
Chairman of the Advisory Board
Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC

name: Team Madison
subject: Newsletter: Madison On the Move!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46170751/349143950/-728459328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTEwYjE0OC05Y2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t4-r0Zeqgv8njsDRJHTdvV2QBIrWO0B7DFt-4Lwds9A=&emci=e39b9c01-f1e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=6910b148-9ce5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5119200)
---
Hey there, We here at Team Madison have been busy since launching the campaign! Madison's objective is to meet and hear from as many people in our state—both rural and urban—as possible.

Because we are committed to building a more united Oklahoma, we have been crisscrossing the state non-stop and as of last week we have visited all 77 counties. This is a huge victory because we are the _only campaign with this achievement_ and _we were told it was impossible!_
** Here are some some highlights from the campaign trail**
---

clean_body: | | | Hey there, We here at Team Madison have been busy since launching the campaign! Madison's objective is to meet and hear from as many people in our state—both rural and urban—as possible. Because we are committed to building a more united Oklahoma, we have been crisscrossing the state non-stop and as of last week we have visited all 77 counties. This is a huge victory because we are the only campaign with this achievement and we were told it was impossible! Here are some some highlights from the campaign trail | | | | | | | | = | | Join us! We’re building a movement of everyday Oklahomans doing what’s right. Hi Team,
For the past 6 years, I have fought to improve and protect our elections system. We’ve modernized the voter registration system in New Mexico, and advocated for automatic voter registration and same-day voter registration – both of which are now law in the state.

**But this year, our elections are under attack from conspiracy theorists who want to roll back the progress we have fought for. That is why I’m asking for your help.**
[**_Our democracy is on the line this election year. We cannot let Big Lie believers take away our voting rights. Will you donate $10 or more before midnight to become a grassroots supporter of our campaign to keep our elections safe?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46173929/349156662/-532505380?refcode=EM_F_220606Primary5_E_MTO_90DO180DC_5_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzJmMDkwYS1hMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IDrLqMzhEkhR8XtF4WYtJvwqC5yx85zQeHCppkyRoD4=)

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! clean_body: We must keep our elections strong in these difficult times. = Hi Team, For the past 6 years, I have fought to improve and protect our elections system. We’ve modernized the voter registration system in New Mexico, and advocated for automatic voter registration and same-day voter registration – both of which are now law in the state. But this year, our elections are under attack from conspiracy theorists who want to roll back the progress we have fought for. That is why I’m asking for your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = There's no time to waste. Voters are already casting ballots, and every contribution helps us amplify our message and reach more voters. = Thank you, Maggie Toulouse Oliver Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Peter,

In 2021, Democrats narrowly won a pair of U.S. Senate races in Georgia, allowing President Biden to pass a $1.9 TRILLION spending package that most Americans believed wasn't needed.

This package was only made possible by one man: _**Senator Raphael Warnock.**_ His vote was the deciding vote on the bill.

Because of this and other votes for the disastrous Biden agenda, you can thank Senator Warnock for:
1. Surging gas prices
2. Higher meat prices
3. Skyrocketing rent
4. Increased utility bills

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: This is treason
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter,

Joe Biden declared war on the Second Amendment and Americans that support gun rights.

**Biden and the Democrats made it clear their real goal is to ban and confiscate every last firearm in America.**

I stood up to the gun grabbers and drew a line in the sand with a warning to the Never Trump establishment and the D.C. swamp. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60281444:WL2vg8hON:m:1:2365227053:5E35CF0C8E241E39E5A62E41B8AAEEEB:r) Any RINO that joins with the gun grabbers to restrict American's Second Amendment rights is a traitor to the Constitution and their constituents.

_I need your help to lead the fight in Congress to protect our God-given Second Amendment rights_.

**Will you[chip in a contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60281444:WL2vg8hON:m:1:2365227053:5E35CF0C8E241E39E5A62E41B8AAEEEB:r) so I can elect an America First majority that will fire Nancy Pelosi and stop the D.C. swamp's unconstitutional attacks on the Second Amendment?** [**HELP MATT GAETZ STOP THE GUN GRABBERS
CHIP IN TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60281444:WL2vg8hON:m:1:2365227053:5E35CF0C8E241E39E5A62E41B8AAEEEB:r) **Peter, we are falling behind.**

Democrats, Hollywood liberals, and George Soros-funded Super PACS are dumping millions into competitive districts to elect gun grabbers who will eliminate the filibuster, pack the Supreme Court and erase the Second Amendment from the Constitution.

The America First movement simply must raise the funds necessary to match this onslaught supporting gun grabbers in key races.

But ousting Democrats is not enough.

**As I made clear in my remarks during the Democrat's anti-Second Amendment show trial hearing, there are RINOS in Congress looking to collude with Democrats on dangerous red flag confiscation laws.**

Red flag confiscation laws allow the government to burst into Americans' homes and seize their guns with no due process of law.

This package was only made possible by one man: _**Senator Raphael Warnock.**_ His vote was the deciding vote on the bill.

Because of this and other votes for the disastrous Biden agenda, you can thank Senator Warnock for:

body:
Fellow Conservative:

One down, one to go!
Congressman Mo Brooks - the House Freedom Caucus conservative and America First warrior from Alabama - pulled off the most remarkable comeback of 2022 by forcing a runoff in the Republican primary election for U.S. Senate.
Just weeks ago, pundits said Brooks was finished. The Republican Establishment spent millions supporting corporate lobbyist Katie Britt - a RINO in sheep's clothing who will hand Alabama's Senate seat over to Mitch McConnell.
But Brooks stormed back in the primary the same way he leads in Washington - fighting on principle.
Please help Mo Brooks win the June 21st primary runoff election by making an urgent contribution to his campaign.
Alabama's runoff is a textbook case of the Swamp vs. America.
Katie Britt is a career Beltway insider - a former lobbyist and congressional insider. She's a Republican, all right. But she's running to serve Washington values in Alabama - not the other way around.

That's why she's getting money from Never Trump RINOs like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger. Make no mistake: Katie Britt won't be there for us when the chips are down, and gloves come off.
Immigration. Big Tech. Election integrity. The 2nd Amendment. The Right to Life. Religious freedom. Defunding the woke, socialist Left.
These issues are too important to sit on the sidelines.
Mo Brooks understands that the only hope conservatives have is fighting. In the House. In this campaign. His whole life has been dedicated to our Constitution, our traditional values, and our freedom. That's why the Establishment IS AFRAID OF HIM!
Support Mo Brooks for Senate!
SCF is all in for Mo Brooks in this race against the Establishment's McConnell-Britt ticket. Alabama is one of the strongest conservative states in the country: they deserve better than another Swamp dweller.
Help us defeat the Establishment and elect Mo Brooks with a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or more now.
SCF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his grassroots campaign.
We have three weeks to win this fight. Mo needs us and we need him.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help build a conservative Senate.

Sincerely,

Matt Hoskins
Senior Advisor
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

 

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

 

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Did you see my wife’s email?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I just wanted to make sure you saw the email sent by my darling wife Annie yesterday. If I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, there’s nobody else I’d rather have by my side every day. Over our four decades of marriage, Annie’s been my partner, my North Star, and an incredible mother to our children. I can’t wait for you to get to know her as the next First Lady of Maryland!
If you are able, I’d appreciate it if you could help me reach my team’s important $20,000 fundraising goal by our June 7 deadline. Any amount you can spare, whether large or small, will be critical in our efforts to reach out to voters in the final stretch of this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
All the best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
Forwarded Message Below:
Dear Peter,
In case we haven’t met yet, I’m Anne Maher, Peter’s wife of 41 incredible years.
Since Peter first announced his campaign for Governor, I’ve had a wonderful time meeting many of his friends, supporters, and allies on the campaign trail. Speaking with Marylanders at farmers’ markets, holiday parades, on neighborhood main streets, and at small local businesses has been a true highlight of this past year, and I’d like to thank everyone who shared their stories with me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
Over my husband's decades of service to the people of Maryland, I’ve seen firsthand his incredible commitment to delivering results for our most vulnerable communities. He lives by a code to stand up for the underserved, and put those less fortunate before himself. He’ll make a brilliant Governor of Maryland, and he’ll partner with his statewide coalition of local activists, community leaders, and fellow elected officials to deliver bold, transformative change for our communities.
Peter is fired up and ready to win the Democratic nomination on July 19 -- but in order to get there, he needs your help. Right now, Peter and his team are working hard to meet their critical fundraising deadline on June 7. If you believe in Peter’s vision of transformative change and progress, will you chip in to help him meet his fundraising goal of $20,000?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=10&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=50&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=100&refcode=kicker]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?refcode=kicker]
With mere weeks to go until election day, every dollar raised towards our goal will amplify our campaign’s efforts to reach out to voters in these final weeks. We need Peter as our next Governor, and we need you to help us reach our fundraising goal to make that happen!
My husband is humbled and honored by the trust that you place in him every day, and I know that he will never let you down as Maryland’s next Governor. If I haven’t met you on the campaign trail yet, I hope I have a chance to do so in the near future!
Onwards to victory,
Anne
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

[Will you chip in $10 and then read my story below?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46182799/349179019/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_2201_FR_BIO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThmODkyYy1hYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nblv3vgkobO3_yDV5eZuDop3w-0xoBqmoElKeEUxznc=) | | | [Chip in $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46182800/349179020/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_2201_FR_BIO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThmODkyYy1hYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nblv3vgkobO3_yDV5eZuDop3w-0xoBqmoElKeEUxznc=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46182801/349179021/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_2201_FR_BIO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThmODkyYy1hYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nblv3vgkobO3_yDV5eZuDop3w-0xoBqmoElKeEUxznc=)
I grew up in a working-class family, as one of eight siblings. _(Yep, you read that right -- there were 8 of us!)_
My father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant and my mother had her hands full raising me and my seven siblings.
Growing up in a big, working-class family taught me that hard-working families can succeed when we have institutions that uplift everyone -- _not just those at the top._
When I was young, both my parents were denied health coverage because of preexisting conditions. My mom suffered a heart attack just one month before she qualified for Medicare, and my parents nearly lost their home as the medical bills piled up.
Watching them continue to provide for their family in the face of so many hardships instilled in me the values I later built my campaign on: **the cooperation to build a strong team, the humility to listen and learn from others, and the dedication to give your work all you’ve got.**
When I first ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada, my mission was to fight for hardworking families and with the help of this team, _we won._
The people of Nevada’s 3rd District are at the heart of everything I do. I know how important it is to fight for issues like health care and child care, _because those issues impacted my family too._
Now, I’m facing reelection, and in order to keep this seat blue and continue fighting for Nevada’s hardworking families, I’m going to need your support. [Together, we can continue to fight for progress in Battleground Nevada. Will you chip in right now and support my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46182802/349179022/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_2201_FR_BIO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThmODkyYy1hYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nblv3vgkobO3_yDV5eZuDop3w-0xoBqmoElKeEUxznc=)

Now, I’m facing reelection, and in order to keep this seat blue and continue fighting for Nevada’s hardworking families, I’m going to need your support. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for reading, Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The enemy is within
body:
Our country is currently facing a great threat. A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate..
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztf0ac1nfm01adgbsad6sd265hm83eahvlf6k60g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1c5mc5hj8p1gmpobap9hegp39pr3e8p78d70csrj7cr4ckp3ccj0mapb4dr5c1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddk6upbephheapm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim2pb2ctjmcp724no)
[****](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfncsjpkppe6qp1jdnlousm7m421hd85fg1lueho_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clh6epr6cjh2bs)

Friend,
**Our country is currently facing a great threat.** A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I would hardly recognize.
This enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the American way of life are clear and intensifying: stifling dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted version of history.
A group that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but -- perhaps in an even more sinister way -- tear down the American spirit itself. **They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education.**
Over the past few years, we've watched horrified as this group has attempted to _**brainwash our children**_ into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country.
We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while _**trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution.**_
[**> > DONATE NOW TO HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT <<**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp9mj8fc731kgeqr9e69baudfg2370700v03mpbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clh6epr6cjh2bs)
We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were "mostly peaceful" and "passionate."
We watched _**Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth**_ - deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square.
We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn't align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time.
**Well, Friend****, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over.**
This enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched. But all hope is not lost.
**We The People still have a say.** We know the truth, you and I, about America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives.
**I am choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it down.**
Together we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the world and that they have an opportunity to continue making them even greater.

Ron DeSantis

A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I would hardly recognize. This enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the American way of life are clear and intensifying: stifling dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted version of history. A group that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but -- perhaps in an even more sinister way -- tear down the American spirit itself. They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education. Over the past few years, we've watched horrified as this group has attempted to brainwash our children into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country. We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution. We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were "mostly peaceful" and "passionate." We watched Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth - deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square. We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn't align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time. Well, Friend, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over. clean_body: | | Tomorrow’s primary election marks a major milestone in our campaign to re-elect Josh. By Wednesday morning, we’ll know who our opponent is for the general election and the real challenge will begin. With the NRCC pouring millions of dollars into our race, we have no time left to waste. We need to make sure we’re set up for success so that we can hit the ground running and respond to attacks on Josh’s strong bipartisan record from his right-wing extremist opponent. = | = Josh is committed to the fight for bipartisan progress. He’ll never stop championing Jersey Values in Congress, but now he’s facing his toughest challenge yet and needs our help. This primary election is the biggest test of our campaign to date. We need to have the strongest showing possible on Tuesday, and we’re counting on every single one of you to do your part to support Josh. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | **= | = | = Thank you, Marina Pearce Finance Director, Gottheimer for Congress | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. body:
And a website calendar | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen.com/events?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I hope your week is off to a great start. Our campaign is in full force! We are traveling across Minnesota, expanding our talented team, and getting Minnesotans engaged! I wanted to reach out because we are ramping up our event schedule and will have lots of exciting updates.

**Here are two events coming up to consider attending if you're able:

June 9th -** Join us for an "any dollar" fundraiser in Alexandria. [Get the details here](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2b981989ee&e=33b11688c1) and RSVP to [Barbara@DrScottJensen.com](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com?subject=Alexandria%20Fundraiser%20RSVP)

**June 13th** \- Join us for a Meet and Greet in Spicer, Minnesota! We'll be joined by Dr. Ashley Rath and Dr. Bob Zajac. [Get the details and RSVP HERE](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6ad54ec1ef&e=33b11688c1)!
**We also added a[ public events calendar to our website](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ecb2a1b555&e=33b11688c1)! [Click this link](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=37d9d22046&e=33b11688c1), bookmark the page, see our upcoming events, and click "subscribe" on the calendar to get updates about when our campaign is going to be near YOU!**
---
| If you don't see any events you can make, don't worry! Our team is constantly updating them - and we have a jam packed schedule over the Summer. Stay tuned!

[Let's Heal Minnesota!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=d941a3bb28&e=33b11688c1)

In Freedom,
Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

, this is important. Tomorrow is the day that we raise our voices together and unite as Californians under one mission.

As you probably know, I’m running as the GOP endorsed republican candidate for Governor - a record-setting party unification that has never happened before the primaries until now!

Can I count on you to call your family and friends to show up and vote for me for Governor tomorrow?
---

* To reverse policies that foolishly put criminals in our neighborhoods.
* To repeal laws that protect criminals more than lawful citizens.
* To lower the cost of living.
* To lower gas prices.
* To actually fix the homelessness crisis.

Join my fight to transform California.

name: Roger R. Ream
subject: What do you think should be the role of government?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsdBTQkhNP

I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with
something today. After the most recent election, the Left not
only has majority control over the House, but also has an evenly
split Senate-with the Vice President as the tie-breaking vote.
Now, the Left's desire for increased government can be won
through a simple majority vote. It feels like with this new
administration in power, anything is possible.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osdBTQkhNP

Dear
Fellow American,

I was
wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something
today.

After the
most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over
the House, but also has an evenly split Senate-with the Vice
President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left's desire for
increased government can be won through a simple majority vote.

It feels
like with this new administration in power, anything is possible.
And
that's why I want to get your opinion today.

Will you
take this short survey to share your thoughts about the role you
think government should play in a free society?

I value
what you have to say, and it will help us understand where
Americans like you think our country is headed.

You can
begin your survey below. Thank you!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60280974:sdBTQkhNP:m:3:2532013465:CBEE4A93B70545CCEE3F187172FF8BF2:r

Sincerely,

Roger R.
Ream
President
The Fund
for American Studies

clean_body: I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today. After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over the House, but also has an evenly split Senate-with the Vice President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left's desire for increased government can be won through a simple majority vote. It feels like with this new administration in power, anything is possible. Dear Fellow American, I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today. After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over the House, but also has an evenly split Senate-with the Vice President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left's desire for increased government can be won through a simple majority vote. It feels like with this new administration in power, anything is possible. And that's why I want to get your opinion today. Will you take this short survey to share your thoughts about the role you think government should play in a free society? I value what you have to say, and it will help us understand where Americans like you think our country is headed. You can begin your survey below. Thank you! Sincerely, Roger R. name: Congressman Matt Gaetz
subject: Did you see this? A vote for Red Flag laws is betrayal
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012vXplEoyaf1dtt7MCtNr0oO7z5lOitI1dE9vJTJ2DdCL0jbu1OdNjDN9jenRANWYiodySLH8xUdq_Q0OrJF_GbNv1dpTk7fODt6WCF6pglZsWtD2Tv0Cm8_lsgNkrPOp1r6O0hvTWTjjgM-ttNgu4PAUxEPBbvF96a5lmMLMH6mmw9tIG9UgMq5JZx6Dg9UDZMoG-QeUK9Q=&c=54DSn-9m-zotu7M3IHHEUWYjiGeuVU4IZ2-wrPSq6H4WbRlE-Sl_Zg==&ch=MuhrTq-joeyWxDU7ZKIxQmvPGZpCfnw3WDKQB1HYAsiqvwEMsAwLnA==)
---
| |
---
| Peter \-
---
| Let me make it clear to any of my "Republican" colleagues in the Swamp who are considering joining with the Democrats in passing sweeping, authoritarian Red Flag gun laws based on some emotion they had...
THIS WOULD BE A BETRAYAL TO YOUR VOTERS, A BETRAYAL TO THE CONSTITUTION, AND WOULD ONLY PUT A TARGET ON THE BACKS OF YOUR CONSTITUENTS!!!
---
| | | [JOIN ME: SAY "NO" TO RED FLAG LAWS!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012vXplEoyaf1dtt7MCtNr0oO7z5lOitI1dE9vJTJ2DdCL0jbu1OdNjDN9jenRANWYiodySLH8xUdq_Q0OrJF_GbNv1dpTk7fODt6WCF6pglZsWtD2Tv0Cm8_lsgNkrPOp1r6O0hvTWTjjgM-ttNgu4PAUxEPBbvF96a5lmMLMH6mmw9tIG9UgMq5JZx6Dg9UDZMoG-QeUK9Q=&c=54DSn-9m-zotu7M3IHHEUWYjiGeuVU4IZ2-wrPSq6H4WbRlE-Sl_Zg==&ch=MuhrTq-joeyWxDU7ZKIxQmvPGZpCfnw3WDKQB1HYAsiqvwEMsAwLnA==)
---
| Make no mistake. These laws WILL be abused. In fact, they're being abused RIGHT NOW.
Because this isn't about guns. This is about power. The same politicians who cheered on violent mobs while they burned down our cities now want to DISARM US without due process.
I'm not letting it slide. I'm fighting this disgraceful assault on our rights and liberties. And I need you to join me to keep the pressure on before the RINOs cave to this Democrat stunt and betray the Constitution!
---
| | | [DON'T LET THEM TAKE OUR GUNS >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012vXplEoyaf1dtt7MCtNr0oO7z5lOitI1dE9vJTJ2DdCL0jbu1OdNjDN9jenRANWYiodySLH8xUdq_Q0OrJF_GbNv1dpTk7fODt6WCF6pglZsWtD2Tv0Cm8_lsgNkrPOp1r6O0hvTWTjjgM-ttNgu4PAUxEPBbvF96a5lmMLMH6mmw9tIG9UgMq5JZx6Dg9UDZMoG-QeUK9Q=&c=54DSn-9m-zotu7M3IHHEUWYjiGeuVU4IZ2-wrPSq6H4WbRlE-Sl_Zg==&ch=MuhrTq-joeyWxDU7ZKIxQmvPGZpCfnw3WDKQB1HYAsiqvwEMsAwLnA==)

| | |
---
| Unless you want some politician or bureaucrat to take away your right to protect your home and family, I need you to join this fight, Peter.
We've seen weak Republicans in Washington betray us in the past, and we can't let it happen again!
So please, help me get the message across that this assault on our rights would be UNFORGIVABLE. clean_body: | | | | | | == | | | Peter \- | Let me make it clear to any of my "Republican" colleagues in the Swamp who are considering joining with the Democrats in passing sweeping, authoritarian Red Flag gun laws based on some emotion they had... THIS WOULD BE A BETRAYAL TO YOUR VOTERS, A BETRAYAL TO THE CONSTITUTION, AND WOULD ONLY PUT A TARGET ON THE BACKS OF YOUR CONSTITUENTS!!! | | | == | Make no mistake. These laws WILL be abused. In fact, they're being abused RIGHT NOW. Because this isn't about guns. This is about power. The same politicians who cheered on violent mobs while they burned down our cities now want to DISARM US without due process. I'm not letting it slide. I'm fighting this disgraceful assault on our rights and liberties. And I need you to join me to keep the pressure on before the RINOs cave to this Democrat stunt and betray the Constitution! | | | == | | | | == | == | | | | Unless you want some politician or bureaucrat to take away your right to protect your home and family, I need you to join this fight, Peter. We've seen weak Republicans in Washington betray us in the past, and we can't let it happen again! So please, help me get the message across that this assault on our rights would be UNFORGIVABLE. == | | | == | Thanks for not letting this slide, | == | Congressman Matt Gaetz | | | | | == == | | | == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. Rep. Donald Payne Jr. has been benefiting from an unregistered, dark money super PAC.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=606ofa [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=606ofa]

name: One Day Goal for Democracy
subject: $50,000 TODAY before it's too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|
---

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: reflecting on this historic campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46187456/349190626/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3399-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGUxMDdiNC1hZmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYurpr_SH3xS74LvHDAMOLYZ7lsBmi-XDkfrX1wixOA=)**
All the best,

Val Demings

clean_body: I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. Hello,
I couldn’t believe it when I heard it. **The day after 19 students and 2 teachers were murdered in Uvalde, Texas, Chuck Grassley started running a new ad across Iowa radio stations touting his NRA endorsement.**
I guess it wasn’t enough for Chuck to take hundreds of thousands of dollars in blood money. Or to be named Legislator of the Year by the literal gun lobby in April.
Instead, right after a school shooting, Chuck Grassley blocks a bill requiring universal background checks and trumpets his highly-coveted NRA endorsement.
Is Grassley tone deaf or just unmoved by carnage? Either way, I’m going to beat him this November and finally end his 47-year career in Washington.
I’ll never take money from the NRA. And I certainly won’t take their endorsement. But if I’m going to go up against all their money and win, I need grassroots donors like you behind me every step of the way.
**I’m facing my most critical fundraising deadline of the entire campaign at midnight, and right now we’re still dangerously short of our $200,000 goal and what we need to keep our TV ads up. If I’m going to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I’m counting on you to give right now:**

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220605?refcode=lpfe220605_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220605?refcode=lpfe220605_m]
Texas’ S.B. 8 created a health care crisis in our state. One of the most restrictive abortion bans in the country, it’s forced thousands of Texans to travel out of state every month to get the care they need.
Now imagine if the Supreme Court moves forward with overturning Roe v. Wade . That decision would take Texas’ crisis and make it a national epidemic as tens of millions of Americans would have a harder time getting the care they need when they need it.
Many are asking themselves: What can I do?
This is the answer: Get involved.
Everyone needs to vote up and down the ballot for leaders who share our values — leaders like Lizzie. And before Election Day, we need to support those candidates and help them win in November.
Your contributions help us organize, prepare, and re-elect Lizzie so she can keep fighting for the issues that matter to us.
Thanks,
Team Lizzie
