name: Great America Update
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6019%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZhP2%2fAlDCmUAI9VNlVz4UQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62176%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L72CTdnorKWbR53fHRYL9Q&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62177%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cEndNEF0rdXYVULksSKvZA&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62177%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cEndNEF0rdXYVULksSKvZA&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6019%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZhP2%2fAlDCmUAI9VNlVz4UQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6019%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZhP2%2fAlDCmUAI9VNlVz4UQ&sysid=1)

name: NRSC Digital Team
subject: Should they be prosecuted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r)
---
| | |
Peter,
Justice Scalia once said to an incoming class of Supreme Court law clerks that "he would do 'everything in [his] power' to 'ruin' the career of any law clerk who betrayed his confidences."
We have one very simple question for you: _**Do you believe that if it turns out to be an employee of the Supreme Court who leaked the draft reversal of Roe V. Wade they should be prosecuted to the full extent of federal law?**_
[**Yes, prosecute crooks >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r)
[**No, let them off the hook >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r)
Once again, as is becoming increasingly typical, the Supreme Court, or matters closely related to the court, is becoming the focal point of this year's midterm elections.
Dems are raising MILLIONS of dollars to save their Senate majority in hopes that they can rebuild their liberal majority on the Court. We're of the belief that DEMS don't mind the leak but are instead grateful that the news from the Supreme Court helped to super charge their fundraising mere months before voters start filling out their general election ballots.
[_**Let us know where you stand on all of this by taking our brief survey today.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r)
Thanks,
NRSC Digital Team
Survey Questions:
_**Should the Supreme Court leaker be prosecuted to the full extent of the law?**_
[_\- Absolutely_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r) [_\- I 'm not sure_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r)
_**Will you help us gain a conservative majority in the Senate? Every additional Republican elected to the U.S. Senate gives conservatives an increased chance that Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer won't ' be able to place another liberal justice on the Court.**_
[_\- Yes, I 'll contribute $2_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r) [_\- Yes, I 'll contribute another amount_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529661:J2GeHXoN6:m:1:3253819041:58A8B164D6253B56BFBABE158C961D61:r)

| |
---

name: John King
subject: Only 1 DAY remains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Before our public fundraising deadline hits tomorrow night, I wanted to share a little about why I entered this crowded race.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46189717/349201718/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220606&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=076fcd01-b6e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzZmY2QwMS1iNmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pq1CmVaWgL4HkRqWWgIqIS0fAiIR5tssHL-DbO2p0LM=)
---
| **Peter, before our public fundraising deadline hits tomorrow night, I wanted to share a little about why I entered this crowded race. ** I’m running for Governor of Maryland because I know that state government is meant to be a force for good in people’s lives. Public institutions have the power to transform and literally save lives – and I know that because public schools saved me after both my parents passed away when I was a kid. **Things like quality public transportation, stronger public schools, a living wage, and better support and access to capital for small businesses would make such a meaningful difference in lifting up those across the state who need a boost and benefit everyone in the process.** As governor, I will never back down from doing what it takes to deliver on the promise of progress Marylanders deserve, and I’m counting on a people-powered movement to help me do it. With our fundraising deadline just 1 DAY away, [_**I’m reaching out to humbly ask: will you please pitch in whatever you can to ensure we have the resources to fuel this movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46189719/349201720/151645868?source=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220606&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=076fcd01-b6e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzZmY2QwMS1iNmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pq1CmVaWgL4HkRqWWgIqIS0fAiIR5tssHL-DbO2p0LM=)

clean_body: Before our public fundraising deadline hits tomorrow night, I wanted to share a little about why I entered this crowded race. | = | Peter, before our public fundraising deadline hits tomorrow night, I wanted to share a little about why I entered this crowded race. I’m running for Governor of Maryland because I know that state government is meant to be a force for good in people’s lives. Public institutions have the power to transform and literally save lives – and I know that because public schools saved me after both my parents passed away when I was a kid. Things like quality public transportation, stronger public schools, a living wage, and better support and access to capital for small businesses would make such a meaningful difference in lifting up those across the state who need a boost and benefit everyone in the process. As governor, I will never back down from doing what it takes to deliver on the promise of progress Marylanders deserve, and I’m counting on a people-powered movement to help me do it. With our fundraising deadline just 1 DAY away, = | | = I know a more just, prosperous future is possible for our state — one built on economic, racial, climate, and educational justice.And honestly, we don’t have the time to wait. body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg4vlgtovk7n7rn5heb0vao0nb7ge5rh2cuh2fmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6co34cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqeddtge3gm2t3ie5ojcp9hcji66d9i6mp64c33moom5ddnc9gmattlmkqb7cdn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj33cljcorrcob661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoqmbnr1nr5njs0vp920ulavonuu6465brru3d08_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6co34cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5r59aqgf569b6e45nttlfq6leujn04ut3ueaefo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6co34cph2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z11uggehpmpnjs36k0jrk0cb0ltp45djr5nos4c8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6co34cph2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrkk6fved80rh74ogdf0ck9f3047pu1lf0fa6pn0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6co34cph2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

name: Deb McGrath
subject: I want to show you one of my most prized possessions:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s why we can never give up.

| Peter, this painting hangs in my home, where my family and I can look at it every day. It has hung there for 50 years and it always will. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190025/349203279/-318732308?refcode=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTllMjIxNy1iOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sw46Onknq39IkgAv0KSYEuGgJUEFq7WUP9ldZ6n4gy4=&emci=702412c2-aae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5944225) It’s one of our most prized possessions.

You might be wondering if we’re lucky enough to have a Picasso at home! Well, I think it’s even more precious.

It was first drawn on yellow-lined paper by a five-year-old boy from rural Wisconsin, and later rendered by an artist. The boy drew and colored it while receiving treatment for cancer, Hodgkin's Lymphoma. He passed away from that disease.

**The artist was my brother, Erik John Baldus.**

My father took Erik to Madison for care because there wasn’t a hospital that could treat him closer to home. My parents agreed to allow Erik to enter experimental trials, and because of courageous patients like him, there are now life-saving therapies to treat other children. But they came too late for my brother.

**Peter, like so many Wisconsinites, my family knows firsthand what it means to lose a loved one: and how the pain never leaves you.** It’s been decades since we lost Erik, but his passing inspires me to advocate for better, more accessible healthcare for our communities — because I know what it’s like when the system fails you.

**In Congress, I’ll work hard to make sure healthcare is accessible, affordable, and excellent no matter where you live or how much you make.[If you agree that it’s long past time to fix our broken healthcare system, add your name to my petition supporting healthcare reform today >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190027/349203293/-318732308?refcode=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTllMjIxNy1iOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sw46Onknq39IkgAv0KSYEuGgJUEFq7WUP9ldZ6n4gy4=&emci=702412c2-aae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)**

My parents did everything possible to save Erik’s life. They had to make some difficult choices — choices no parent should have to make. It still wasn’t enough.

I know all too well that rural Wisconsin is still hurting for healthcare, not unlike when Menomonie didn’t have a hospital that could treat Erik’s cancer. Monumental changes are necessary if we’re to prevent healthcare outcomes like those my brother suffered.

For our family, Erik’s painting represents the need for continued strength in the face of our toughest challenges. **Erik never gave up living joyfully amid pain, and I’ll never give up advocating for healthcare reform in his name.**

**[Please, add your voice to mine to speak out for change. Sign on to support healthcare reform>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190028/349203306/-318732308?refcode=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTllMjIxNy1iOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sw46Onknq39IkgAv0KSYEuGgJUEFq7WUP9ldZ6n4gy4=&emci=702412c2-aae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)** | ****[SIGN ON >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190030/349203318/-318732308?refcode=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTllMjIxNy1iOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sw46Onknq39IkgAv0KSYEuGgJUEFq7WUP9ldZ6n4gy4=&emci=702412c2-aae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d19e2217-b8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)****

Thank you so much for taking the time to read about my brother,

Deb
| **Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity.**

Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. name: American Action News
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdpnngne1up6s33khf5a57f9vqj54opest3mtqeg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uaoe6sr1c1h71cr261hmcob5esr3bdtlm5jb9cj0soon2or269omcstkmspn4tpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shkcoor5cr661rm6phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c5imcpj4spi649fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1dum0ch9p6eueun4110nfb3f67p86dpr2afjsag_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6cp76chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zijk4qk850e33cns6mrjbkrpc9ksbujvh9lfre18_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6cp76chh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zel41c9ne9jijb9ss6789l1fnikqfbqphkbualhg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj6cp76chh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
Jake smashes false attacks in the 6th District debate.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_VaHGf0Fq1yBjSFfE4XhqKfj1zYqPU-5-g52_3ZX2Rxp7R2Zhc-CxuO8ttR964IKxYRllvydx9uCi52adsq0R3HISLCTpTfRDLg3pD6b-yIchW0fcdzTZ0wCju5xutkFdOd_G-9zeBw=&c=46XlbyVt8kRuNtkiVy1rb1t2NA4C9G1YA60xjB8JtkiRnYAEoK6Uuw==&ch=zoZKdONSottzsbA8g4gmP_mXXBqsQkqz9-PtJvrAbekekkAVNH4HJg==)
---
|
---
| For immediate release June 6th, 2022
Jake smashes false attacks in the 6th District debate.
RINO Rich can't refute that he's bought by pro-choice, anti-gun liberal special interests.
In his Atlanta Press Club debate win today, Jake Evans, the Trump-endorsed candidate for Georgia's 6th District, smashed Rich McCormick's false attacks and left McCormick stammering as he failed to explain why liberal special interests that support abortion on demand, gun grabs and biological men in girls sports are pouring cash into his campaign. "Rich McCormick zigged, zagged and did everything but own up to the liberal special interest support pouring into his campaign," Jake said. "Rich McCormick continued the silliness of attacking an assigned law school paper from 10 years ago - an attack repeatedly dismissed as false by the Marietta Daily Journal." McCormick's obsessive lies about a 10-year-old law school assignment even led the Marietta Daily Journal to weigh in to set the record straight: "Anyone who knows Evans can only chuckle at the thought of him being a woke progressive for simply writing an academic paper in law school 10 years ago," the paper stated in a recent Around Town column. "You think Donald Trump, Newt Gingrich or former Cobb County Sheriff Neil Warren would endorse anyone who is woke? Neither do we." With McCormick's team persisting, the MDJ wrote again: "Why McCormick remains fixated on Evans' school writings is anyone's guess, but if he's sincere, he'd admit communists 'inspire' Evans as much as they inspired Aleksandr Solzhenitsyn [a famed Soviet dissident]." "Voters in the 6th District who watched today's debate to inform their decision saw for themselves that I'm an unwavering America First conservative who will stand up for law enforcement, religious freedom and our gun rights," Jake said. "And Rich McCormick can't even refute the facts that he's bought and paid for by liberal interests fighting for abortion on demand, anti-gun policies and biological males in girls sports."
---
| |
---

name: Jim DeMint
subject: New York Times Meltdown
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The New York Times just learned about CPI's Election Integrity Network and the statewide training conferences we have been leading across the country this year.
And after seeing Cleta Mitchell leading just one Summit meeting, they are in full-out panic mode!
Sunday, they published a 3,500-word expose on our efforts to:

Organize volunteers (GASP!),
Teach them how elections work (SHUDDER!),
Train them to be civil and gracious (HOW DARE WE!), and
Show them how to ensure fair elections.

THE HORROR!
The ridiculous article was the latest in a series of insinuating, dishonest hit pieces against Cleta, CPI, and conservatives. Whenever conservatives act, the media gets scared.
Well... they should be.
For generations, the media, the deep state, and liberal poll workers had exclusive power over election information in this country. The lesson Americans learned in 2020: NEVER AGAIN.
Help end election fraud today: Support CPI
The public wants free and fair elections, and the Election Integrity Network is working every day to ensure we have them.
Liberal pundits are outraged that we're teaching activists exactly how the system works and how to prevent it from being corrupted. We teach citizens how to regain control over and confidence in their elections - and the Left calls that "intimidation."
Hogwash.
They know what this is really about. They know the corners they have cut, the games they play with the rules, and with our votes. And we're putting a stop to it.
We're going to be holding Election Integrity Summits in numerous states between now and November. But we can't do it without you.
Support CPI and the Election Integrity Network!
We need your help to take this work to the next level. Voting season is in full swing, and the most important mid-term elections of our lives are only MONTHS AWAY!
There is no time to lose - and no organization working harder to protect the integrity of the voting booth and the ballot box than CPI's Election Integrity Network.
If the liberals at the New York Times are shaking in their boots, you know we're doing something right!
Thank you for considering this request and doing so much to help fight for America's future.

For Freedom,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

 

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 FaxCPI.org

SUPPORT CPI

body:

Peter,

The PA GOP has chosen Doug Mastriano as their candidate to become Pennsylvania's next Governor. Here are a few facts about Mastriano:

❌ He attended the January 6th insurrection on the Capitol.
❌ He compared gun safety legislation to the oppressive regimes of Lenin and Hitler.
❌ He opposes same-sex marriage and thinks LGBTQ+ couples should _not_ be allowed to adopt and start a family.
❌ He would outlaw abortions in Pennsylvania and criminalize the doctors who perform them.
❌ He doesn't believe climate change is real and has called it “fake science.”
❌ He would force every single one of the almost nine million PA voters to re-register.
❌ He’s already picked his Secretary of State, who — as he says — will decertify voting machines and dismantle our democracy.

Doug Mastriano isn't some fringe member of the Republican Party — he is the future of the MAGA movement — more extreme than Trump himself.

He will do anything for Trump and nothing for Pennsylvanians.
**[It's on us to defeat Doug Mastriano, and elect Democrat Josh Shapiro. Can you chip in to help Josh and Democrats up and down the ballot defeat the MAGA movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190826/349206893/416624902?refcode=email_220606_mastriano&utm_campaign=email_220606_mastriano&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzlkNTczMC1iYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHtxvyq7xbuISNKRQm78hcU1uQZGYjH8cADHq7qqeLY=)**

clean_body: Peter, The PA GOP has chosen Doug Mastriano as their candidate to become Pennsylvania's next Governor. Here are a few facts about Mastriano: ❌ He attended the January 6th insurrection on the Capitol. ❌ He compared gun safety legislation to the oppressive regimes of Lenin and Hitler. ❌ He opposes same-sex marriage and thinks LGBTQ+ couples should not be allowed to adopt and start a family. ❌ He would outlaw abortions in Pennsylvania and criminalize the doctors who perform them. ❌ He doesn't believe climate change is real and has called it “fake science.” ❌ He would force every single one of the almost nine million PA voters to re-register. ❌ He’s already picked his Secretary of State, who — as he says — will decertify voting machines and dismantle our democracy. Doug Mastriano isn't some fringe member of the Republican Party — he is the future of the MAGA movement — more extreme than Trump himself. Gas prices are soaring, baby formula is scarce, and Americans are drowning from the impacts of inflation.

Biden blames everyone but himself:
* Russia
* COVID
* Trump
* Others

_But you’re smart enough to know that no matter how much he deflects, it IS his fault._

**Now, we need your help to hold him accountable.**

subject: Healthcare...I have a plan for that!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley
body:
At the core of my healthcare plan is my belief in a holistic approach to addressing healthcare.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190875/349206972/1518741132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWViZDk1MS1iYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKujKGnNjaropMHOkOz86WvwUvOGKZ1EMkO6HTkMnyg=)

| | Hi Friend, Tennessee deserves a governor who is about us. As Governor, I will advocate for affordable and accessible health care while also addressing disparities which will lead to better health outcomes for everyone who calls Tennessee home.

At the core of my healthcare plan is my belief in a holistic approach to addressing healthcare. The major elements are Medicaid Expansion, improving access to care, addressing dietary needs, and expanding mental health resources. Read the full plan [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190878/349206980/1036978613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWViZDk1MS1iYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKujKGnNjaropMHOkOz86WvwUvOGKZ1EMkO6HTkMnyg=&emci=74731e49-87e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=45ebd951-bae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=12740612).

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46190879/349206981/1518741132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWViZDk1MS1iYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKujKGnNjaropMHOkOz86WvwUvOGKZ1EMkO6HTkMnyg=)

According to Census reports, nearly 800,000 Tennesseans are uninsured. Medicaid expansion would decrease this number by nearly half. Instead, the Tennessee legislature rejected over $10 Billion dollars in health benefits for disadvantaged Tennesseans over the last eight years. (Over $1 Billion dollars per year.) As a result, nearly 400,000 Tennesseans are left without health insurance.

As Governor, I will work with the mental health community to reduce the stigma around mental health diagnoses and prioritize the whole person. We will dedicate funding to eliminate food deserts.

clean_body: At the core of my healthcare plan is my belief in a holistic approach to addressing healthcare.| | | = | | Hi Friend, Tennessee deserves a governor who is about us. As Governor, I will advocate for affordable and accessible health care while also addressing disparities which will lead to better health outcomes for everyone who calls Tennessee home. At the core of my healthcare plan is my belief in a holistic approach to addressing healthcare. The major elements are Medicaid Expansion, improving access to care, addressing dietary needs, and expanding mental health resources. Read the full plan . | | = | However, this current administration talks about being pro-life, but fail to expand care to 400,000 Tennesseans. We deserve better. Help make this a reality. = = = = = | | According to Census reports, nearly 800,000 Tennesseans are uninsured. Medicaid expansion would decrease this number by nearly half. Instead, the Tennessee legislature rejected over $10 Billion dollars in health benefits for disadvantaged Tennesseans over the last eight years. (Over $1 Billion dollars per year.) As a result, nearly 400,000 Tennesseans are left without health insurance. As Governor, I will work with the mental health community to reduce the stigma around mental health diagnoses and prioritize the whole person. We will dedicate funding to eliminate food deserts. | | = | Yours in service, Councilman JB Smiley, Jr., Esq. name: Delina DiSanto
subject: RE: Gun Lobby or our Children?
body:
This must come to an end.
| | Dear Peter,

It's time to ask this question: **What is more important, the gun lobby or our children?** David Schweikert has voted to protect the NRA and keep military guns in the hands of people with mental behavior issues. To make matters worse, he has voted against background checks.

Do you want Schweikert to stay in Congress and continue allowing voting to promote military-style guns in the hands of wrong people? Or will you help me defeat Schweikert and _fight for our children_?
I will work with Gabby Giffords and her organization to stop gun violence, bring mental health nurses to schools, get bills passed to have mandatory background checks and more. These horrific killings of our children must come to an end.
It's time to get things done in Congress.
Please, help this campaign today and say you're with me in this fight! Thank you for your support,Delina
---

clean_body: This must come to an end. | | Dear Peter, It's time to ask this question: What is more important, the gun lobby or our children? David Schweikert has voted to protect the NRA and keep military guns in the hands of people with mental behavior issues. To make matters worse, he has voted against background checks. Do you want Schweikert to stay in Congress and continue allowing voting to promote military-style guns in the hands of wrong people? Or will you help me defeat Schweikert and fight for our children? I will work with Gabby Giffords and her organization to stop gun violence, bring mental health nurses to schools, get bills passed to have mandatory background checks and more. These horrific killings of our children must come to an end. It's time to get things done in Congress. Please, help this campaign today and say you're with me in this fight! Thank you for your support,Delina | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | | | | | | | | | | == | == | == | | PO BOX 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327, United States of America | | or | |

Innocent people are dying in classrooms, in grocery stores, in movie theaters, in churches, at concerts, and even attending funerals. Here in Florida, every year thousands of people are killed or injured from senseless gun violence, and it has to stop.
Friend —

Innocent people are dying in classrooms, in grocery stores, in movie theaters, in churches, at concerts, and even attending funerals. Here in Florida, every year thousands of people are killed or injured from senseless gun violence, and it has to stop.

**We must take action now to end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our communities.**

**[You know where we stand on this critical issue facing all of us here in Florida and across our nation, but now we need to hear from you. Now, what gun violence prevention policies to you support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46191453/349209530/-2057911042?contactdata=3%2BjAMoRed1JEdbYGPragyR3f3lVsgrQGCg0BhPOTOBrsyKsQ5fq2m1q8XUFXdySuI9VAJr6q7oGxRYTQzEvnC%2BlCncZdTNqfm6osrH8A6eksVbCdCrlxgY%2F2ySPniCCTtsmGx3eDH61YzNwmZOmvzA%3D%3D&refcode=060622-es-gun-violence-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFmNzE4Ny1iYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eqI_ICoeoWgrOA9556e3F-vfqrLakFdlW76jXb6tGR8=&emci=e6c77126-bbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=3f1f7187-bbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=9814644)**

**_Do you support banning assault rifles and high-capacity magazines, and requiring background checks on every firearm sale to help prevent gun violence?_**

**[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46191454/349209531/-2057911042?contactdata=3%2BjAMoRed1JEdbYGPragyR3f3lVsgrQGCg0BhPOTOBrsyKsQ5fq2m1q8XUFXdySuI9VAJr6q7oGxRYTQzEvnC%2BlCncZdTNqfm6osrH8A6eksVbCdCrlxgY%2F2ySPniCCTtsmGx3eDH61YzNwmZOmvzA%3D%3D&refcode=060622-es-gun-violence-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFmNzE4Ny1iYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eqI_ICoeoWgrOA9556e3F-vfqrLakFdlW76jXb6tGR8=&emci=e6c77126-bbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=3f1f7187-bbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=9814644)**

[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46191455/349209532/-2057911042?contactdata=3%2BjAMoRed1JEdbYGPragyR3f3lVsgrQGCg0BhPOTOBrsyKsQ5fq2m1q8XUFXdySuI9VAJr6q7oGxRYTQzEvnC%2BlCncZdTNqfm6osrH8A6eksVbCdCrlxgY%2F2ySPniCCTtsmGx3eDH61YzNwmZOmvzA%3D%3D&refcode=060622-es-gun-violence-survey-ina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFmNzE4Ny1iYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eqI_ICoeoWgrOA9556e3F-vfqrLakFdlW76jXb6tGR8=&emci=e6c77126-bbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=3f1f7187-bbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=9814644)

All of our elected officials should speak out and take the necessary actions to stop this carnage. Unfortunately, Republicans are beholden to the gun lobby as they bankroll their campaigns, so we must do everything we can to help elect Democrats demanding change.

Here at Build Local Power, we are working to register and mobilize a new coalition of voters to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot here in Florida who support taking action to end gun violence.

Together, we can help end gun violence — but it will take all of us to stand up and demand action.

Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

— Build Local Power

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Do What You Said You Would Do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

---
| | | Peter, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529748:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529748:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529748:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r "By ordering your
copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I've signed won't last long, so order yours immediately.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529748:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r "So please don't
pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of
my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529748:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529749:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529749:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529749:JbWpiXoXN:m:1:3253819041:02DF4912E7BA38A6C67CF6A3510DDEFA:r "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

Hearing input directly from voters like you is incredibly helpful to me as I work to bring back responsive representation to Congress. I pledge to always be a Congressman who listens — and that starts right now.
I would really appreciate hearing from you. [Please, click here to take our survey right away >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46191787/349210923/-1116669921?refcode=ea.b924ed43-bde5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.b924ed43-bde5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTI0ZWQ0My1iZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z5nCqcAfM6C2IBe0ru9vrbOJZvRw8yhx1s7M68iUQro=&emci=e1438b01-56e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=b924ed43-bde5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5460736)

In order to defeat Jack Bergman, our effort this year must be unprecedented. We have to mobilize more than ever before, and have the tough conversations with Democrats, Independents, and swing voters -- and yes, even Republicans. We can absolutely win this race, but it's going to be tough and it's going to require all of us. We're up against a lot. Right now, most of your contributions are going to support my amazing staff and help them organize volunteers, and WE TAKE CARE OF OUR VOLUNTEERS! Please help us provide everyone the resources they need to rock the vote throughout the summer. Thank you,

| | The Friends of Dr. Bob campaign is committed to meaningful content, and we genuinely hope recipients enjoy the quality of stories we share. But, when we're not on the same page as our readers, we've already sent our least favorite kind of message. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. Justice Scalia once said to an incoming class of Supreme Court law clerks that "he would do 'everything in [his] power' to 'ruin' the career of any law clerk who betrayed his confidences."
We have one very simple question for you: _**Do you believe that if it turns out to be an employee of the Supreme Court who leaked the draft reversal of Roe V. Wade they should be prosecuted to the full extent of federal law?**_
[**Yes, prosecute crooks >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529825:6os3iXoNx:m:1:3299561967:1B3DB242B756FB3D9678DA2FDC8E22B1:r)
[**No, let them off the hook >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529825:6os3iXoNx:m:1:3299561967:1B3DB242B756FB3D9678DA2FDC8E22B1:r)
Once again, as is becoming increasingly typical, the Supreme Court, or matters closely related to the court, is becoming the focal point of this year's midterm elections.
Dems are raising MILLIONS of dollars to save their Senate majority in hopes that they can rebuild their liberal majority on the Court. We're of the belief that DEMS don't mind the leak but are instead grateful that the news from the Supreme Court helped to super charge their fundraising mere months before voters start filling out their general election ballots.
[_**Let us know where you stand on all of this by taking our brief survey today.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529825:6os3iXoNx:m:1:3299561967:1B3DB242B756FB3D9678DA2FDC8E22B1:r)
Thanks,
NRSC Digital Team
Survey Questions:
_**Should the Supreme Court leaker be prosecuted to the full extent of the law?**_
[_\- Absolutely_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529825:6os3iXoNx:m:1:3299561967:1B3DB242B756FB3D9678DA2FDC8E22B1:r) [_\- I 'm not sure_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529825:6os3iXoNx:m:1:3299561967:1B3DB242B756FB3D9678DA2FDC8E22B1:r)
_**Will you help us gain a conservative majority in the Senate? Every additional Republican elected to the U.S. Senate gives conservatives an increased chance that Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer won't ' be able to place another liberal justice on the Court.**_
[_\- Yes, I 'll contribute $2_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529825:6os3iXoNx:m:1:3299561967:1B3DB242B756FB3D9678DA2FDC8E22B1:r) [_\- Yes, I 'll contribute another amount_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60529825:6os3iXoNx:m:1:3299561967:1B3DB242B756FB3D9678DA2FDC8E22B1:r)

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: I’m a proud ally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Team —

As our Congressman, Rep. Ted Deutch has been an outstanding ally to the LGBTQ+ community. He co-sponsored the Equality Act, stood up to attacks on equality in Tallahassee and Washington, and is currently working to pass the Connie and Ruthie bill to protect older members of the LGBTQ+ community.

During Pride Month, I’m proud to be an ally and looking forward to continuing Rep. Deutch’s legacy of fighting for the LGBTQ+ community.

I hope Pride Month gives you an opportunity to celebrate, whether you’re embracing your own identity or honoring the LGBTQ+ people who are special in your life. This month is an opportunity to uplift the hard-fought progress our nation has made in the ongoing fight for equality.

While we have made great strides, we also have much work yet to be done. From Tallahassee to Washington, Republicans have renewed their attacks on marriage equality, transgender kids, and LGBTQ+ people everywhere.

That’s why I’m committed to continuing the fight for equal rights in Congress, just as I did in the State House.

I’m proud to have earned the support of so many of my former colleagues in the Legislature – including many LGBTQ+ colleagues like Representatives Michele Rayner and Carlos Guillermo Smith, former
Representative David Richardson, and Senator Shevrin Jones – and even more proud to be an ally to them and all LGBTQ+ Floridians.

Love is love is love.

In solidarity,

Jared

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I’m reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump’s new social media app? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven’t you responded? Would you join Trump’s app?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump →](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1qrhfo2tueqdm60a9bmtgls70748ua33gchiso8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj66or4c5h2bs)**

President Trump promises some incredible things for his new app:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This app is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z76t5hil45hv8teo3mdatm8fpn79i62f1c7g0m7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj66or4c5h2bs)

\-- Sarah

body:
Peter, Mowers was defeated by Chris Pappas two years ago by six points. If we are serious about retaking the House and making America first again
| [ ](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Ctc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/VVs7PL4XmG1fW40rhV94d6L36W3trWRD4K-GkgN1zSXsk3lLBmV1-WJV7CgFVJW95xWBw5m8jHNW7TNWPY3J2wvwW6z9yF42fNFSjW6p4Srx5NS0Y7W54dVZZ3cdYhwW7jPbmT91zn-1W5qXd0h1Xl7-4W6JrjhJ587NlXW5lbFZH4F4sfMW6XqSyz8lBkqvW2PXtyV4J25twN1DpgSKRqMcXW1FQMh-646M-QW8h2qsk8Rf0d_W6Wq46d9dvsYDW3Pq5Wk1F_f9cW31HQYl6qb1RKW5b6m0n1BTv0RW6HP0mZ8g3bWSW2TVd2X4DVtyyW361kgf2QgjTWN7QqDds9L-Mt3bD41)
---
Peter, Since launching my campaign for Congress... I've made it clear that I'm running to make the GOP and America more like liberty warrior Thomas Massie. Now, my opponent Jersey Matt Mowers has been endorsed by Kevin McCarthy... the number one enemy of the House Freedom Caucus. So I'll pose this question to the voters of New Hampshire: do you want a Thomas Massie or a corrupt swamp creature like Kevin McCarthy? That's the race we are running and it's why I'm emailing you today to tell you that our momentum will not be stopped by enemies of liberty in Washington DC. Jersey Mowers, who has never held elected office, is described as a "_tough and tested conservative_ " by McCarthy... McCarthy is an establishment hack who has turned his back on the people who elected him to advance his career in politics. Mowers was defeated by Chris Pappas two years ago by _six points_. If we are serious about retaking the House and making America first again, can we really risk taking another chance on an establishment RINO who has a history of losing to the Democrats? [We need Proven Conservative Fighters in Congress now more than ever, Peter. Click here to make a recurring monthly donation of $20.22 or more to my America-First grassroots campaign today >>>](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Ctc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/VVs7PL4XmG1fW40rhV94d6L36W3trWRD4K-GkgN1zSXsk3lLBmV1-WJV7CgVJBW5PpF771Pl2lnW8gBm0F66YGr1W8Z5rC25RjY14W5h7-yl282xj1N80bxpJWKl2DW1BP8dN7cCqvSW3L4jQP3pvJScW71_XXb8Kc5LnW4Sc4vs6hgdlPW3P97xG40Ml34W43tttP3_R8vWW89Nx2z25Dm0QVbBV204ZNfRmW8q0qK75M_2dlW2G_9GN2rFg18W3qPXdx7b04QvW5ns0Pc4vQ18tW21pNzx2f3kc9W1Dk10g5XTxVPW58JJYJ8f7GLWV_w_423FGFY3W89-pH24-hbfW35SM1)

To be honest, Jersey Mowers has earned this endorsement... Mowers has spent his career in politics catering to the Republican establishment, even going as far as to vote for RINO Gov. Chris Christie in the 2016 primary elections, and I can't think of a better candidate than Mowers to receive an endorsement from McCarthy. Senator Rand Paul and Representative Thomas Massie endorsed my America-First campaign for Congress because they know that my record in Concord proves I have both the experience and courage needed to stand up to the corrupt Washington establishment and drain the swamp. Mowers agreed that he would have sent $40 BILLION our your hard-earned money to aid Ukraine. We cannot afford another Chris Pappas representing New Hampshire's 1st district in Congress. Making America first again starts with FIRING Chris Pappas and replacing him with Proven Conservative Leadership. Mowers has proven time and time again that he's willing to turn his back on the American people, and his recent endorsement speaks for itself. clean_body: Peter, Mowers was defeated by Chris Pappas two years ago by six points. If we are serious about retaking the House and making America first again | Peter, Since launching my campaign for Congress... I've made it clear that I'm running to make the GOP and America more like liberty warrior Thomas Massie. Now, my opponent Jersey Matt Mowers has been endorsed by Kevin McCarthy... the number one enemy of the House Freedom Caucus. So I'll pose this question to the voters of New Hampshire: do you want a Thomas Massie or a corrupt swamp creature like Kevin McCarthy? That's the race we are running and it's why I'm emailing you today to tell you that our momentum will not be stopped by enemies of liberty in Washington DC. Jersey Mowers, who has never held elected office, is described as a "tough and tested conservative " by McCarthy... McCarthy is an establishment hack who has turned his back on the people who elected him to advance his career in politics. Mowers was defeated by Chris Pappas two years ago by six points. If we are serious about retaking the House and making America first again, can we really risk taking another chance on an establishment RINO who has a history of losing to the Democrats? To be honest, Jersey Mowers has earned this endorsement... Mowers has spent his career in politics catering to the Republican establishment, even going as far as to vote for RINO Gov. Chris Christie in the 2016 primary elections, and I can't think of a better candidate than Mowers to receive an endorsement from McCarthy. Senator Rand Paul and Representative Thomas Massie endorsed my America-First campaign for Congress because they know that my record in Concord proves I have both the experience and courage needed to stand up to the corrupt Washington establishment and drain the swamp. Mowers agreed that he would have sent $40 BILLION our your hard-earned money to aid Ukraine. We cannot afford another Chris Pappas representing New Hampshire's 1st district in Congress. Making America first again starts with FIRING Chris Pappas and replacing him with Proven Conservative Leadership. Mowers has proven time and time again that he's willing to turn his back on the American people, and his recent endorsement speaks for itself. Select an option below to elect the Proven Conservative Fighter in this race on Tuesday, September 13th. I am the only candidate in this race who has a record of winning elections and getting things done... I don't buckle to pressures from the radical left, and I don't negotiate with the woke mob. You can check my record in Concord because that's exactly how I plan to vote in Congress. Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress Personal Cell Phone: (603)-997-8108 | | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46192083/349212265/67411685?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzZkOWEzMS1iZmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOQY53NFNAO5tS0fC5FTfQSEi5jgu-bAT_gbidn25cQ=&emci=1bd650ed-ace5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=2c6d9a31-bfe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=32238700)

Our country cannot rely on politicians like Sarah Palin to defend Alaskans and the American people from the drug companies, team.

Over the last decade, we've seen pharmaceutical and medical supplies companies merge, cut production, and raise prices. We have noticed the squeeze – during a global pandemic, nonetheless – and because of this we were less prepared than we should have been. Unnecessarily high costs for medications make the costs of health care for many Americans and Alaskans insurmountable.

The drug companies have a stranglehold on Washington. This has kept prescription drugs ridiculously expensive here in the US. As your congressman, Al Gross will take on the drug companies. He'll start by changing the law so that Medicare can negotiate for better prices. He'll fight to make sure Americans don't pay the highest drug prices in the Western world, and he'll end our reliance on drugs made in China. When the next pandemic hits, we need to be ready.

[**The greed of pharmaceutical companies is infuriating, and it's one of the reasons why Al Gross is running for Congress against Palin. Can you please chip in $5 or more today to help our campaign? Together, we can fix this broken system.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46192084/349212272/-405614612?refcode=em22_220606_pharma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzZkOWEzMS1iZmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOQY53NFNAO5tS0fC5FTfQSEi5jgu-bAT_gbidn25cQ=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46192085/349212279/-405614612?refcode=em22_220606_pharma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzZkOWEzMS1iZmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOQY53NFNAO5tS0fC5FTfQSEi5jgu-bAT_gbidn25cQ=) Thank you,

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Hi folks, Every month, I sit down with my team to discuss our strategy and brainstorm solutions to the issues that matter most to Arizonans. It’s important to me that your priorities are included in our plans. That’s why I am reaching out to share our June Issues Survey. We’re gearing up for a busy month and the best way for me to hear what’s on your mind is through our survey. Hi team – our democracy works when all voices are heard. It’s that inclusivity that makes us proud to be working hard as Democrats. It’s a pillar of our Party.

In that spirit, it’s important to us here at Team Pfaff that we get as many opinions as possible about our campaign. Not only do we want everyone to be heard, but it also helps us run a better grassroots campaign and hear from our top supporters like you.

So, we’re writing to you because our records indicate you’re an active Democratic supporter – **[would you take our quick survey to share your 2022 priorities with us? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46192709/349216246/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWE1YTc5Mi1jMmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kClK5PwzcVYyg5NWzEkjq-tcaKPB53eAlpLiNBBhyXM=&emci=b9c964ae-a4e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9aa5a792-c2e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)** [TAKE ACTION NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46192716/349216256/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWE1YTc5Mi1jMmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kClK5PwzcVYyg5NWzEkjq-tcaKPB53eAlpLiNBBhyXM=&emci=b9c964ae-a4e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9aa5a792-c2e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)

**[So when it comes to your priorities, would you let us know what you think? We want to hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46192720/349216295/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWE1YTc5Mi1jMmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kClK5PwzcVYyg5NWzEkjq-tcaKPB53eAlpLiNBBhyXM=&emci=b9c964ae-a4e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9aa5a792-c2e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)** [TAKE ACTION NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46192724/349216300/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.06.06_b1-issues-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWE1YTc5Mi1jMmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kClK5PwzcVYyg5NWzEkjq-tcaKPB53eAlpLiNBBhyXM=&emci=b9c964ae-a4e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9aa5a792-c2e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)

name: Vote-By-Mail Update (via DemsOfState.org)
subject: we keep emailing (sorry)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]

Team: We know we emailed you yesterday about urging Congress to pass a National Vote-By-Mail option, but we missed our daily goal to stay on track to launch our ads. We hate to beg, but our Democracy is on the line. Can you chip in anything you can afford now? → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_060622_B1_VBM2_30AC]

We need 47 donations from OH to make up for yesterday and hit our goal today. Rush $5 in the next 3 minutes to help fund our ads to urge Congress to pass a Nationwide Vote-By-Mail option >>

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_060622_B1_VBM2_30AC]

Democratic Secretaries of State across the country fought voter suppression in 2020 and a pandemic to oversee the highest turnout and most secure election in American history!

But Congress must urgently pass critical reforms at the federal level to protect voting rights and shore up democracy.

There is no time for Congress to waste and we must not let continued obstruction stand in the way of ensuring all eligible Americans are able to make their voices heard.

So we’re urging Congress to pass Sen. Klobuchar's bill to allow a Vote-by-Mail option nationwide! If you care about saving our democracy from extreme Republicans, please donate today:

President Biden is absolutely right! Extremist Republicans all over the country have introduced over 400 bills to suppress voters.

Congress MUST pass Sen. Klobuchar’s critical Nationwide Vote-By-Mail legislation to BOOST Voter Turnout before the November Elections.

So we’re racing to raise $5,000 before our mid-month deadline to launch new ads to pressure Congress to pass this bill. If everyone reading this email chips in just $5, we’ll hit our goal in no time!

Rush whatever you can right away: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_060622_B1_VBM2_30AC]

CHIP IN $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june22?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_060622_B1_VBM2_30AC]

Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june22?refcode=EM_FR_060622_B1_VBM2_30AC&amount=5]

Together,

Team DASS
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

Axios explains: | = The NDRC is committed to fighting in Florida, Ohio, and everywhere else for as long as it takes, but we need you with us. Will you make an immediate donation to help us get the fairest possible maps? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We're not giving up, and neither are voters. But time is running out before the November elections – when DeSantis is running for another term as governor. That means we need your help as soon as possible in Florida, Ohio, and across the country, team.= – Garrett = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: three quick things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
Peter, I had to get some updates out to you ahead of our primary tomorrow:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46193639/349218817/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1074-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZjMDQ0Ni1jM2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74VWpT12rE3gqo940b1RM7bidkPENR30SzdenMKZkIo=)
Peter, I had to get some updates out to you ahead of our primary tomorrow:
1.** ** Only 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect our opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). This is our greatest opportunity to flip this seat blue in _DECADES_ and would virtually guarantee that we expand our Democratic majority.
2. Sen. Grassley has already launched _multiple_ attack ads against me – and the Senate GOP campaign has $45 million in the bank to protect incumbents like him and take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell.
3. You have my word, I'm more than ready to take on Grassley, McConnell and the rest of the GOP establishment – _bullies don't scare me._ **But we still haven't closed in on the final $15,000 goal of our primary election. We CANNOT be outraised as voters head to the polls.**
Everything we've been fighting for hinges on winning tomorrow's primary, which is why I'm counting on your help at this critical moment. Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-HIGH disapproval with Iowans, so this is our moment to defeat him and guarantee a Democratic Senate majority. Are you with me?

**[Please, donate $5 or more – whatever you can spare before the election tomorrow – so we can flip this seat blue and expand our majority in the Senate!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46193640/349218818/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1074-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZjMDQ0Ni1jM2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74VWpT12rE3gqo940b1RM7bidkPENR30SzdenMKZkIo=)**
Thank you,

Abby

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlhufgstmseb2bi3ff9i4ddv4t2gc5jsmcgkjn2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj61ob2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thlm6rj7cb4cso6adhieoqecd3hmhon4p1jmhor0s5mmspn6t3iegrjbcpmeko6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phhmapm8pti69j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3cqr1qt9rfu84itmcsbcioeijo0k2pj3kkf7neo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj61ob2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc6h1f2kfo4835fqchvbqbhod3ocjte12rqlt8s0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj61ob2c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdqon4tbqscdai9dd13auhnmapl6vmcf9jokgrmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clj61ob2c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Friend, **Tomorrow is the day we’ve been waiting for: it’s the New Mexico primary election!** This is the moment we’ve been working so hard toward so that we make it onto the general election ballot and defeat MAGA extremist Yvette Herrell in November. For the past nine months, we’ve built a movement for positive change across New Mexico’s 2nd District, truly powered by people like you. A movement for an economy that works for working families, the conservation of our public lands, aggressive action on climate change, reproductive choice, affordable and accessible health care, and our fundamental right to vote in free and fair elections. The only way we can achieve those things is by electing a representative who will fight for them, and _fight for us_ — not a far-right agenda or corporate special interests. For the past year and a half, Rep. Herrell has tried dragging our district, and our country, backward with her right-wing conspiracy theories, election lies, and harmful agenda. When we defeat her in November, I will fight for you in Congress and move NM-02 forward. **But we have to win tomorrow’s primary first, and that means continuing to get out the vote and reaching every last voter until the polls close.** **[This is the last time I’m asking before Election Day: will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford today to help us win the Democratic primary for Congress tomorrow and go on to flip NM-02 together this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46193841/349219964/316559552?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220606tomorrow_gv_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzNmOWI2Yy1jNGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGGCoX4pyC59QRWDT57tPerh9PeDS109aEB_Ie8zt-s=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We can’t blindly throw ourselves behind any old person with an “R” next to their name, Peter.

**America is at a crossroads, and we need the strongest, most dependable conservatives - and our conservative veterans fit the bill.**

We’ve never been afraid of a fight. We put our mission before ourselves every time. _And we know that our freedom isn’t free._

Now, our conservative veterans need you to finish their fight and turn our country around from its disastrous Democrat “leaders.”

[**Pitch in now to send conservative veterans to Congress and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=5f034779a78f43139efd8f203f7f0779&_e=NCpzbYndgFQZCBzq6Y-QIJ_2aifuf_DoGHmjuM5e5dhg7oZZnBjLa8EQ5sXa9AaUIkvuVHKYWgdZ8J1c-54mANBxYHhs5IKHIbnSIlqyQ7JyMYMXfYtu7Nxpp0vFZKMHGYuHo8vEDWFTEs9KGHBIOSHFcyc3Wh7xMK8gTIjEoQQ6_xVnwGSNxMFNe_qh6pLHEiWEBMj5se8m7fh4iisFfRMm4VFBMfq0heX3StAX3dMSJNPZixkQoiWg-dZFyrjxMteTw4BaTivS8XvaKX43XanX4fdlZRc8uRNX-s47IuZJJIFexXMOm4HFYu1xsf4CRzQ_aez-xolPjHVKl0rpKLThz6QN35hkBEbTfTGTjfJpdY6uoF0T6dfgTi6tr8YrfCGNVryV6Io1Rm0rA6pOeuUlWr62X3eFiBI0MhXtKFFHdfvzgoPcJRyiXhSfdJ04)

subject: Trump’s birthday is NEXT WEEK!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
President Trump’s birthday is NEXT WEEK!| | | Peter,
---
**President Trump’s birthday is NEXT WEEK!**

We want to help make his day _extra special_ , so we’re putting together a birthday card from the top patriots from across the country - and we want YOU to be a part of it!

Fellow American, Global Elites are gathered just days ago in a small town in Switzerland to plan to force their "Great Reset" agenda on the rest of the world. _It sounds like a B-list movie -- but it is horrifyingly real._ **The World Economic Forum (WEF) has declared war on Western values with their "Great Reset" agenda ... and they brought together Elites for their annual summit to discuss their radical scheme LAST WEEK.** Make no mistake, Fellow American: what the WEF is labeling as "Western values" are, in reality, Judeo-Christian values -- and the biblical values that MILLIONS of Americans cherish and live their lives by. [**I must urgently reach as many Americans of faith as possible with the TRUTH about the WEF's Great Reset ... which is why I'm giving away my new book -- "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset" -- for a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar.**](http://trk.readactnews.)

It speaks volumes to me that many of the people rising up against the Great Reset are Americans of faith. You and I are able to see right through the WEF's sinister plans, because we have the light of Scripture, and because we know better than to blindly follow the princes of the world with all of their empty promises.

Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](http://trk.readactnews._NNGYVzw)

I've dedicated my life and my work to inspiring young people to love America again through Turning Point USA _and_ to activating millions of Americans of faith to restore America through Turning Point USA Faith. Now I've written my new book, "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset," to help patriots like YOU, Fellow American, stand up to the dangerous Great Reset agenda -- and I want to send it to you today for a gift of any amount, even just a dollar. name: Melissa King
subject: Tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
John has been prepping for weeks, and I know he can’t wait to share his vision on that debate stage.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46194367/349222135/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220606&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4a917ac5-c6e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTkxN2FjNS1jNmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lvDuMs3mOeb1M62UOimhQ_3z2dFpImcqKksUEG97epQ=) | Peter, Melissa King here, John’s wife. I wanted to let you know about two things happening tonight:
1. We reach our final 24-hour countdown before tomorrow’s public fundraising deadline.
2. John’s very FIRST televised debate starts at 7PM EST.

John’s team has been prepping him for weeks, and I am excited to see him up on that stage. **However, I know that tomorrow night’s public fundraising deadline has John worried.** It’s our campaign’s biggest public deadline to-date, which means how much we’ve raised since January will be available for everyone to see.
