body:
| Since November 3, 2020, Adam has done what he's always done — stood up for our democracy and led the way in pushing for a progressive agenda in Congress.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=308%2E5257348%2EFHLWXV)
Derek,
Adam's first election in 19 months is just hours away. Since November 3, 2020, Adam has done what he's always done — stood up for our democracy and led the way in pushing for a progressive agenda in Congress.
From helping Democrats secure the Georgia runoff victories, to taking action to hold insurrectionists and Trump accountable after they attacked our nation’s Capitol.
Through the COVID-19 pandemic, working with President Biden and other Democratic leaders to pass the _American Rescue Plan_ and get shots in arms and checks in hand.
To now, prioritizing issues that are top of mind for voters: Fighting inflation and rising gas prices, protecting abortion access, and taking on the NRA and the gun lobby while pushing for an end to the Senate filibuster that remains in the way of progress.
Time after time, Adam has been there for us like he always has. **[Today, we're asking you to be there for him one final time before tomorrow's election. Can you pitch in?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=308%2E5257348%2EFHLWXV)**

name: Cicely Davis
subject: She says it herself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
There's no two ways about it, Peter. [**We need to stop Ilhan Omar.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531389:JIpf7XohN:m:1:3317145305:3C520A92CAC09FF0809CEA5E45C1221A:r)

Omar is openly anti-Semitic, she coerced rioters to burn down our communities, she wants to abolish the police, and then cries "victim" anytime someone calls her out for fanning the flames of hatred.

**_Don't believe what I'm saying? Then listen to what she has to say yourself:_**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531389:JIpf7XohN:m:1:3317145305:3C520A92CAC09FF0809CEA5E45C1221A:r)
[** HELP STOP ILHAN OMAR **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531389:JIpf7XohN:m:1:3317145305:3C520A92CAC09FF0809CEA5E45C1221A:r)
We must take a stand against Ilhan Omar's open acts of incitement that torched businesses, homes, and the futures of so many people.

**Her actions threatened lives, endangered communities, and put our nation on a collision course for civil and racial unrest that has yet to heal.**

We must do better, and that starts by kicking Ilhan Omar out of Congress. [**Will you stand with me to help make that happen?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531389:JIpf7XohN:m:1:3317145305:3C520A92CAC09FF0809CEA5E45C1221A:r)

[**Let me know if I have your support as soon as you can, please.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531389:JIpf7XohN:m:1:3317145305:3C520A92CAC09FF0809CEA5E45C1221A:r)

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531389:JIpf7XohN:m:1:3317145305:3C520A92CAC09FF0809CEA5E45C1221A:r)
**Cicely Davis for Congress**

[** HELP STOP ILHAN OMAR **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531389:JIpf7XohN:m:1:3317145305:3C520A92CAC09FF0809CEA5E45C1221A:r)

Then listen to what she has to say yourself: We must take a stand against Ilhan Omar's open acts of incitement that torched businesses, homes, and the futures of so many people. Her actions threatened lives, endangered communities, and put our nation on a collision course for civil and racial unrest that has yet to heal. We must do better, and that starts by kicking Ilhan Omar out of Congress. Thank you, Cicely Davis for Congress | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but {{unsubscribeUrl}}. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. name: Mo Brooks
subject: something exciting in Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
Conservatives are on-track to get a NEW, proven conservative U.S. Senator from Alabama!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqi2ba6lkp1jia8b7ih7q9g43961h2fa1me7eang_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uoqbctpic1hm4db0smo6dcbgm8rbctb6cdpm9dbicaor8o9ic9h36d1h6hqm6c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmsqr8dti61j39oljcgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c5im2o32cpim49fg)
| | | Friend, For once, you are receiving a campaign email with GOOD news! Let me cut to the chase... **Conservatives are on-track to get a NEW, proven conservative U.S. Senator from Alabama! ** **We can help build our “Red Wall” in the Senate of true conservatives like Sen. Ted Cruz and Sen. Rand Paul **(both of whom endorsed me, by the way), as long as we win our primary. __Our campaign has got the momentum — but we need your help to get across the finish line.__
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1evd9fe10a2258p16hmd0j08rvtlscpngvmure0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
Let me explain why it’s so critical for me to get your help NOW. I’ve just clinched my spot in the run-off election for the Republican nomination to United States Senate, and even then, it was a close shave — because**Mitch McConnell and his buddies in the Swamp poured**** $17 million****of their beltway bucks to fight my nomination.****
**
**The joke’s on Mitch,patriot, because I am STILL STANDING. ** And now that Alabama conservatives are uniting behind me in the final showdown against his handpicked candidate...****_it’s about to get REALLY ugly._
**All I need to do is keep fighting these next few weeks until our run-off election on June 21**. [**But I can’t do it without the support of grassroots conservatives like you****.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpveppjhn8ns6pbek82r3oq4t17d8ov544pvu2l8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
[**STAND WITH PROVEN CONSERVATIVE MO BROOKS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl4maq37q58pmk4ejd89d4agkntt515j0q0mi6t8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
**Friend, there’s a reason Mitch McConnell and the Swamp hate me: I’m a proven conservative with a track record of doing**** _exactly_****what I say I’m going to do – and I have the accolades to back it up:**
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* A+ rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 93% rating from the NRA
* A+ rating from Gun Owners of America
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Congressman Jim Jordan
* House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry
* Dr. Kelli Ward
* Mark Levin

And endorsements from organizations fighting for conservative principles:
* Alabama Republican Assembly
* Eagle Forum
* FreedomWorks for America
* Alabama Citizens for Life
* National Rifle Association
* Gun Owners of America
* National Association for Gun Rights
* Senate Conservatives Fund
* Americans for Legal Immigration PAC

---
[**JOIN THEM: SUPPORT MO BROOKS **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7p40ulhs29kq8c7vm9pe7npkfjhj345stqtnauo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
I’ve fought for the America First agenda in the House of Representatives, but I know there’s more work to be done... this time in the Senate. And I know I’m the man for the job.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znem19mpeuvmuljl6ts6bavdvv5ji4hks820qc8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
The countdown is on until the runoff election in a few weeks. We need _every grassroots conservative_ __ to chip in and help us counter Mitch McConnell and the Swamp’s attacks. [**_Can I count on your support? >>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs0jsfrvq1bgilhiqm4f9sl3hr1mqeepnve7681o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znu9kk6btgg1c849edgrt1ospddamqusfe736bho_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z77l1u1up5n29ega0eql5efghtncdg73l3uj4kp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdpo1vi0q4glf4ekjt490l2o7c20ln9njn0hut50_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd37o9d3k0ijvdmo3be9cpmhk5bgppeprgim2cm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgr2ghkfvbmibjmmjdq94vkrq9da9gmv8dtle408_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)
---
Thank you for your help,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8i100mrv2ehfmcm9ed8vaocvsip6q9p9dqrelqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1clgm0oj6clh2bs)

Mo Brooks

subject: You're Invited! Two special events this week.

body:
Two special events this week. I'd love to see you there. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/49816e70e1eb/re-thank-you-15697519?e=d32193ab14)
---
| | | [ ](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=221f89a8ad&e=d32193ab14 "https://keithswank.com/index.html")
---
---
---
| | | **[](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=bec3d843b3&e=d32193ab14)**
**We still have some room left for the Jun 11th special private event. It will be held at special a private residence, so space is limited. I'm excited to be joined by Joe Kent, candidate for the neighboring 3rd Congressional District. Address available after RSVP.

[CLICK HERE to RSVP on the official Winred event page to today for the June 11th private event in Olympia with Keith Swank and Joe Kent; candidates for U.S. Congress officially endorsed by the Thurston County Republican Party.](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=48de42fa48&e=d32193ab14)** **Special June 7th event in Yelm. Join us for a Townhall and Fundraiser.**

**In Freedom,**
**Keith R. Swank
Candidate for U.S. Congress | Police Captain | U.S. Army Infantry Veteran **
#

---
| [DONATE WITH ANEDOT](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=3fc547ba7f&e=d32193ab14 "Anedot Donate Link")
---
| [DONATE WITH WINRED](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=b7a3385938&e=d32193ab14 "Winred Donate Link")
---
| | **ABOUT: Keith Swank is a U.S. Army veteran and Seattle Police Captain sought after for his expertise as an instructor in crisis intervention and de-escalation. He served as Night Duty Commander and Commander of the Metro Special Response Section (S.W.A.T. Team, Harbor Patrol, Canine Unit and Arson/Bomb Squad). In the U.S. Army he served in a long range reconnaissance unit and graduated from Ranger School, Airborne School, High Altitude Low Opening (HALO) and Infantry Training. Swank is a graduate of the University of Washington where he attained a degree in psychology. He is endorsed by the Pierce County and Thurston County Republican Party.**
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=4fdc6fddcb&e=d32193ab14)

name: Team Goldman
subject: A campaign for the people, by the people, starts with hearing from you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
body:
Peter,

Rising levels of gun violence terrorize our communities, and Republicans refuse to act to protect them. Far-right lawmakers are seeking to undermine our right to vote and democratic elections to keep their party in power. Ultra-conservatives are poised to roll back reproductive rights and prevent women from making their own medical decisions.

And that’s just the tip of the iceberg.

Peter, as we launch this campaign, it’s important to all of us — especially Dan — to hear directly from you about what issues you’re thinking about most. After all, a campaign by and for the people starts with listening to folks like you.

Do you have a minute or two to take our Campaign Launch Priorities Survey right away? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K1-GYSzAK0mE1q4KRK-WZw2]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K1-GYSzAK0mE1q4KRK-WZw2]

Over and over, Republican lawmakers have prevented us from enacting meaningful solutions to some of the most important issues facing our state and our country. It’s important to recognize that they will continue acting in bad faith. We know that change only happens when we speak out and demand it, and use creative strategies to reach our goals.

That is exactly what Dan did leading the impeachment investigation of Donald Trump and that is exactly the kind of leader he will be to stand up to Republicans and deliver for New Yorkers.

That’s why we put together this quick survey to check in about your top legislative priorities at the start of this campaign. Please, take a moment to fill out our quick survey to let us know what’s important to you. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K1-GYSzAK0mE1q4KRK-WZw2]

I will always believe that our democracy is worth fighting for.

Thank you for sharing your input,

Team Goldman

Dan Goldman is running for Congress to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both.

Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
Dan Goldman for NY
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008

body:
American Defense News Whatever Means Necessary...

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Weak Missouri RINOs Come Out of Hiding to Disrespect President Trump and the MAGA Movement
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Weak Missouri RINOs Come Out of Hiding to Disrespect President Trump and the MAGA Movement
---
| St. Louis, MO - Missouri RINOs colluded with far-left media outlet [NBC News in a new report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eSU1C6Gou6lRrVA1FyKHlNr04h9ej_xbAto5Cn6qz2QPvQjCCaBUD2vCxyInSK-q2HwFi3PNzifNaS5vuwbhEFUxtwfg8QH9CX_03M3lYUm0E7ZVqMs3XvX-9Zsh8eTydZDZ6EMgaarXj4cCYxtlvHvGVslrToUNGXsrBZRrm1FDSgBIrVqNObocXUrPytHRwY98xXmm0tn0f6d-k6o4RhIwvQvC70zodVSxf-eQ9C73B2SsSmLKVA==&c=CK3ydc2yEb7SljL97ytczFGtCOiv4zSJS_O3Jy7OMBMsozB_ElODfg==&ch=c0i64k9ePKqwND_EF_bJxk7_06KPlRqWAPKCahIeWPv6lGA2YF3fjg==) that mischaracterizes the importance of President Trump's powerful endorsement and the enormous influence he has on America First candidates like Governor Eric Greitens. Unfortunately, RINOs like Elijah Haahr, former speaker of Missouri's state House, has shown his contempt for President Trump and his closest allies. From the NBC News report: "In some cases -- like Missouri's GOP Senate primary -- Trump is threatening to unnecessarily put into play what could be a solidly red contest, said Elijah Haahr, a Republican former speaker of Missouri's state House. "Haahr said Republicans on the ground fear that Trump is close to backing Eric Greitens, who has attracted the endorsement of such Trump allies as Kimberly Guilfoyle, who's engaged to Trump's eldest son, Donald Trump Jr., and served as a top fundraising official for Trump's re-election bid." The chair of the Greene County Republican Central Committee in Missouri also gave an incorrect assessment of President Trump, saying: "There's no doubt Trump's endorsement would make a difference in competitive primary races... but it's time to move on." Make no mistake, these feckless RINOs know nothing about the America First movement and should stand with the leader of the Republican Party--President Trump--instead of working against him. When asked for comment by NBC News, Governor Greitens explained the enormous positive influence President Trump continues to have on the party: "President Trump's endorsement is the single, most powerful asset in the history of politics. These establishment RINOs should stop trying to downplay President Trump's immense influence and, instead, work with him to advance the America First agenda. As the only MAGA candidate in this race, I will defeat the RINO establishment along with their Democrats enablers who continue to abandon the people of Missouri." ####
---

body:
| | | |
---
| | | Hello,

Tomorrow, we Republicans vote for who we estimate to be the best candidate to serve as our executive here in South Dakota.

My platform has been CLEAR and DETAILED. Our state is suffering from neglect, and I have a plan to set it right.

We need to cut back our bloated taxes to make life livable again for home owners and land owners, as well as truly crack down on rising crime. Our crumbling education system is in dire need of attention as the achievement levels of our next generation plummet.

We cannot continue as we have been. South Dakota MUST change course.

**We must put South Dakota First.**

Do you agree? Then _**VOTE FOR STEVE HAUGAARD**_ in the Primary and make a statement that you are South Dakota first and care about the future of our state!

See you around the polls,
---
|
\- Steve Haugaard

_Republican Candidate for Governor _

With 21 local chapters all across the state, the caucus represents Florida’s lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and queer community to the Florida Democratic Party.

From Miami to Jacksonville to Pensacola, the Florida LGBTQ+ Democratic Cause is “a voice that seeks to instill awareness of the freedoms of a democratic society, educate future leaders, support the community at large, and maintain an ongoing rapport and increasing viability with political entities.”

**They’re committed to defending our democratic values and fighting for LGBTQ+ rights, and we’re committed to standing with them.**

[**_So friend, we hope you’ll join us by signing up for a membership with the Caucus today:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46195082/349224651/-380567933?refcode=20220606_en_em_ldc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjMzNjg1Ny1jYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gK8UBvvrWBll_-a8AubcM5oq7brwmpFNHeF89Mugx7o=&emci=21a601b2-c3e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=86336857-cae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8807089)

name: Jasmine Beach-Ferrara
subject: Pride Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46181846/349176547/27102520?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220606_FR_PrideMonth_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNhYzk2Zi1hOWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FpnaPWS744PHsL6bMvDcJtXl4W_OxbIfa5SmK_rVbI=) It’s officially Pride Month, Peter. And this year, it’s hard to overstate how significant this is for our community. LGBTQ+ youth - especially transgender youth - have been under relentless political attacks across the country, including here in NC, for yet another legislative season. Showing up fully for Pride Month is one of the many ways we can meet the moment and send a clear message that LGBTQ+ equality is up for neither debate nor compromise. We need to make sure youth are hearing the message that they are loved and supported and that we will never stop fighting for them. This is a time of celebration, of love, and also of mobilization as we prepare for November elections, from school boards to state and federal elections. **I’m proud to be gay and to be raising a family with my wife Meghann, and not a day goes by when we don’t think about what it means to be a LGBTQ+ family in the South.** Here in North Carolina, Republicans in the state legislature - including my opponent Chuck Edwards - passed a cruel “Don’t Say Gay” law that Governor Cooper plans to veto. This bill bans content on LGBTQ+ issues for K-3 students, and mandates that school staff out LGBTQ+ youth to their parents and legal guardians. Governor Cooper plans to veto this bill, but the fact that elected officials like Chuck Edwards are willing to exploit these issues as a political stunt tells us everything we need to know about what’s at stake in this moment. Your rights should never depend on your zip code. And you should never be a political target because of who you are. If we’re going to make sure our rights are protected across the country, we need federal action. And to do that, we must defend and expand our Democratic House majority. That’s why I’m running for Congress in the first place – to pave a new path forward for Western North Carolina where equality and justice endure. Where LGBTQ+ youth are loved and supported at home and at school. Where LGBTQ+ workers cannot be fired for who they love. Where LGBTQ+ renters cannot be denied housing for who they are. **The LGBTQ+ community – especially our youth – deserve to feel safe and to be fully equal under the law always, and I won’t rest until I’ve done everything I can to make sure they are.** [**If you’re with me, will you chip in $5 or more today to make me the first openly LGBTQ+ Congressperson from the South?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46181848/349176550/-1605508806?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220606_FR_PrideMonth_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNhYzk2Zi1hOWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FpnaPWS744PHsL6bMvDcJtXl4W_OxbIfa5SmK_rVbI=) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | [Donate $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46181850/349176553/-1605508806?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220606_FR_PrideMonth_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTNhYzk2Zi1hOWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FpnaPWS744PHsL6bMvDcJtXl4W_OxbIfa5SmK_rVbI=)

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Thank you for your continued support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
I'm grateful to have you on my team
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46195673/349227475/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_OT_3MO_20220606_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U0OGZmMy1jYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJXwru6Tyahv52kduP-tk0X2G4FOQ8_3LbtGzrBBYvQ=&emci=af3419e4-bee5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=77e48ff3-cae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Thank you so much for all of your support during the month of May!

Because of you, we achieved our end-of-month fundraising goal – the last major deadline until this coming week’s primaries.

I am grateful to have you by my side as I continue to fight for you and the values of our home in California’s new 19th Congressional District in this especially critical time.

As you know, the primary election is only five days away, making every single dollar count in this final stretch.

Your contributions allow my team and I to spend more time in the district, reaching new constituents and earning their support.

With redistricting and the significant number of new voters in the new 19th district, this will certainly be one of my toughest races yet.

So thank you, Peter, for your support in helping me increase voter turnout in the new 19th.

Your contributions are not only needed, they will always be appreciated.

With gratitude,

clean_body: I'm grateful to have you on my team | Peter, Thank you so much for all of your support during the month of May! Because of you, we achieved our end-of-month fundraising goal – the last major deadline until this coming week’s primaries. I am grateful to have you by my side as I continue to fight for you and the values of our home in California’s new 19th Congressional District in this especially critical time. As you know, the primary election is only five days away, making every single dollar count in this final stretch. Your contributions allow my team and I to spend more time in the district, reaching new constituents and earning their support. With redistricting and the significant number of new voters in the new 19th district, this will certainly be one of my toughest races yet. So thank you, Peter, for your support in helping me increase voter turnout in the new 19th. Your contributions are not only needed, they will always be appreciated. With gratitude, Jimmy Panetta = If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

body:
*We need STRONG men this Sunday in Palm Beach County*

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ac764f5522a2/want-to-build-muscle-and-help-your-country?e=77bc5297c6)

** SIGNS SIGNS SIGNS!
------------------------------------------------------------

If you are strong and able to use an electric digger, we need your help. This Sunday we need strong volunteers to help put up the rest of our large Campaign signs in PALM BEACH COUNTY from 9am - 3pm (meal and gas stipend will be provided). If you can help -- Please reply to this email.

We will soon need help in Martin and St. Lucie County as well -- so keep an eye out!

We have less than THREE months to the election. We need ALL hands on deck. NOW is the time to help and to act. Please join our social media and please share the message.

It is up to WE THE PEOPLE to put an end to the tyranny. WE are responsible to make this change and it is not going to happen without each of us doing our part. THANK YOU to each of you who get up everyday and fight the good fight!! We are on the right side of history.

Stay Free,

The Melissa Martz Campaign

Friend,
Tomorrow is primary day in the Magnolia State.
Shuwaski is the presumptive Democratic nominee, and we’re committed to putting up a fight whichever MAGA Republican wins tomorrow.
A couple of months ago, Mississippi Today wrote that November’s congressional elections were going “to be snoozers.” And that no federal seat is “naturally competitive.”
Team Shuwaski has proven the pundits wrong. We’ve raised over $50,000, more than any Democratic candidate in the history of the 3rd Congressional. We’ve mobilized thousands of voters across the district. And Congressman Guest is scared of us, going up on TV and radio.
It’s all thanks to the generosity of everyday supporters like you. Folks who know we vote along our shared values of education, community investment, equity, and sustainable growth to move Mississippi forward.
Can you help our campaign keep up the momentum heading into tomorrow? Donate $15 right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_tomorrow_15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express,
your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $15 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_tomorrow_15]
This campaign isn’t the first time that Shuwaski has been underestimated. Yet Shuwaski recognizes that living out our values sometimes means taking chances.
He took a chance when at 17, he joined the National Guard. He jumped at opportunities to work on Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaigns. He took a chance when he decided to build a career in public service. And when he chose to return to Mississippi to raise his family.
Shuwaski would tell you that those chances have all paid off in spades.
We don’t snooze through elections here in Mississippi. We take leaps where others would not cross the path because we believe in a better, brighter, more equitable world. Take that leap with us and chip in $50,25,15, or $5 towards getting Shuwaski closer to Washington D.C. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_tomorrow_15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express,
your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_tomorrow_50] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_tomorrow_25] DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_tomorrow_15] DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_tomorrow_5]
Thanks so much!
Team Young
P.S. Can’t donate but still want to be involved? Check out our website and social media pages.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Attorney=20General=20Austin=20Knudsen?=
subject: Is the price of gas too low?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION
body:
Joe Biden must think so. | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=f626893061&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| | Friend,

I have a question for Joe Biden \- _how high must the price of gas become before you support American Energy?_

**_A record-breaking average of $4.89 is not high enough_ , as his administration continues to pursue an extreme left-wing agenda that foots American families with skyrocketing prices at the pump.**

Biden's decision to "review" a [critical permit for oil and gas projects](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=e1f2f1661a&e=edf8a4d16d) is another blow to domestic energy production, coming just weeks after his administration _[cancelled every remaining offshore oil and gas lease.](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=f5c0008da7&e=edf8a4d16d)_

As hard-working Americans struggle, Joe Biden has chosen to appease far-left activists and coastal elites. His war on American Energy - declared on Day One of his administration - is costing all of us, and **it's time for Republicans to fight back.**

Last week, [I led the charge along with 20 Republican Attorneys General to reverse Biden's review of the NWP 12 permit.](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=1a60849080&e=edf8a4d16d) Biden's America Last, anti-energy agenda is bankrupting working families, and his out-of-touch, out-of-control administration must be held accountable.

[**Friend, are you able to chip in $10 or any amount to help Republican Attorneys General restore an America First energy agenda**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=7bb97b6ffa&e=edf8a4d16d)**?**

---
| [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=1df32567e2&e=edf8a4d16d "CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
| Thank you for your continued support.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Austin Knudsen
Montana Attorney General

---
|

---
| | PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION

name: Fred Guttenberg Update
subject: Gun safety reform could come down to Florida's Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Marco Rubio repeatedly puts the gun lobby's agenda over the safety of our communities...
| | |
---
Friend: **If Val Demings flips Florida blue, our gun safety majority in the Senate will have enough votes to pass lifesaving, commonsense gun reform.**
**That's why gun safety activist Fred Guttenberg is ALL IN on this critical Senate race:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46195857/349228431/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTk3NWZhNC1jYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxUkbsVDqkRR6X2IM_X5KkIIY71tCFp0LTBGf2m59FA=)
After the Parkland massacre, Marco Rubio refused to work with Parkland survivors and activists like Fred to end our country's gun violence epidemic and save lives. Marco Rubio repeatedly puts the gun lobby's agenda over the safety of our communities.
But Val Demings has been a tireless advocate for lifesaving gun reform throughout her time in Congress – helping to pass universal background checks and more in the House. We can count on Chief Demings to continue her work to end gun violence in the Senate.
Here's the problem: With Florida's last Senate race decided by just 0.12% of the vote and polls showing Val Demings within the margin of error, this race will come down to resources. **And** **Marco Rubio is already sitting on a campaign war chest built by the gun lobby and far-right megadonors.**
**Friend, if Val Demings is going to defeat Rubio, expand the gun safety majority in the Senate and pass lifesaving gun reform, she needs your immediate grassroots donation – every dollar you can spare before tonight’s midnight deadline:**

Hi team! I have three quick campaign updates for you:
1. Yesterday, **the _Baltimore Sun_ published results from their independent poll showing our campaign's surging momentum.** **Our campaign is in a close second place right on the heels of the frontrunner, and with 6 weeks to go and still over 30% of voters undecided**, we have a clear path to victory and a real opportunity to get this done.

2. **Tonight, Wes will take the stage in the gubernatorial Democratic candidates debate** and share our vision for creating a Maryland where we leave no one behind.

3. **Tomorrow at 11:59 pm we face our next campaign finance filing deadline** , after which our fundraising numbers will go public for everyone (including our opponents and the pundits) to see. _It’s one of our last major deadlines before the July 19 primary!_

clean_body: | = Hi team! I have three quick campaign updates for you: 1. Yesterday, the Baltimore Sun published results from their independent poll showing our campaign's surging momentum. Our campaign is in a close second place right on the heels of the frontrunner, and with 6 weeks to go and still over 30% of voters undecided, we have a clear path to victory and a real opportunity to get this done. 2. Tonight, Wes will take the stage in the gubernatorial Democratic candidates debate and share our vision for creating a Maryland where we leave no one behind. 3. Tomorrow at 11:59 pm we face our next campaign finance filing deadline , after which our fundraising numbers will go public for everyone (including our opponents and the pundits) to see. It’s one of our last major deadlines before the July 19 primary! Wes is busy preparing for the debate today, so I wanted to reach out and ask if you can help make sure we reach our fundraising goal before tomorrow at midnight. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do, and be sure to catch the debate tonight at 7:00 pm on Maryland Public Television or WBAL-TV 11. I hope you join me in watching and cheering Wes on! — Aruna | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Charlie Crist
subject: What is going on in Florida right now??
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196237/349230367/452096236?amount=25&refcode=20220606_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThkODdjMS1jZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2tJeJCynSm-bX1dD2hMKnehLj80ReOoAh1j0G8yplkA=)
---
Friend, what is going on in Florida?

Now that the state of Florida has started MATCHING contributions up to $250, I thought people would be fired up to _**double**_ their contribution in the fight against billionaire-backed governor DeSantis.

I mean, he’s made a career out of putting politics over people. And if he wins in Florida in 2022, he’ll be primed for the Republican nomination for president in 2024.

He represents the _**worst**_ of Florida politics, and it’s going to take a huge grassroots movement to take him down. _**But right now, our fundraising is stalling and it seems like nobody even cares that this race could come down to less than one percentage point!**_

What is going on here?

**_[We need to step it up, team. Right now, I’m asking you to take full advantage of Florida’s matching program by chipping in. With your help, we can beat Ron DeSantis and bring his backwards agenda to an end.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196238/349230368/452096236?amount=25&refcode=20220606_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThkODdjMS1jZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2tJeJCynSm-bX1dD2hMKnehLj80ReOoAh1j0G8yplkA=)_**

name: Hung Cao
subject: Peter, will you help a veteran out? 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

My name is Hung Cao.

I'm a proud conservative, retired Special Operations Navy Captain, Vietnamese Immigrant, and homeschooling parent of 5 running for Congress in Virginia's 10th District, and _**[today I am asking for your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531169:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "today I am asking
for your support.")**_
_** STAND WITH HUNG CAO: **_
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531169:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "CHIP IN NOW")
---

Shortly before the fall of Saigon, my family immigrated to the US to escape the realms of communism sweeping East Asia. Inspired by the opportunities given to my family in this great nation, _**I decided to dedicate my life to serving this country.**_

I was accepted into the Naval Academy and from there I began my 25 years of service deploying to Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.

It wasn't until the fall of Kabul, much like the Fall of Saigon, that I became motivated to serve my country in Congress.

The Democrats' failed withdrawal from Afghanistan symbolized everything wrong with their policies and I'm determined to go to Washington to fix them. _**[Will you chip in anything you can spare to send me to Congress and help me fix the Democrats' corruption?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531169:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "Will you chip in
anything you can spare to send me to Congress and help me fix the Democrats’ corruption?")**_

---
| | | [CHIP IN $35](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531170:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "CHIP IN $35")
---
| | | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531171:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "CHIP IN $50")
---
| | | [CHIP IN $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531172:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "CHIP IN $75")
---
| | | [CHIP IN $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531173:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "CHIP IN $100")
---
| | | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531169:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT NOW")
---

Virginians of the 10th District deserve a representative who will fight for the values we hold so dear: _life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness_.

My military training has prepared me for all the evil attacks the Corrupt Democrats will throw at me, but I can't do it alone. _**[I need every single patriot reading this to chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to help me win my race and send me to Congress to continue fighting for American values>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531169:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "I need every single patriot reading this to chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to help me win my
race and send me to Congress to continue fighting for American values >>>")**_
_** STAND WITH HUNG CAO: **_
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531169:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "CHIP IN NOW")
---
Thank you,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531169:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r)
---

Hung Cao
---

Hung Cao is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy.
---

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531174:6GPScXoNN:m:1:3253819041:9AFE844396291B1631969CCA76382F31:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**

subject: Republicans want to ban books on LGBTQ topics. Sign now to fight back >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Stand with librarians against GOP efforts to ban LGBTQ books >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59d65279-b895-4735-90f0-e282407ae80c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8150c03f-104f-4b9c-ad19-f2341ee3eeb9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republicans are waging war on our education system and LGBTQ+ students by pressuring school districts to ban books that discuss LGBTQ+ topics. They’re trying to whitewash and even erase key parts of history and keep kids from learning about important issues! These efforts to censor and ban these materials will have widespread consequences. Librarians and educators everywhere are rightfully taking a stand against these puritanical book bans, but they’re being attacked for their courage. This is a crisis for our education system, and we need to fight back. Librarians need to know we have their backs in the face of Republican efforts to ban LGBTQ books. In honor of LGBTQ Pride Month, [add your name now to stand with librarians and support them for fighting back against the GOP!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0d5bf2f-54c1-4b9b-acbf-c695842d39cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1756e9a2-ce2c-40dd-9e2a-4b58835c906f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |

My brand new book, _**Here 's the Dea**_ _**l**_ , is set to hit the shelves any day now,_and I want YOU to have it before anyone else._

I know once the public gets access to my book, it WILL sell out. So, what are you waiting for? Confirm your address information and we'll send you a SIGNED copy of my brand new book,_**Here 's the Deal.**_

name: Team Tina
subject: Betsy Johnson is on the wrong side of this issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196713/349232455/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjA2ZTBkMy1kMGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQr1PNSJ4qm1dXt99DH7lx4XbLGOUPhmZC953vWzEtI=&emci=c45df9fb-b2e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=a206e0d3-d0e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15353729)
---
Peter,

This year has already seen too much tragedy in our country. A little over a week ago, **21 lives were lost in Uvalde, Texas, 19 of whom were children. Before that, a massacre in Buffalo, New York.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196714/349232456/1485193592?refcode=em22_220606_johnson&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjA2ZTBkMy1kMGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQr1PNSJ4qm1dXt99DH7lx4XbLGOUPhmZC953vWzEtI=)
Just a few weeks ago, at an appearance at TEDxPortland, Senator Betsy Johnson said she is sure that "the type of gun doesn't dictate lethality," despite the lived experience of the grieving families from these massacres who say otherwise.

Betsy is on the wrong side of this issue – and she has been for years. Her track record reflects an extreme stance against common-sense gun violence prevention. In her two-decade career in the Oregon Legislature, Betsy consistently voted against bills to address gun safety. For example, in 2017, she voted against a bipartisan bill aimed at helping families keep guns away from individuals who might hurt themselves or others, and in 2018, when she opposed a bill to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers.

[**There is a lot at stake in November – from protecting reproductive rights to ending gun violence to addressing climate change – and Tina is the only leader who has shown that she will step up to fight the good fight. clean_body: | Peter, This year has already seen too much tragedy in our country. A little over a week ago, 21 lives were lost in Uvalde, Texas, 19 of whom were children. Before that, a massacre in Buffalo, New York. = Just a few weeks ago, at an appearance at TEDxPortland, Senator Betsy Johnson said she is sure that "the type of gun doesn't dictate lethality," despite the lived experience of the grieving families from these massacres who say otherwise. Betsy is on the wrong side of this issue – and she has been for years. Her track record reflects an extreme stance against common-sense gun violence prevention. In her two-decade career in the Oregon Legislature, Betsy consistently voted against bills to address gun safety. For example, in 2017, she voted against a bipartisan bill aimed at helping families keep guns away from individuals who might hurt themselves or others, and in 2018, when she opposed a bill to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This November, there is a clear choice when it comes to gun violence prevention and working to make sure what happened in Uvalde and Buffalo never happens again. That choice is voting Tina for Governor. Oregon deserves a leader in the governor's office who believes in common-sense gun safety measures and who will stand up and fight for safer communities free of gun violence. No family deserves to bury their young child because of gun violence. Our schools, churches, grocery stores, and movie theaters should be places where people feel safe. As House Speaker, Tina made sure that Oregon passed legislation to keep guns from domestic abusers and stalkers, strengthened background checks for gun purchases, and required guns to be stored safely. As Governor, Tina will work to ban ghost guns, prevent teenagers from purchasing assault weapons, and require completed background checks anytime someone buys a gun. We need to step up and pass comprehensive gun safety legislation – because that's how we fight this epidemic. Tina, unlike Betsy Johnson, is determined to make sure things get done to make sure what happened in Uvalde never happens in one of our communities in Oregon. = **= Thank you! ## LA is changing...
Gas prices, supply chain breakdown, homelessness are my top priorities - I am running against FIVE Democrats who are think things are fine the way they are. In CA the two candidates with the most votes, move on to the General Election in November. A vote for me will keep this election honest - giving everyone in District 37 a real choice in the General Election. Voting in the primary election protects our democracy, keeping the election fair making sure everyone's voice is heard!

I will stand between you and the mistakes of Washington, DC. As an [Officer in the Navy](https://BaltazarFedalizo.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9fbdabe1ee7fdaa608a3044e&id=023d09fa7c&e=2d78ede485) and [serial entrepreneur](https://BaltazarFedalizo.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9fbdabe1ee7fdaa608a3044e&id=5fa0777a79&e=2d78ede485) I live by two statements; _Leadership is submission to duty. Distinction without difference is vanity. _I will not let you down.

Remember Election day is Tomorrow, Tuesday June 7th \- if you need help with voting, have questions [click here](https://BaltazarFedalizo.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9fbdabe1ee7fdaa608a3044e&id=b5d248606d&e=2d78ede485).

Very Respectfully,
**Baltazar Fedalizo**

body:
| | | Peter, _If you could pick one Senator to have two of in the Senate, who would you pick?_ Ted Cruz? Rand Paul? Or would you want another Mitch McConnell?
I'm here to tell you: **If you don't act now,****you WILL get another Mitch McConnell in the Senate********this year.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0f6f5fc17bea47c5a46ac507ddb6c698&_e=84Ovrv3SvMd4Sq2TyJsI4h6-bYQ09_yvqtCOfWAg_4bsIEkZKCFvSFdqxXfDky91XQrlkZ5WpnMbVgUboxVjuHH3eYbFhBHxhLDuiJJWMxnj9NaSkSoZwxmVQZraXtUS02HOruDXPYFUnyOkAed3mP3K1QmSw8aVyLMt3u31m2puwGT4MtxqlV0rRP-hR2Nzl20aKECveK624JxMQ7abSvtL0-7GZAG09GFW7DkAXcmj3cMeojnQpcIXzTCRjjtjJum7NfREh-1D91uHhaE-5Xago5bLz7ZbWBzo9rFLXlRMOdfjzfHXs-bcuzQT-u5wv7rlyUbqazv6bZ_jeD6iBedGL8FZiadqCbqoXNK-qErKFcqAtFp85RkceUvdCyTKH-kXkfBNtbeMRTZoDIl_kTyhLWarSAa5a7WKRafeobA%3D)
---
Now, I'm not saying this as a hypothetical. **This is a real choice we are making RIGHT NOW in Alabama in the Republican primary runoff.** Mitch McConnell has a hand-picked candidate and he is DESPERATE to have her succeed. He knows she'll fall right into step with his pack of RINOs in the Senate. That's why he and his friends in the Swamp have emptied their pockets to stop me from getting into the Senate — to the tune of******more than $17 MILLION DOLLARS.** **But****Peter****, I am still standing. And now that I've made it to the runoff election, I am asking you to stand with me.**

**Peter, there’s a reason Mitch McConnell and the Swamp hate me: I’m a proven conservative with a track record of doing**** _exactly_****what I say I’m going to do – and I have the accolades to back it up:**
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List

clean_body: | | | Peter, If you could pick one Senator to have two of in the Senate, who would you pick? Ted Cruz? Rand Paul? Or would you want another Mitch McConnell? I'm here to tell you: If you don't act now,you WILL get another Mitch McConnell in the Senate****this year. Now, I'm not saying this as a hypothetical. This is a real choice we are making RIGHT NOW in Alabama in the Republican primary runoff. Mitch McConnell has a hand-picked candidate and he is DESPERATE to have her succeed. He knows she'll fall right into step with his pack of RINOs in the Senate. That's why he and his friends in the Swamp have emptied their pockets to stop me from getting into the Senate — to the tune of****more than $17 MILLION DOLLARS. ButPeter, I am still standing. And now that I've made it to the runoff election, I am asking you to stand with me. Peter, there’s a reason Mitch McConnell and the Swamp hate me: I’m a proven conservative with a track record of doing exactlywhat I say I’m going to do – and I have the accolades to back it up: A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List 100% rating from the National Right to Life A+ rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group 98% rating from Heritage Action for America 93% rating from FreedomWorks 93% rating from the NRA A+ rating from Gun Owners of America 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters: Sen. Ted Cruz Sen. name: Ann Roe
subject: Thoughts and Prayers are not enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196872/349233051/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTJiN2E4My1kMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1WLeZdi4rSUNOEKagHi-26z4ZqufFXHYEN3g3tjX2Y=&emci=1fb1b6be-bae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=6a2b7a83-d1e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15639879)

Hi friends,

After the tragedy at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas, we should've been ready to act immediately to ensure that a tragedy like that never happened again in **any** community. And yet in the days that followed we've seen additional mass shootings in Oklahoma, Iowa and right here in Wisconsin.

Thoughts and prayers are not enough, and they haven't been since this epidemic of gun violence became something that we as a society had to come face to face with more than 20 years ago. **What we needed then, and what is an absolute necessity now, are real actions and policies to make all of us safer.** We need stronger gun control legislation and leaders who will not be afraid to ensure the safety and protection of our families and children.

Bryan Steil’s inaction after 19 children were killed in a Texas elementary school speaks loudly. He continues to be a political coward, more concerned with maintaining his position within the Republican party, and contributions from the NRA, than advocating for the safety of our children. Bryan follows a predictable pattern: he complains about the real issues facing people in this district, plays the blame game, and refuses to do a single thing to provide real solutions.

If Bryan won’t act, it’s on us to take action. Two major control measures were passed by the House last year: **The Enhanced Background Checks Act of 2021** and the **Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2021.** Both measures are currently stalled in the Senate. [**Will you join us in urging the Senate to act and pass these bills to make our communities safer?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196873/349233052/1920082176?ms=em22_220606_guncontrol&refcode=em22_220606_guncontrol&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTJiN2E4My1kMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1WLeZdi4rSUNOEKagHi-26z4ZqufFXHYEN3g3tjX2Y=&emci=1fb1b6be-bae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=6a2b7a83-d1e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15639879)
[DEMAND THE SENATE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196874/349233053/1920082176?ms=em22_220606_guncontrol&refcode=em22_220606_guncontrol&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTJiN2E4My1kMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1WLeZdi4rSUNOEKagHi-26z4ZqufFXHYEN3g3tjX2Y=&emci=1fb1b6be-bae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=6a2b7a83-d1e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15639879)
I hate how political this issue has become. This is ridiculous and should not be the focus. Children have died. Families are burying their loved ones almost daily. Since Uvlade, more mass shootings have taken place, and more will continue to happen unless we take action now.

**The longer we wait, the more lives we will lose.**

We have seen far too many lives lost to gun violence -- too many children have gone to school and never come home. And Republicans in Washington and Bryan have shown time and time again that they would instead serve the NRA than take action to pass stronger gun control laws. So it’s on us.

**[I won’t stop fighting for the safety of our communities, and that means fighting for common sense measures to put an end to avoidable tragedies that have become too common. Will you join me and demand that Congress stop stalling and pass the gun control legislation needed to protect our families?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46196875/349233054/1920082176?ms=em22_220606_guncontrol&refcode=em22_220606_guncontrol&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTJiN2E4My1kMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1WLeZdi4rSUNOEKagHi-26z4ZqufFXHYEN3g3tjX2Y=&emci=1fb1b6be-bae5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=6a2b7a83-d1e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15639879)**

Thank you for being a part of this fight.

\-- Ann Roe

name: Betsy Johnson
subject: Put the people back in charge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Run Betsy Run The Betsy Brigade needs you to recapture Oregon’s independent spirit
body:
[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220603_f&n=1) | Dear Friend, This year, Oregonians are going to strike back against extremism and polarization in our politics and leadership. They’re going to put the people back in charge. [](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe__0klRo6KH98-EQQc5CTU2J9a9WTzMmPt1_oizXcslbrVei91HcG8mdPnnWYEerjIzVSqFP6hiO9RC1gCvOsBMLY-JcstbsqPC6dL3Pba77W&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220603_f&n=2) As Oregon’s independent governor, I will be loyal only to you – not the partisan extremes. I’ll lead with the best ideas from both parties to move Oregon forward. Both sides are attacking me because they fear the big change we represent. They’re digging in. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46197199/349236695/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTcxZTU1Ny1kM2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJIseeMlK_LSKLkpC-CE4i9jKHZMqftRSYinpdFzKo=&emci=ce48e100-cbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9571e557-d3e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46197200/349236698/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTcxZTU1Ny1kM2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJIseeMlK_LSKLkpC-CE4i9jKHZMqftRSYinpdFzKo=&emci=ce48e100-cbe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9571e557-d3e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, the first trackers of the campaign have been showing up to all my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**

clean_body: Hello, Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office. “Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News. Well, the first trackers of the campaign have been showing up to all my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.” Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. Peter,

**Democrats plan to take away our guns AND control what we do in the comfort of our homes?**

_Not on my watch._

In a hearing discussing Joe Biden’s attempt to ban magazines of more than ten rounds of ammunition, I utilized my own firearms to show my colleagues that the legislation makes ZERO sense. **Here’s why:**

The majority of guns you and I use every day to protect ourselves, our families, and our homes use magazines that are greater than ten rounds of ammunition, which isn’t that much. But if Biden **_BANS_** them, **he might as well ban all of our guns because we won’t be able to load them.**

**I’m sick of the hypocrisy and the Democrats' games.** Again and again, the elitist D.C. swamp imposes rules on every day Americans, but the rules never apply to them.

clean_body: Again and again, the elitist D.C. swamp imposes rules on every day Americans, but the rules never apply to them. | Peter, Democrats plan to take away our guns AND control what we do in the comfort of our homes? Not on my watch. In a hearing discussing Joe Biden’s attempt to ban magazines of more than ten rounds of ammunition, I utilized my own firearms to show my colleagues that the legislation makes ZERO sense. Here’s why: The majority of guns you and I use every day to protect ourselves, our families, and our homes use magazines that are greater than ten rounds of ammunition, which isn’t that much. But if Biden BANS them, he might as well ban all of our guns because we won’t be able to load them. Biden and the Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough! | What blows my mind even more is that Democrats have spent HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS of dollars for their personal use of heightened security and bodyguards. But do you know what guns the bodyguards carry to protect them? Ones that require more than a 10-round magazine. I’m sick of the hypocrisy and the Democrats' games. Again and again, the elitist D.C. swamp imposes rules on every day Americans, but the rules never apply to them. I will never back down from the fight for your rights, For America, Greg Steube | Greg Steube has proudly served Florida's 17th Congressional District since 2019 and has been a steadfast warrior for the America First agenda. ---|--- Follow Me On Social Media The maximum amount an individual may contribute is $5,800. If you'd prefer to give by mail, a check can be mailed to the following address: Greg Steube for Congress 5317 Fruitville Road, #102, Sarasota, FL 34232 | Paid for by Greg Steube for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Tanya?=
subject: Tanya Calls Out the Inaction of the Biden Administration on the Baby Formula Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Tanya for Arizona
body:
Tanya Calls Out the Inaction of the Biden Administration on Baby Formula | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f047bbc012d7/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7171469?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi Friend, The Biden administration has been riddled with **INACTION** and **FAILURES**. Each day the gas prices hit a new high and more drugs and criminals flood across our border.

**Now, mothers around the country don't have the formula they need to feed their babies.**

The worst part? The Biden administration admits that they have known about it since **LAST YEAR!**

The good news is we don't have to keep putting up with these failures. This November we have the opportunity to elect Tanya Contreras Wheeless who will stand up against Biden, Pelosi, or whoever stands in the way of her fighting for East Valley families.

**Hear directly from Tanya in her latest op-ed as she calls out the Biden administration for their latest failure[HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=478701758f&e=bd2b55b0e3) on Medium's website or below!**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=b80983000e&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| In Joe Biden’s America, gas prices are soaring, rent is going through the roof, our border is being overrun, and now babies don’t have food. The Biden administration is more focused on finger-pointing than on fixing any of the problems facing American families. This is weak leadership and bloated bureaucracy at its worst.

On the campaign trail, I have talked to families who are struggling to make rent, strategically planning their shopping trips to make them last longer so they can use less gas. Now, babies are getting sick because their mothers can’t find the right formula for their families because the formula shelves are BARE.

The Biden administration says they are working as fast as they can now that the cameras are focused on them, but [HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra said](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=a48e8af9a1&e=bd2b55b0e3) they have known this would be an issue since last year. Let me say that again - LAST YEAR. What on Earth has the Biden administration been doing all that time? Answer: Not enough.

Not only did the Biden administration not put any actions in place to mitigate losing over 40% of our baby food supply, but the administration has also been stalling the process ever since. Even after the CDC concluded its investigation and [Abbott announced](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=e134a9f0c1&e=bd2b55b0e3) that their formula was not the cause of the babies’ deaths, there was still a delay with no word from the FDA before they finally let them get a plan in motion for reopening.

While I’m glad that the first shipment from Europe of formula arrived this past week, it never should have taken this long. Mothers had to ration formula, drive around looking for the right type, and spend money on gas when they couldn’t afford it. Not to mention the absolute panic any parent would feel if they weren’t sure where their baby’s next meal was coming from.

The Biden administration had a year to prepare for this and didn’t address the problem until they were getting bad press. They should have immediately eased the bureaucratic red tape to get European options in as soon as they knew there was a problem. They also should have gotten ahead of the story to let families know that shortages might be coming so they could prepare. That’s not hard, that’s leadership.

Biden and the Washington Democrats continue to let us down. Whether it’s baby formula, gas prices, or the border, they simply aren’t up to the task. Unlike Greg Stanton, I will speak up for the East Valley and hold this administration’s feet to the fire. I will listen to people and provide solutions even when the media isn’t watching. I will fight for you and always put the East Valley first.

If there’s a silver lining, it’s this - despite the inaction from Biden and Stanton, the East Valley is stepping up as we always do. A Mesa woman started a Facebook page called “Arizona East Valley Formula” to help other women find access to formula. If anyone needs help finding it, reach out to me and my team at [info@tanyaforarizona.com](mailto:info@tanyaforarizona.com). And hats off to all the mamas out there taking care of one another.

Government failures like this are why this year’s elections are so important. This is a simple choice between the status quo and change. If you like high inflation, an out-of-control border and government ineptitude - keep the guy you have. If not, I would be honored to earn your vote and you have my commitment that I will be the fighter that the East Valley deserves!

---
|
---
| We need your help to keep the momentum going and keep up the fight for the American Dream.

Join our team by replying to this email for future volunteer opportunities or helping us build our war chest by donating [here](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=49d414983d&e=bd2b55b0e3).

Best,
Team Tanya
---
| \--
More about Tanya:

**_Tanya Contreras Wheeless _**launched her campaign for the U.S. Congress in August 2021. She is a proven leader with a track record of bringing people together to solve problems. Her vast professional experience includes lawyer, business association CEO, sports executive with the Phoenix Suns, small business owner, and community advocate.

A valley native, she was born to teen parents and is the granddaughter of Mexican immigrants. She grew up in Peoria in a working-class family that often struggled, but despite the challenges, she learned the importance of faith, family, hard work, and personal responsibility.

Driven by her desire to create a better life for herself, Tanya worked from the time she was 14. She put herself through Arizona State University, becoming the first person in her family to graduate from college. She went on to graduate from ASU Law with distinction, earning a job at one of the nation’s top law firms.

Now, Tanya is ready to bring her experience and thoughtful leadership to Congress. She believes in the promise of the American dream and will fight to preserve it. She will embrace policies that empower people, not the government. And, she will always put Arizona first.

Tanya lives in Tempe with her husband Steve, an attorney and former F-16 pilot in the U.S. Air Force. They have three wonderful children and two adorable dogs.
---
| | | _The Tanya for Arizona campaign is about what WE CAN do together. WE CAN defend opportunity and freedom, but Tanya will need your help. No act of support is too small so please join our movement today by
[_DONATING_](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=8f68994042&e=bd2b55b0e3) or _[VOLUNTEERING](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=479ab53673&e=bd2b55b0e3)_._
---
| | | | | | [](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=2832fa7cc8&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | [](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=5ac75e4b54&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | [](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=d02bc4cc5b&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| [DONATE TO TANYA FOR ARIZONA](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=c07687c39a&e=bd2b55b0e3 "DONATE TO TANYA FOR ARIZONA")
---
|
---

8205 S. Priest Dr. #12796 Tempe, AZ 85284

You can [update your preferences](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=fd93f7bd71&e=bd2b55b0e3&c=a1db5f443f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=fd93f7bd71&e=bd2b55b0e3&c=a1db5f443f).

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Raphael Warnock & Maggie Hassan & Catherine Cortez Masto & Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The truth is, these are four of the races that will determine control of the Senate this year.
#

$5.
That is the donation we are asking you to split between Senators Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Reverend Raphael Warnock, and Mark Kelly — the four most vulnerable Democratic Senators facing re-election this cycle.
If that’s all you need to hear, use this link to give:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/senate**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-corefour-june22.HWbe6l&refcode=em220606-1-7&t=1&akid=3001%2E6688874%2E-eKbQa)
If it’s not, let us explain why this request is so important:
The truth is, these are four of the races that will determine control of the Senate this year.
So, think about the issues that are most important to you — education, health care, climate change, and more — because those are the issues at stake in this race.
No Catherine Cortez Masto, no Maggie Hassan, no Reverend Raphael Warnock, and no Mark Kelly... and say hello to Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
MAGA Republicans, the folks waiting in the wings with Trump, they all know this. That’s why the attack ads are already underway.
So today, we’re hoping for as many small-dollar donations as we can get — split between these four Democratic Senators — to fight back.

When these four win this November, know the donation you split today contributed to that victory.
Team Kelly

body:
Did you, or someone you know, leave the GOP in frustration? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8e25f8a685b7/lets-talk-about-it-7171433?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=88f2ad6d68&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Friend,

Do you know someone who left the GOP in frustration? We need them back!

**We have only 22 days until the primary election and every vote counts!** According to a [recent article](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5a613f186e&e=10c1db3257), the 2022 Utah Senate race hinges on the Republican primary election, and **unaffiliated voters could turn the tide.** After the Republican Party, the next largest population of voters are unaffiliated with over 500,000 people in that category.

Your donation helps increase our reach to every voter through billboards, media ads, mailers and lawn signs. **We need 10 more donations in your area to hit our goal today.** Help every voter learn about Becky by donating today!
---
|
---
| [DONATE $22](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=cf643557e8&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $22")
---

---
| [DONATE $322](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=53398cf8dd&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $322")
---
| **Change in Washington D.C. will require everyone to speak up!** Mother Teresa once said, “We ourselves feel that what we are doing is just a drop in the ocean. But the ocean would be less because of that missing drop.” **Your vote not only matters, it has the ability to shape the future of our nation.**

Please donate and invite those who have left the GOP to [affiliate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c723382a94&e=10c1db3257) and participate in this crucial race. To receive a mail-in ballot, **unaffiliated voters need to register as republicans by June 17th**. They can also change their registration at the polls on Primary Election Day, June 28th.

**Thank you for your ongoing support!**

\- Team Becky

---
| Morse Trail Updates June 6th
---
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| **Over the weekend, Senator Chuck Morse traveled to Rochester, NH to check out their Wings & Wheels event! **
---
---
| |
---
|
---
---
---
| |
---
|
---
---
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
|
**Following the Wings & Wheels event, Rochester Mayor Paul Callaghan gave Senator Morse an update on the city's newest community projects, meeting voters and furry friends along the way!**
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Senator Morse enjoyed attending Rep. Jess Edward's final Candidate Confab BBQ. This event will be dearly missed by many in the years to come, thank you for hosting us one last time Jess!**
---
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Took a quick stop along the campaign trail to enjoy some homemade ice cream from Sanctuary Farm in Sunapee, NH. Senator Morse had the pleasure of meeting the staff, as well as the dairy cows whose milk is used to produce the farm's delicious ice cream!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Senator Morse had the opportunity to participate in Sullivan County's "Speed Dating" event where he enjoyed answering questions and getting to know voters.**
---
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **On Sunday, Senator Morse was honored to speak at the Lion Club's function.**
