name: Sen. Cortez Masto (D)
subject: If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target.
#
Peter, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.
**National Journal just named me the most vulnerable senator on the ballot, which means Mitch McConnell will be zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat he needs to flip the Senate. If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate**.
I'm no stranger to a tough race – but this is going to be the closest Senate race of the year. The entire force of the GOP is coming after me, so I can’t do this alone. I’ve got to be honest, Peter: I’m facing a major fundraising gap and I need your immediate help.
The GOP is already blanketing Nevada with more than $4 million in attack ads to defeat me. We just ran the numbers and I need to raise at least $25,000 by midnight to have the resources to fight back – but right now I'm falling short.
**[Please Peter, can you help me turn this around before it's too late? Split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Patty Murray today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46199934/349250018/1499940066?refcode=pm_em_220606_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY3NjJkNC1lMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0I1fzQONh0oUK0-XBOb8Bl95dFll9V-rSQpBXkogSGI=)**
Any amount makes a difference in our fight to defend the Senate. Thanks for giving what you can.

_¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!_
Catherine Cortez Masto

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46199935/349250019/1499940066?refcode=pm_em_220606_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY3NjJkNC1lMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0I1fzQONh0oUK0-XBOb8Bl95dFll9V-rSQpBXkogSGI=)****

Catherine Cortez Masto **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Beto O'Rourke via CommonGood
subject: Cruelty, incompetence, and corruption
body:
Dear Derek,
Recent events made it more clear than ever that if we care about protecting the lives of our fellow Texans, if we want every child in this state to be healthy and happy, if we want to safeguard those who are closest to us from violent crime and gun violence, then we must overcome and defeat Greg Abbott.
After each mass shooting in Texas, he has promised solutions but provided none. In fact, he’s made it easier for violent criminals to carry guns on our streets and set the stage for more tragedies like Uvalde, Midland-Odessa, El Paso, Santa Fe and Sutherland Springs.
And if anyone still gave him the benefit of the doubt, he cleared that up Tuesday night when he read the details of the school shooting to the press like he was reading the weather forecast and then, instead of traveling the 245 miles to Uvalde to be with grieving families, he chose to travel 300 miles in the opposite direction to a fundraiser. He was literally counting dollars while first responders in Uvalde were counting bodies.
Who does that? Who responds to gun violence by making it easier to carry guns in Texas without a background check? Who shows up to a press conference feigning concern for the victims only after stuffing his pockets with campaign cash, and then proposes no solutions to help prevent the next tragedy?
It’s the exact same guy who bans women from making their own health care decisions in a state with one of the highest rates of maternal mortality in the developed world, and sets a $10,000 bounty on the back of any Texan who helps any woman seek an abortion.
It’s the same person who does nothing after being told repeatedly by a Federal judge that his Child Protective Services is understaffed and unaccountable, and that children emerge from the foster care system “more damaged than when they entered.” Over 100 Texas kids have died in Abbott’s child welfare system since 2020. Instead of fixing it, he’d rather try to scare you about transgender kids and prosecute their loving parents.
It’s the same governor who couldn’t keep the lights on or the heat running in the energy capital of the world, causing more than 700 Texans — including children — to die because he cared more about his donors’ profits than about fixing the grid after being warned it could fail.
We must overcome his cruelty, incompetence and corruption if we are going to save lives and allow our children to live without the constant fear of being murdered in their schools, supermarkets, and places of worship; or be left to fend for themselves in a foster care system that has gone from bad to worse on his watch.
We overcome that by beating Greg Abbott in November.
Help me by ensuring we have the resources to reach every Texas voter and ensure they know the cost and consequence of keeping Abbott in office, and our opportunity to choose a better future for ourselves and our kids. Split a contribution between our campaign and CommonGood today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220606_CGVA_Beto]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220606_CGVA_Beto&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220606_CGVA_Beto&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220606_CGVA_Beto&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220606_CGVA_Beto&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220606_CGVA_Beto&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220606_CGVA_Beto]
Your help makes our victory possible.
Thank you,
Beto

name: James Carville
subject: Just calling it like I see it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Folks, I’ve done the math on this thing every which way, and the
answer is always the same:

Democrats don’t hold the Senate majority (let alone expand it) in November
without Ohio.

In a crummy Midterm year for Democrats, there just aren’t a lot of pickup
opportunities, with one whopper of an exception.

Ohio—this race is so close that the Senate majority might as well be
decided with a coin flip, and that means we’ve got a chance.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14280?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4061%2E3611125%2ExR5zk4 ]But we need your help to do that, folks—can you pitch in to
Tim Ryan’s campaign ASAP? He’s our best shot at expanding our Democratic
Senate majority.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14280?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4061%2E3611125%2ExR5zk4 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14280?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4061%2E3611125%2ExR5zk4 ]Donate $50

Republicans are talking as if they’ve already got Ohio in the bag. But if
that’s true, why the hell are they pouring more than $80 million into
trying to buy this open Senate seat?

It’s because they know that Tim Ryan can win.

That’s why they’re propping up their Silicon Valley puppet JD Vance with
beaucoup bucks—because Tim Ryan would give working folks another voice in
the Senate.

Tim Ryan is Democrats’ best chance at expanding the Senate majority and
actually getting some legislation passed. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14280?t=1021&amount=25&akid=4061%2E3611125%2ExR5zk4 ]Can I count on you to get off

| | Peter, Our anti-freedom President is trying to use tyranny to control Conservatives. **He deserves to be impeached for his disgusting abuse of power.**

By happily exploiting school shooting victims, the Democrats are now working to COMPLETELY repeal the Second Amendment.

This is an obvious attack on America and Conservatives. **They want us to be completely and utterly defenseless against their corrupt Big Government. **

**_Help me get to DC to fight for the right to self-defense in America!_**

The radical Democrats all have the same solution when they hear about shootings. They want more gun control and more Americans disarmed.
_If they used their brains, they would recognize that our school systems are**gun-free zones** already_. More gun control won’t do anything. **_This is obviously a mental health problem in our society!_**

We need to be tougher on crime and keep dangerous criminals from being able to harm other citizens. The Democrats want criminals out on the streets so the cities of America can fall apart.

We have to step up to protect our cities, schools, and second amendment rights. [**_Make an URGENT donation to my campaign if you want to see me fight for you and your family’s right to self-defense!_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=b91bb47e12&e=af4b86f5c6)

I will never compromise on our Second Amendment rights. I refuse to cede any ground to the Democrats that have forced Republicans to be weak.[ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=bf3030213a&e=af4b86f5c6)**_[Help me take my pro-Trump agenda to Congress by donating today.](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=807e9d0d59&e=af4b86f5c6) _**

name: Liz (Team Benson)
subject: This article is a must read
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend, Kristina Karamo and her army of election conspiracy theorists are leading a dedicated effort to threaten your voice and your vote.

This latest New York Times article does an excellent job tracing this movement from its origins during the 2020 Presidential Election to present day. The conclusion is clear: election deniers are an increasingly powerful force in our politics, and they pose an existential threat to the future of our democracy. It is our duty as concerned citizens to do everything in our power to support political leaders that will defeat them.

Check out the NYT article below and share it with your friends and family. It's important that we're all united in this fight for democracy.
-Liz '

In Races to Run Elections, Candidates Are Backed by Key 2020 Deniers
By Alexandra Berzon

Key figures in the effort to subvert the 2020 presidential election have thrown their weight behind a slate of Republican candidates for secretary of state across the country, injecting specious theories about voting machines, foreign hacking and voter fraud into campaigns that will determine who controls elections in several battleground states.

The America First slate comprises more than a dozen candidates who falsely claim the 2020 election was stolen from Donald J. Trump. It grew out of meetings held by a conspiracy-mongering QAnon leader and a Nevada politician, and has quietly gained support from influential people in the election denier movement — including Mike Lindell, the MyPillow founder, and Patrick Byrne, the former Overstock.com executive who has financed public forums that promote the candidates and theories about election vulnerabilities.

Members of the slate have won party endorsements or are competitive candidates for the Republican nomination in several states, including three — Michigan, Arizona and Nevada — where a relatively small number of ballots have decided presidential victories. And in Pennsylvania, where the governor appoints the secretary of state, State Senator Doug Mastriano, who is aligned with the group, easily won his primary for governor last month.

Check out the full article in full here. [https://www.nytimes.com/2022/06/05/us/politics/america-first-secretary-of-state-candidates.html]

name: Team Franchot
subject: Heads-up on tomorrow’s deadline
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Time is short, so we’ll keep this quick! Tomorrow on June 7, we’re facing our crucial fundraising deadline, and we need all the help we can get to reach our grassroots fundraising goal of $20,000.
This is arguably one of the most important end-of-period fundraising deadlines of our entire campaign.
Here’s why: the money we raise by tomorrow will help power our efforts to reach out to voters through the final month of this primary race. That’s four full weeks we’ll have to knock on more doors, place more phone calls, plant more yard signs, run more ads, shoot more campaign videos, and ultimately secure the votes we need to win this competitive election. If we can reach our goal, we’ll have the resources we need to expand on our lead even further in the critical lead up to July 19.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606?amount=20.22]
If you’ve been on the sidelines about donating to our people-powered movement, then now is the perfect time to maximize your impact. Don’t wait until July – your contribution will have a greater impact right now!
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606]
We can’t thank you enough for your support. Peter Franchot is the unprecedented leader we need for these unprecedented times. His mastery of the state’s finances is a must-have skill for Maryland’s next Governor, and it cannot be learned on the job. He has the vision, the experience, and the leadership needed to deliver results for our working families and small businesses starting Day One.
We have an exciting opportunity to redefine the promise and possibility of state government. Let’s get it done!
Team Franchot
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0606?amount=20.22]

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Your results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Hi, Peter, I’m just making sure you saw this message from my team.

A few weeks ago, I asked you to share your top priorities with me so I could make sure I was fighting for the things that mattered most to the people – and I've been poring over your input since.

Peter, I’m happy to say that we agree about the things you care about most – voting rights, gun violence prevention, climate change, reproductive rights, and government corruption. I vow to keep these issues at the center of my fight for justice, but I need your help to continue my work.

**That’s why, to keep fighting for what matters most to you, I need to raise at least $10,000 before MIDNIGHT so I have the resources to defeat my GOP opponent and win re-election.****So please, will you make a $5 donation now?**

**Here’s the best link to give: **[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny-22**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46200647/349253079/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk527-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTNlYTMxYi1lNGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNmA6d6rNb4TMKhs9Io1shMN8kzPBYQ3IcDaK8utG9s=)

Thanks for helping me fight for you,

Letitia

name: John
subject: I wasn't supposed to make it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Kids who get kicked out of high school aren’t supposed to make it this far. Don't get me wrong – I didn't get to this moment alone.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46200662/349253145/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220606-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220606&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=923ea31b-e4e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjNlYTMxYi1lNGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRObwWwH1d9c5fujRzdibnhJX68j5bwqiGJOYXVJVl4=)
---
| Kids who get kicked out of high school aren’t supposed to make it this far, Peter. Don't get me wrong – I didn't get to this moment alone. It was public institutions – my fourth grade teacher Mr. Osterweil, my public school teachers, my school counselor – who believed in me and gave me a second chance when I needed it most. **So to sit here now – emailing you – as a candidate primed to make history as Maryland’s first Black governor is more than surreal. ** From the public school educators that made it possible for me to attend Harvard, to the national civil rights leaders who entrusted me with the responsibility to run one of the largest education civil rights organizations in the country, to President Obama appointing me as 10th U.S. Secretary of Education, people investing in me and believing in my potential have gotten me to this moment. **Now I am calling on you – in this moment – because I know together we can come together to do what’s right for Marylanders and deliver on the promise of progress to become a national leader for the rest of the country. I am ready to take on being Governor of Maryland, but I cannot get there alone.** I’m depending on you as a member of this amazing grassroots team to support me. Our biggest public fundraising deadline of the election is just 1 DAY away and my finance team informed me that we are still $5,601 away from reaching our online fundraising goal. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Kids who get kicked out of high school aren’t supposed to make it this far. Don't get me wrong – I didn't get to this moment alone. | = | Kids who get kicked out of high school aren’t supposed to make it this far, Peter. Don't get me wrong – I didn't get to this moment alone. It was public institutions – my fourth grade teacher Mr. Osterweil, my public school teachers, my school counselor – who believed in me and gave me a second chance when I needed it most. So to sit here now – emailing you – as a candidate primed to make history as Maryland’s first Black governor is more than surreal. From the public school educators that made it possible for me to attend Harvard, to the national civil rights leaders who entrusted me with the responsibility to run one of the largest education civil rights organizations in the country, to President Obama appointing me as 10th U.S. Secretary of Education, people investing in me and believing in my potential have gotten me to this moment. Now I am calling on you – in this moment – because I know together we can come together to do what’s right for Marylanders and deliver on the promise of progress to become a national leader for the rest of the country. I am ready to take on being Governor of Maryland, but I cannot get there alone. I’m depending on you as a member of this amazing grassroots team to support me. Our biggest public fundraising deadline of the election is just 1 DAY away and my finance team informed me that we are still $5,601 away from reaching our online fundraising goal. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Supporting us with a donation today will allow my campaign to build the strongest digital strategy and organizing team to connect with Marylanders in every corner of the state both online and in their communities. Please, pitch in whatever you can today: | = Thank you so much for believing in this movement! John P.S. To watch me at tonight's first and only televised gubernatorial debate, text DEBATE to 48178 and we'll send you the link to tune in. * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178, or visit our _. subject: I’m behind

body:
The only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
Hey Peter,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1a4089e1b4284ae0a5b639926c8ffd24&_e=D0nmmmKM4GPlFyCW-idnrLjrf3gBCBHRlHgtg35TVx55TTZLwy1I3hgpUVvnu6oS0zcU9LlUZIozZLkcd7SjAANGySZ2gOJjuZgmRZyJPsz_IlNwP-nLu-oo2_v5P1B4Ef2dOwH0_QMn3rUZNCtj47vFm2iiL16j4NTQyU2c63-0KbEn4ahDFWFGO5rCesT1gBOYF8fnI5mAtuNy0qKlUxldaBSJcu3BgoasJam2iCnxZfq8n0Ss6AsoR8oW-KWaOmjJ-_dx0K7C--LhXpPU11Er4IqtR9W9OhSpDIQYqExIksaBHsYTsUEyIrUyUVInfb7H1r_Cbw_6eV6u9jC1etG2mZKcQEWVbPen88oqErNmoMQePQ3nIiaD6ld9xkH6)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1a4089e1b4284ae0a5b639926c8ffd24&_e=D0nmmmKM4GPlFyCW-idnrLjrf3gBCBHRlHgtg35TVx55TTZLwy1I3hgpUVvnu6oS0zcU9LlUZIozZLkcd7SjAANGySZ2gOJjuZgmRZyJPsz_IlNwP-nLu-oo2_v5P1B4Ef2dOwH0_QMn3rUZNCtj47vFm2iiL16j4NTQyU2c639jKaTJMYuzvKxMlLcxXGi9s1CbP-ALzKZQLwqA9h0D_P39s0ykHNBVLbkpxkurydUAS5xgaFBPz4SAxVID9x5I3BhL3bHtT9dsfQrJNxRpXxH3kFz1loFcoIWJWjDwvUtecSTPCcW5DjOtFgAqngx_G1szcM-XzNLsGyEAwJcUFFy9kZo1yyEJ2oln1bpDpc7hletF9I029N_zgnhxVlFX)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1a4089e1b4284ae0a5b639926c8ffd24&_e=D0nmmmKM4GPlFyCW-idnrLjrf3gBCBHRlHgtg35TVx55TTZLwy1I3hgpUVvnu6oS0zcU9LlUZIozZLkcd7SjAANGySZ2gOJjuZgmRZyJPsz_IlNwP-nLu-oo2_v5P1B4Ef2dOwH0_QMn3rUZNCtj47vFm2iiL16j4NTQyU2c63-dXOGhStq7pho5vxgORungkps1BiTb0KzLAngvW4m0GLGXGciniDuEvVpfU3uLTZj1G2woWgwCjHBRgxtadC_MAXJrzL9rZwp1Y0rxngRZiRD73xLimZvhxsFIDmFdcif50Vuweg2F89af6Eh4CJ_-TCEt7KLWuQniRroZJcSVr3uJfddUxpxcLQBPdezupRj5i0T6BXP1A948C3y-5iqh)
It’s not just me, Peter, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: We are looking for as many people as possible to step up and say they endorse Cheri Beasley’s campaign for Senate before the end of the day. Can you add your name?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We are organizing everywhere to get this done.
#

In this campaign, we are taking on MAGA Republican Ted Budd, who is backed by well-funded DC interests that know he’s been a reliable vote for their agenda in Congress.
Beating Cheri Beasley is one of Republicans’ top priorities because they know that if Democrats win in North Carolina, then we are almost guaranteed to hold and expand the Senate majority. That’s why we are organizing everywhere to get it done.
An important step in that process is getting as many people as possible to say they stand with Cheri Beasley — especially right now as the general election is just underway. And we would love to get your name on the list:
**[Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-june22/?source=em220606-1-t1&refcode2=1007.357359.KYSFJ_&akid=1007%2E357359%2EKYSFJ_)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-june22/?source=em220606-1-t1&refcode2=1007.357359.KYSFJ_&akid=1007%2E357359%2EKYSFJ_)**
Something as simple as adding your name to say you support Cheri makes a big difference.
Because when thousands of us come together to say we are with Cheri, we become part of something much bigger. Your support will put us a step closer to winning this race and electing a Senator who will deliver meaningful change for our country.
Thank you in advance for adding your name to endorse Cheri!
\- Team Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-june22/?source=em220606-1-t1&refcode2=1007.357359.KYSFJ_&akid=1007%2E357359%2EKYSFJ_)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1007%2E357359%2EKYSFJ_). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1007%2E357359%2EKYSFJ_). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1007_357359_KYSFJ_&akid=1007%2E357359%2EKYSFJ_) today to help us make history.

subject: FWD: you've been selected, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend: **Time is running out before our LIVE poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight – and we still need to hear from another 27 top Democrats in your area.**

name: Giffords
subject: Things have changed
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In the weeks after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary school, there was extraordinary national momentum for changes to our gun laws.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june22.JkdLIw&refcode=em220606-1-15&refcode2=2112.3935704.tx1H-w&t=1&akid=2112%2E3935704%2Etx1H-w)
---
_Gabby testifies before Congress in 2013_
Friends -
In the weeks after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary school, there was extraordinary national momentum for changes to our gun laws.
When Gabby testified before Congress, everyone stood behind her.
But in private, a lot of candidates were afraid to run on the issue of gun violence prevention. And in 2014, Democrats lost.
Four years later, gun violence prevention was one of the top issues on voters' minds according to the polls—second only to health care. Candidates campaigned on it, and they won.
Today, a lot of people—including Senators from swing states—believe campaigning on this issue is a key in what could otherwise be a tough 2022.
Times have changed: gun violence is a winning issue. And candidates who receive an F-rating from the NRA wear it as a badge of honor.
Gabby and the Giffords organization have a leading role in this fight. Let us not forget, this is an issue that is supported by an overwhelming majority of Democrats, Independents and Republicans alike and the cries for change are as loud as ever.
But we cannot do that alone. Gabby needs you still. So please:
[**Can you please use this link to make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june22.JkdLIw&refcode=em220606-1-15&t=2&akid=2112%2E3935704%2Etx1H-w)

Let us not forget, this is an issue that is supported by an overwhelming majority of Democrats, Independents and Republicans alike and the cries for change are as loud as ever. But we cannot do that alone. Gabby needs you still. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Democracy comes alive
body:
One of the reasons I love campaigns so much is because it is an opportunity to watch democracy come alive in the communities and neighborhoods we love.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/150?t=1&akid=161%2E39519%2ErX0GZc)

Friends -
One of the reasons I love campaigns so much is because it is an opportunity to watch democracy come alive in the communities and neighborhoods we love.
It comes alive in every street-corner conversation about the needs of an individual family or an entire block.
It comes alive with every volunteer at a community event or someone giving their time making phone calls to potential voters.
And it comes alive every time someone says I can count on their vote, and when they tell me I cannot.
I don’t have to tell you our democracy is under attack.
You know that.
Participation is the key to preserving and protecting it for this and future generations.
I am running for Congress to fight for our neighborhoods and communities in Washington, D.C. — like I have fought for these neighborhoods and communities for most of my adult life.
But I cannot get there alone. I need your participation. And that means I have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress in New York’s 10th Congressional District? I would not ask if your help was not so critically important to our chances.**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/191?refcode=em-220606&t=2&akid=161%2E39519%2ErX0GZc)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/191?refcode=em-220606&t=3&akid=161%2E39519%2ErX0GZc)**
We are going to be outspent in this election. But I have been representing these communities for a long time. And if we have the resources to run an effective campaign, we are going to win.
In solidarity,
Bill de Blasio

De Blasio for Congress
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=161%2E39519%2ErX0GZc). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize.

Peter,

Their witch hunt is getting out of hand. Make no mistake, they're only coming after me because **I'M FIGHTING FOR YOU!** Because I won't back down and I fight for the people who elected me trusting that I would spend every waking moment in office serving our Country.

Attack me on TV, attack me in the New York Times but to question my legal integrity with a subpoena?! name: Nan Whaley
subject: I have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
I didn’t get into this race because it would be easy – I got in to make a difference for Ohio. And I’m sure not backing down now.

Team,
At the end of this week, we face our next test: **The upcoming filing deadline here in Ohio and all eyes will be on our fundraising numbers.**
We’ve known all along that this race wouldn't be easy. Not only does Mike DeWine have his own millions to pour into his campaign, but he’s also spent his time as governor cozying up to special interest lobbyists who will pour money into defending him as their handpicked candidate.
But I didn’t get into this race because it would be easy – I got in to make a difference for Ohio. And I’m sure not backing down now.
**[Our team has set a goal of raising an additional $15,000 online before the deadline. So today I’m asking: Will you pitch in to our campaign by June 10?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201365/349256436/-1146101770?refcode=nw_email_220606_1_t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTk1NDY0Yi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCb_8yzHw_hxUp2lHyq9cGbZUdq_JvJq1KC-8oThdE4=)**
Under Mike DeWine and his Republican cronies in the state legislature, Ohio has made history – with the biggest corruption scandal our state has ever seen. Meanwhile, Ohio families are seeing wages drop as corporations price gouge working people, making costs soar.
Our state was once a place of opportunity and prosperity. With the right leadership to build the middle class, I know that we can be that state again.
That starts with kicking Mike DeWine out of the governor’s office and ensuring that Ohio is a place where people, not corporations, are the priority.
**[Will you help our campaign reach this goal ahead of our upcoming deadline? Chip in $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201367/349256439/-1146101770?refcode=nw_email_220606_1_t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTk1NDY0Yi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCb_8yzHw_hxUp2lHyq9cGbZUdq_JvJq1KC-8oThdE4=)**
Onward,
Nan

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Ohio is winnable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
A new poll shows this race in a dead heat against JD Vance ...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201472/349256784/-640001169?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTU0NTRmZi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKh_eEHaor2VZVHf_HeV_Top_zoIe2M-HRvb7ISWfI0=)
Peter,

In a minute, I’ll ask you to split a critical donation between my campaign to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue and Abby Finkenauer's campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). **But first, let me explain why this race — and your donation — are so important today. **

Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that.

**A new poll shows this race in a dead heat against JD Vance. Now all we need is you.**
**[Whether or not we can flip this seat depends on you. We need the resources right now to build the team it’ll take to win. Will you split a donation of $5 or more to help us flip Ohio and Iowa blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201473/349256786/-640001169?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTU0NTRmZi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKh_eEHaor2VZVHf_HeV_Top_zoIe2M-HRvb7ISWfI0=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201474/349256787/-640001169?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTU0NTRmZi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKh_eEHaor2VZVHf_HeV_Top_zoIe2M-HRvb7ISWfI0=)
---
Donald Trump has made this race his top target. That’s why he attacked me during his rallies, saying Republicans “can’t take a chance” when it comes to running against me. **It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared. **

My GOP opponent, JD Vance, is a multi-millionaire. Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $15 million super PAC. He’s completely out-of-touch with hardworking Ohioans.

Me? I’ve been on picket lines and in union halls my whole life. I’m still paying off my family’s student loans and mortgage. I’m fighting like hell to cut workers in on the deal — not prop up my wealthy friends and right-wing special interests.

**Peter, I believe we can win this race. CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip. But this is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races. So, I’m turning to you:**
**[We’ll need a surge of grassroots support to take on the GOP and come out on top. Please, split a donation between me and Abby Finkenauer today to help us win these critical races. Anything you can chip in makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201475/349256788/-640001169?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTU0NTRmZi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKh_eEHaor2VZVHf_HeV_Top_zoIe2M-HRvb7ISWfI0=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201476/349256790/-640001169?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTU0NTRmZi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKh_eEHaor2VZVHf_HeV_Top_zoIe2M-HRvb7ISWfI0=)
---
Let’s do this.

— Tim
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201478/349256791/428800054?refcode=jtk1152-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTU0NTRmZi1lOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKh_eEHaor2VZVHf_HeV_Top_zoIe2M-HRvb7ISWfI0=&emci=bed9bb28-1ee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=255454ff-e8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)

name: Ehasz HQ
subject: You are key to flipping PA-01 blue

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: One more day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
If we get out our vote today, then tomorrow will be the beginning of the end for Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham. We are stronger together and will bu| | |
---
| | Peter, If we get out our vote today, then tomorrow will be the beginning of the end for Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham. We are stronger together and will build a stronger New Mexico **together.** Over the past few months, we have talked to thousands of our neighbors, ran advertisements to inform New Mexican voters of MLG’s failures, surged in the polls, & fundraised enough to get us here. **Peter, with election day coming TOMORROW we have to keep our foot on the pedal.**
---
[**HELP MARK GET OUT THE VOTE**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=a47744f66b6d4b56930dddd16cf2869c&_e=nLfDe4SbN2FboLQ9M3xFeAZWhM2XFXTNlKa8CLqJ7LCErXOTxb_nJ45keypqXxY1z3vUeQIVxjGxbh8iQLw9poo9cU6P-w04mMA0CruTyWoPFLHgQaJN-JzI_BY2j0ZXjhzR_oko5qOF834lIASOmNy8MV3I4t3St-QMZS3cng_Q7X3-z2oSUwcXoDfMvIEA-9C1ci5AFG8jwKvL0TzI7b8adntzduW3EdC2uM4i2OfsBXOViBujnzW-nyIwC8SqzAGhtzod0dF8lLznUoOrx-Q6g832QN0Iju-fnWwQ87XDVmzlPystEaIlY9E2TSH3OlvR6fg1vahFw8BhzwG-TPOvwbCBiBCQ1UGx9-5e8tdbFvAFQYsX8V6OH3XH-wqbOod1o8eGYwcJWIoIpAIxUd_qZf5rCbNH26FhL_XAhXnF7YnkDh7nEEhr-Fael90xBLJRZHIxNe70zDioqF7SiP4UaAQQ7_gn8TuolMHrV-_O0TAhhJWOGV94c8UApdeMCRMvaGDPgCdWywDLhVDG6vARvr5m-03ogVkoexIUMOc%3D)
---
**I’m counting on your IMMEDIATE SUPPORT to double down on all of our success, reach every last voter possible, & GET OUT THE VOTE tomorrow to help us WIN BIG!** A quick review of MLG’s track record as Governor makes it clear we **cannot fail.** If we don’t defeat MLG, she’ll be free to pull our great state closer than ever to the Washington, D.C., Far Left, furthering her disastrous policies that are ruining New Mexico. 🚨 MLG is making protecting LATE TERM ABORTION and New Mexico’s status as the abortion capital of North America the centerpiece of her re-election campaign. 📉 She has grown New Mexico’s state government by MORE than 40% while keeping our businesses shut down ❌ She pulled the National Guard and left our southern border WIDE-OPEN👎 Her union-first agenda leaves New Mexico’s students behind and now she’s covering up how she has failed our kids by hiding test results.
Defeating MLG is going to require **all hands on deck.** We need to be **SURE** that we’ve reached **every last voter POSSIBLE** \- & I won’t rest until the fight is finished. Will you?
---
[**KEEP FIGHTING**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=a47744f66b6d4b56930dddd16cf2869c&_e=nLfDe4SbN2FboLQ9M3xFeAZWhM2XFXTNlKa8CLqJ7LCErXOTxb_nJ45keypqXxY1z3vUeQIVxjGxbh8iQLw9poo9cU6P-w04mMA0CruTyWoPFLHgQaJN-JzI_BY2j0ZXjhzR_oko5qOF834lIASOmNy8MV3I4t3St-QMZS3cng_Q7X3-z2oSUwcXoDfMvIEA-9C1ci5AFG8jwKvL0TzI7b8adntzduW3EdC2uM4i2OfsBXOViBujnzW-nyIwC8SqzAGhtzod0dF8lLznUoOrx-Q6g832QN0Iju-fnWwQ87XDVmzlPystEaIlY9E2TSH3I04ADrXTovL-D4O6bJ7VJ4XpMKuB5tps5G6vSefwT9F90EBx9YoSPZLEZeP1_IK9hAB9KzDKwBIRsjFyvNYDjE8leEQXtkJtIEQZTDxZP0oG4gqUVuBfG5_mS6EqEm-38o7vSlYC5e4IYb5RTqglp7cHVUYXyJ-RBWCHKErv1XtCbc-sAndBg0LjCA5ZrQxbXzCLxfu4Ff1IpEaLjp_xy2VApk3cLLJcFh147PI6f6s%3D)
---
Chip in now to help our campaign KEEP FIGHTING to earn those critical last-minute swing voters, get more folks out to the polls, & **WIN tomorrow** so that we can **finally take on MLG!**

clean_body: If we get out our vote today, then tomorrow will be the beginning of the end for Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham. We are stronger together and will bu| | | | | Peter, If we get out our vote today, then tomorrow will be the beginning of the end for Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham. We are stronger together and will build a stronger New Mexico together. Over the past few months, we have talked to thousands of our neighbors, ran advertisements to inform New Mexican voters of MLG’s failures, surged in the polls, & fundraised enough to get us here. Peter, with election day coming TOMORROW we have to keep our foot on the pedal. I’m counting on your IMMEDIATE SUPPORT to double down on all of our success, reach every last voter possible, & GET OUT THE VOTE tomorrow to help us WIN BIG! A quick review of MLG’s track record as Governor makes it clear we cannot fail. If we don’t defeat MLG, she’ll be free to pull our great state closer than ever to the Washington, D.C., Far Left, furthering her disastrous policies that are ruining New Mexico. 🚨 MLG is making protecting LATE TERM ABORTION and New Mexico’s status as the abortion capital of North America the centerpiece of her re-election campaign. 📉 She has grown New Mexico’s state government by MORE than 40% while keeping our businesses shut down ❌ She pulled the National Guard and left our southern border WIDE-OPEN👎 Her union-first agenda leaves New Mexico’s students behind and now she’s covering up how she has failed our kids by hiding test results. Defeating MLG is going to require all hands on deck. We need to be SURE that we’ve reached every last voter POSSIBLE \- & I won’t rest until the fight is finished. Will you? Chip in now to help our campaign KEEP FIGHTING to earn those critical last-minute swing voters, get more folks out to the polls, & WIN tomorrow so that we can finally take on MLG! | | Second only to earning your vote, Peter, your immediate support is the best way for you to join the fight, defeat MLG, & take back New Mexico. I’m counting on you - are you in? For voting locations near you, visit my website at Thank you, Mark Ronchetti | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. | | Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

subject: Veteran, immigrant, and home-school parent. I am the American Dream 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

My name is Hung Cao.

I'm a proud conservative, retired Special Operations Navy Captain, Vietnamese Immigrant, and homeschooling parent of 5 running for Congress in Virginia's 10th District, and _**[today I am asking for your support.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531491:6MKynXoAN:m:1:3317145305:C95E4A225E9CB92169571769510BFBA1:r "today I am asking
for your support.")**_
_** STAND WITH HUNG CAO: **_
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531491:6MKynXoAN:m:1:3317145305:C95E4A225E9CB92169571769510BFBA1:r "CHIP IN NOW")
---

Shortly before the fall of Saigon, my family immigrated to the US to escape the realms of communism sweeping East Asia. Inspired by the opportunities given to my family in this great nation, _**I decided to dedicate my life to serving this country.**_

I was accepted into the Naval Academy and from there I began my 25 years of service deploying to Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.

It wasn't until the fall of Kabul, much like the Fall of Saigon, that I became motivated to serve my country in Congress.

The Democrats' failed withdrawal from Afghanistan symbolized everything wrong with their policies and I'm determined to go to Washington to fix them. _**[Will you chip in anything you can spare to send me to Congress and help me fix the Democrats' corruption?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531491:6MKynXoAN:m:1:3317145305:C95E4A225E9CB92169571769510BFBA1:r "Will you chip in
anything you can spare to send me to Congress and help me fix the Democrats’ corruption?")**_

---

---

Virginians of the 10th District deserve a representative who will fight for the values we hold so dear: _life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness_.

My military training has prepared me for all the evil attacks the Corrupt Democrats will throw at me, but I can't do it alone. _**[I need every single patriot reading this to chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to help me win my race and send me to Congress to continue fighting for American values>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60531491:6MKynXoAN:m:1:3317145305:C95E4A225E9CB92169571769510BFBA1:r "I need every single patriot reading this to chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to help me win my
race and send me to Congress to continue fighting for American values >>>")**_

Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Utah-native and the former Global President and Chief Customer Officer for Johnson & Johnson Consumer Products Jeff Strong first worked with Ally Isom years ago.

"What I saw was a great leader, a person that can communicate, that can collaborate, that can lead other people, that can work through difficult and complex issues."

As you take a look at Ally, you'll see what I see, which is a politician that will do a great job for the state of Utah. She doesn't see people that disagree with her as enemies. She sees them as opportunities to have dialogue and persuade them to support the things she thinks are important.

This upcoming election is critical. Change in Washington is necessary, and she is the type of politician that we desperately need right now.

"There is no question in my mind that she will be an outstanding senator."

Change in Washington is necessary, and she is the type of politician that we desperately need right now." | | | | | | | == | | Business executive Jeff Strong publicly endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate. == | | | ---|--- | Utah-native and the former Global President and Chief Customer Officer for Johnson & Johnson Consumer Products Jeff Strong first worked with Ally Isom years ago. "What I saw was a great leader, a person that can communicate, that can collaborate, that can lead other people, that can work through difficult and complex issues." As you take a look at Ally, you'll see what I see, which is a politician that will do a great job for the state of Utah. She doesn't see people that disagree with her as enemies. She sees them as opportunities to have dialogue and persuade them to support the things she thinks are important. This upcoming election is critical. Change in Washington is necessary, and she is the type of politician that we desperately need right now. "There is no question in my mind that she will be an outstanding senator." == == == == | | | == | VOTE ALLY ISOM FOR U.S. SENATE! Listen, Elise Stefanik and I couldn’t be more different: | ✖ She voted to overturn the free and fair election of President Biden by objecting to Pennsylvania’s presidential electors.
✖ She has an A+ rating from the NRA for her work blocking common sense gun safety legislation.
✖ She voted against codifying Roe v. Wade into law.
---
For too long, Rep. Stefanik has used her platform to peddle extremist right-wing views, drive division in Congress, and keep legislation with wide public support from passing.

**Not anymore.** I’m running a grassroots campaign to bring better representation to NY-21, and to remove a dangerous “ultra-MAGA” Republican from the halls of power.
[**Will you join this movement and chip in $3 now to defeat ultra-MAGA Republican Elise Stefanik? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46201823/349258760/-254126340?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=MCFC_20220606_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmViNjE3ZC1lY2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0YBnE7geFY7v05rrvV1KZW9jfyOT2D8cDZj1hJewGj0=)

Look, Elise sows division, hate, and fear across the nation - my dedication to the people of NY-21 couldn’t be more different.
✔ I’m committed to service to country and community over party or self interest.
✔ I believe in sensible solutions for gun safety.
✔ I believe in protecting a woman’s right to choose and codifying Roe into law.
---
With a slim majority in the House, the only way to ensure this critical work remains possible is to protect and expand our majority.

**As long as Rep. Stefanik is in Congress, she’ll continue to fight tooth and nail to keep us from making our democracy work for all of us.**
[**Honestly, we must fight harder than ever. name: Ted Cruz
subject: We’re losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
The only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
Hey Peter,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. WE DON’T’ WANT TO HAVE TO BACKTRACK ON ANY OBLIGATIONS WE’VE MADE, SO WE’REA ASKING YOU TO PITCH IN WHAT YOU CAN RIGHT NOW TO HELP US FLIP THE SENATE RED. In politics, the winner often turns out to be the candidate with more money behind them. That means this is really a contest about who can recruit the best candidates and fund them adequately. If we’re going to beat the socialist Democrats in November, then we sincerely need you on our team. Without your immediate support, we’re not sure we’ll be able to meet all of the commitments we’ve made thus far. WOULD YOU WANT TO SEE US HAVE TO CANCEL OUR ADS IN KEY BATTLEGROUND STATES AT THE LAST MOMENT DUE TO LACK OF FUNDING? That’s why for the next 24 hours our 10x match is active. Can we count on your support right now? name: Peter Welch
subject: This is a people-powered movement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
How we ensure Republicans don’t take back the Senate:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=504%2E61531%2ENy-n9M)
Hello,
I’ve worked throughout my life to help Vermonters. It’s why I decided to run for U.S. Senate—because it’s an All Hands On Deck moment to protect our democracy.
I’ve learned a lot representing Vermont in Congress since 2007. Most importantly, I’ve learned that we need to keep fighting for an economy that works for everyone, a healthy planet our children can inhabit, and a stronger democracy where we can all participate. But all of this, and so much more, is at stake if Republicans take back the Senate.
[**It’s why I’m asking: Can you chip in a $5 contribution to help defend our Democratic majority?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2926?t=3&akid=504%2E61531%2ENy-n9M)
[CHIP IN ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2926?t=7&t=21&akid=504%2E61531%2ENy-n9M)
---
With the Senate split 50-50, we can’t afford to lose even one seat. It could be the difference between lower prescription drug prices, taking climate action, and so much more. We have a chance to tackle these issues together, but we need to win in Vermont to get it done.
**This is a people-powered movement. And we’re building this campaign one grassroots donation at a time.**[**Pitch in a $5 contribution or anything you can to keep this seat blue, protect our Senate majority, and power this team to victory.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2926?t=4&akid=504%2E61531%2ENy-n9M)

Peter

name: Joy Thomas Moore
subject: Will you support my son ahead of his next big deadline?
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202314/349260359/72861625?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220606joy-resend_jtm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWMxYzAyNi1lZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azzGDT8FjKzgZfJ_8tpEHlkvBsk8_TZONvYVn8E3oMQ=)
---
Hello there, this is Wes’ mom, Joy. As you know, my son is running for Governor of Maryland, and he has worked so incredibly hard to get to this point, changing lives for the better along the way. Growing up, Wes could be a handful at times but I always knew he had a big heart. We faced challenges as a family after losing my husband so suddenly when Wes was only three, but I always pressed him on the importance of a good education, and eventually sent him to military school to set him on a positive path in life. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202315/349260360/72861625?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220606joy-resend_jtm_90da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWMxYzAyNi1lZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azzGDT8FjKzgZfJ_8tpEHlkvBsk8_TZONvYVn8E3oMQ=)
---
He’s gone on to make me proud over and over again, serving his country in Afghanistan as an Officer in the U.S. Army, becoming a Rhodes Scholar, starting his small business, and leading one of the country’s largest poverty-fighting organizations. Plus, he’s a loving husband and father, the two most important jobs he’s ever had.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202316/349260361/72861625?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220606joy-resend_jtm_90da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWMxYzAyNi1lZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azzGDT8FjKzgZfJ_8tpEHlkvBsk8_TZONvYVn8E3oMQ=)
---
It brings a smile to my face and warmth to my heart knowing that my son is driven by his desire to help others, and I can think of no better person to lead our state forward.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202317/349260362/72861625?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220606joy-resend_jtm_90da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWMxYzAyNi1lZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azzGDT8FjKzgZfJ_8tpEHlkvBsk8_TZONvYVn8E3oMQ=)
---
**[Wes’ team tells me he’s facing a big filing deadline tomorrow at midnight, so I wanted to reach out personally and ask if you’ll support my son and his movement to create an even better Maryland by making a donation to his campaign today? Anything helps!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202318/349260364/72861625?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220606joy-resend_jtm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWMxYzAyNi1lZGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azzGDT8FjKzgZfJ_8tpEHlkvBsk8_TZONvYVn8E3oMQ=)**

name: Marshall for Congress (CA-23)
subject: ENDORSEMENT: Congressman Pete Aguilar
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Ahead of the June 7 California primary, Congressman Pete Aguilar is proud to endorse Derek Marshall to flip California’s 23rd District!
Congressman Aguilar says Derek will “fight tirelessly to make housing more affordable, expand healthcare access, and bring good-paying jobs to the Inland Empire, the High Desert, and our mountain communities.”
Meanwhile on Sunday, Donald Trump gave Derek’s opponent his “Complete and Total Endorsement.”
With less than 36 hours until polls close, Derek needs your help to GET OUT THE VOTE and advance to the general election against Trump-endorsed Jay Obernolte. Can you keep our momentum going with a grassroots donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220606_01]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220606_01]
The contrast couldn’t be more clear.
Derek’s campaign is backed by Congressman Aguilar, Progressive Democrats of America, Equality California, Progressive Turnout Project, the Six PAC, labor unions, local Democratic and progressive clubs, and thousands of grassroots donors like you.
Jay Obernolte is backed by oil and gas money, Donald Trump, and the National Rifle Association.
Derek’s campaign for expanded healthcare, affordable housing, and equal rights for all needs your help to GET OUT THE VOTE before polls close tomorrow. Donate to help Derek advance to the general election and flip CA-23 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220606_01]
Onward,
Marshall for Congress

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Vote him out (re: Abbott)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Greg Abbott was counting dollars while they were counting bodies.
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14011?t=6&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB) Friend,

Following the tragedy in Uvalde, Beto took a break from campaigning to be on the ground with this community, and we halted our fundraising efforts including emails like this one asking for grassroots donations. It was the right thing to do as we focused on supporting those in Uvalde and people across Texas.

Then, Beto joined a rally against gun violence in Houston -- right across the street from the NRA convention where Donald Trump spoke. Thousands of Texans came together to hold the NRA and the politicians they purchase accountable.

Beto will continue to support those in Uvalde and everyone throughout Texas who has been impacted by gun violence. But the reality is that if we want to take action to stop this from happening again, we have to win political power so that we can protect the lives of those in our lives. To do so, we need to kick our fundraising back into high gear so that Beto can defeat Greg Abbott in November. [**Will you split a contribution right now between Beto and Voter Protection Project to help us catch up on our fundraising and help Beto defeat Greg Abbott? Too many lives are at stake if we don 't win in November.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14012?t=7&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Beto O'Rourke and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14013?t=8&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14014?t=9&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14015?t=10&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14016?t=11&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14017?t=12&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
Beto cares about the people of Texas and being there for them in times of need.

Meanwhile, Greg Abbott attended a high-dollar fundraiser just hours after the Robb Elementary School massacre occurred. **He was counting dollars while they were counting bodies.**

Texans deserve so much better. But it's on all of us to make that possible. Beto is building the biggest organizing program that Texas has ever seen in order to reach millions of voters, and we need the resources to compete with the $50 million that Greg Abbott has in the bank.
[**Instead of relying on corporate PACs and NRA dollars, we 're relying on support from people like you, firstname. Please split a contribution right now to help Beto defeat Greg Abbott.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14012?t=13&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Beto O'Rourke and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14013?t=14&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14014?t=15&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14015?t=16&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14016?t=17&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14011?t=18&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)
Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign. We will keep standing up and keep fighting.

More soon,
Team Beto
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=3006%2E878179%2EJ7YvQB)

Beto is building the biggest organizing program that Texas has ever seen in order to reach millions of voters, and we need the resources to compete with the $50 million that Greg Abbott has in the bank. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Beto O'Rourke and VPP will go through immediately: Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign. We will keep standing up and keep fighting. More soon, Team Beto | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

This tactic follows a dangerous trend of voter suppression, intimidation of election workers, and election sabotage we’re seeing due to conspiracy theorists pushing the Big Lie regarding the 2020 election. **This type of blatant, partisan, targeted interference is anti-democratic, and its goal of silencing our voices is clear. We will not stand for it.** [_**Fair Fight is ramping up our voter protection programs this year ahead of the midterms, but we rely on your support to do this critical work. Can you please chip in $20 or anything you can to ensure we can fight back to protect voters and the integrity of the election process?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202495/349261033/-1655327884?refcode=em_20220606_f_f_headline_s2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWMwNjY0OS1lZWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzaODKdHlo_Glit9YMU3ra0Ndhd_7s6RyhpQ_fQhsr8=) For over three decades, the Republican National Committee (RNC) was barred from engaging in certain tactics to intimidate, discriminate, and disrupt voters and the election process after a Federal Court found they violated the Voting Rights Act. That decree expired before the 2020 election, and, unchecked by judicial oversight, the GOP is now engaged in a massive effort to recruit and train partisan poll workers and poll watchers across the country to intimidate voters and election workers and interfere with the election process. Fair Fight and our allies have been preparing for this moment, and we have plans in place to ensure that every eligible voter can cast their ballot free of intimidation, harassment, or interference. name: cora neumann
subject: before polls open tomorrow…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
I want to make sure I’ve done everything in power to give our campaign what it needs to finish strong.
Hey friend -- it’s me, Cora.
I wanted to send you a note and reach out just one last time before polls open tomorrow morning. I’m so proud of the campaign we’ve run, and how far we’ve come since I first entered this race.
But before the ballots are counted, I want to make sure I’ve done everything in power to give our campaign what it needs to finish strong and get out the vote. So I’m coming to you one last time.
Would you please chip in a donation to fuel our final get-out-the-vote push? Anything you can give makes a difference, even just $3.
Here’s a customized link you can even use to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cn-q2-em-2022?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202671/349261727/60801375?refcode=em-6.6.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjM1NmEyYy1mMGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YlWfjq3B7d1pu9vG-vIBv7F_c6X7lQzHXZM9zK3Dlk=)
I don’t want to wake up on Wednesday thinking about what we “could’ve, or should’ve” done differently if we just had the resources. I want to know that we did everything, _everything_ in our power to push through to the finish and win with integrity.
So, can you spare an extra $50, $35, or even just $5 to help us cross the finish line?
Thanks for everything you’ve done so far friend. Looking forward to the big day!
Cora
Here’s that link again if you need it: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cn-q2-em-2022?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202672/349261728/-10092236?refcode=em-6.6.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjM1NmEyYy1mMGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YlWfjq3B7d1pu9vG-vIBv7F_c6X7lQzHXZM9zK3Dlk=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Gibbs=20for=20Congress=20=2D=20MI=20=2D=2003?=
subject: Team Gibbs - Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN GIBBS FOR CONGRESS, INC_
body:
Volunteers needed! | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Join Team Gibbs in Rockford and Cannon Township this Saturday, June 11th! Election Day is only **8 weeks** from tomorrow and early voting begins June 23rd. Volunteers are needed to knock on doors, make phone calls, walk in parades, pass out literature at events, and deliver yard signs! [Sign up](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=7d447e92c0&e=c238e8971e) today and a member of our team will reach out with further details.
---
|
---
| Thank you to all the volunteers who devoted their time talking to voters in Byron Center and Kentwood this past Saturday! Spreading the word about John is critical and would not be possible without you. We look forward to continue working with you!

Sincerely,

Team Gibbs
---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Volunteer Opportunities_**

**Saturday, June 11th | Door Knocking**
Rockford | 10-1pm

Cannon Township | 2-3:30pm

Learn how to use our door knocking app and knock doors with Team Gibbs! Email your RSVP to receive location details: team@votejohngibbs.com

**_Upcoming Events_**

**Saturday, June 11th | 11:00am**
Rockford Summer Celebration

John will be checking out the Rockford Summer Celebration - stop by and say hello!
Event details [here](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=2c500d91f8&e=c238e8971e).

---
| | |
---

You can [update your preferences](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=eed40e068e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=eed40e068e).

https://www.votejohngibbs.com

Spreading the word about John is critical and would not be possible without you. We look forward to continue working with you! name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Rogers?=
subject: Have you voted yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=dae344eade&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | Well it’s here. Tomorrow is the day we’ve all been working towards, Peter. In a little over 24 hours, the Primary will be history and the General Election will be the top priority.

Your hard work and dedication has built our campaign from the grassroots up, and we would not be here without you. **But I have one more question for you: Have __you__ voted yet? **

Whether you have a ballot in-hand or intend to vote in-person tomorrow, we want to make sure you have a plan to vote.

If you’re in San Mateo County, [click here for a full list of official ballot drop boxes and vote centers](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=82cf8455e0&e=292fde286a).

For San Francisco voters, [click here to look up your polling place](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=7ac56efe2d&e=292fde286a) or [click here to find your nearest, official ballot drop box](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=a657c6c495&e=292fde286a).

**In both counties, polls will be open Tuesday from 7 AM - 8 PM, and ballot drop boxes will officially lock up at 8 PM when the polls close. **

If you already voted, can you commit to texting five of your friends right now, asking them to support our friend Kevin Mullin in this Primary election?

Thank you so much,

Brian Rogers
Campaign Manager
Kevin Mullin for Congress
---

name: Team Tuberville
subject: The Biden administration is playing DAMAGE CONTROL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Sign our petition. Demand answers & action on this baby formula crisis.
| | | **** Send a Message to Joe Biden ****

**_DEMAND ACTION ON THE BABY FORMULA CRISIS!_**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dc7eded0128ad8d6/872ee86a7d36de46c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

This baby formula crisis is out of control – we’ve seen it coming for months.

But not Joe Biden... he’s now claiming he wasn’t aware of it until just weeks ago.

As Coach has said time and time again, this president is asleep at the wheel.

Today we have kids in the hospital, Joe Biden’s FDA chief is dodging accountability and has not fired a single person, and he’s now saying it will be MONTHS until this crisis is resolved!

This is yet another disastrous Biden administration failure. They can make all the excuses they want – Coach isn’t letting them off the hook. He’s furious over this.

He’s out front demanding answers and action to **GET FORMULA BACK ON THE SHELVES**!

[**Stand with Coach in this fight. Sign our petition HERE >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dc7eded0128ad8d6/9291bc865052bbafc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dc7eded0128ad8d6/396facd0b719c20cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
The Biden administration’s desperate damage control campaign is cold comfort to the moms and dads scrambling to get the formula their young children need.

**Empty store shelves should NEVER become acceptable here in America.**

We are the greatest nation in the world. _There is NO EXCUSE for this crisis!_

ACT NOW to send a message to [**send Joe Biden and his failed administration a message**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dc7eded0128ad8d6/ead1a7a6af371a3dc3d6b838967d376c/33013).

\- Team Tuberville

subject: Thank you in advance for your $25 donation towards our $1 million drive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202899/349262680/1927938479?refcode=220606_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJmN2UzYi1mMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzukV6ccF7eEAu3rYfQJtX3Lw-qUuis3jZ9kUHRdEmE=)
Team — [**I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $25 or whatever you can afford split between my campaign and Seth Moulton — to help counter the $1,000,000 NRSC attack ad that is on the air now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202900/349262681/1927938479?refcode=220606_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJmN2UzYi1mMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzukV6ccF7eEAu3rYfQJtX3Lw-qUuis3jZ9kUHRdEmE=) Here’s the truth: This is the biggest attack on our campaign so far. The NRSC put $1,000,000 behind this ad in one week alone, and they won’t stop there. But we’ve seen tough times before. And thanks to you, we’ve always come out the other side stronger. So, we need a BIG response to show them that it’s going to take a lot more than a few attack ads to stop this team and our momentum. **And friend, it’s critical that we have everyone with us if we’re going to hit our $1,000,000 goal by midnight and set the record straight. Even splitting $25 can make a difference if everyone is pitching in.** We’ve had a good start so far, and while our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win. Which is why I’m humbly asking: [**Can you please split a donation of $25 or more today between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us hit our $1,000,000 goal and counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? subject: it has never been more important to protect and expand our Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
But the Senate is split 50-50, and CNN has rated my seat, along with those of Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and Rev. Raphael Warnock in Georgia, as the four Democratic seats most likely to flip this year.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202960/349262996/-1090171612?refcode=mh-jtk1135-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTY4YmQ1ZC1mMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=srkmYyL32db42u2w6tvBW8IvlivyXq2X2p32o_Ppmr0=)

Listen –
With _Roe v. Wade_ hanging on by a thread, it has never been more important to protect and expand our Senate majority.
But the Senate is split 50-50, and _CNN_ has rated my seat, along with those of Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and Reverend Raphael Warnock in Georgia, as the four Democratic seats most likely to flip this year.
**[Before I go any further, will you split a donation right now to defend our critical Senate majority and protect reproductive rights across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46202961/349262997/-1869736276?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1135-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTY4YmQ1ZC1mMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=srkmYyL32db42u2w6tvBW8IvlivyXq2X2p32o_Ppmr0=)**
For nearly 50 years, _Roe v. Wade_ has protected a woman's right to choose. But since that decision, the Republican Party has worked incessantly to overturn it. They packed the courts with anti-choice judges. They passed extreme abortion bans in states across the country. And now, they're trying to take back the Senate.
Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the gavel, and he's laser-focused on Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, and New Hampshire. **In order to protect access to abortion, we must protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority.**
We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. Protecting and expanding our pro-choice Senate majority is the only way we'll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve.
