clean_body: But the Senate is split 50-50, and CNN has rated my seat, along with those of Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and Rev. Raphael Warnock in Georgia, as the four Democratic seats most likely to flip this year. | | | = Listen – With Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, it has never been more important to protect and expand our Senate majority. But the Senate is split 50-50, and CNN has rated my seat, along with those of Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and Reverend Raphael Warnock in Georgia, as the four Democratic seats most likely to flip this year. = For nearly 50 years, Roe v. Wade has protected a woman's right to choose. But since that decision, the Republican Party has worked incessantly to overturn it. They packed the courts with anti-choice judges. They passed extreme abortion bans in states across the country. And now, they're trying to take back the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the gavel, and he's laser-focused on Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, and New Hampshire. In order to protect access to abortion, we must protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority. We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. Protecting and expanding our pro-choice Senate majority is the only way we'll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, Mark Kelly, and Catherine Cortez Masto immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With reproductive freedom on the line, the time to act is now. ---
| Dear Patriot, I have a plan to defeat Biden’s radical agenda (see budget below) and get America back on track. ******America is falling apart before our eyes. **
* Inflation is nuking the economy.
* The stock market and 401ks are crumbling to pieces before our eyes.
* And now there is even a baby formula shortage.

Families are concerned how they are going to pay bills, fill their gas tanks, and provide food for their families. Does this sound like America? What’s Biden and his Democratic Congress doing instead of addressing these dire problems? Biden’s FBI is criminalizing parents upset at school indoctrination. Biden’s Homeland Security tried creating a “Ministry of Truth”. Biden himself is tweeting about higher taxes. It’s almost as though Biden thinks the problem is America itself. You and I cannot wait until 2024 to defeat Biden. I fear what will be left of our economy if Biden gets his way until 2024... Here’s my plan: Congress must be reclaimed by Republicans, not just any Republican. There are plenty of Republicans who aren’t worth a damn. I need hardcore pro-Constitution, pro-America First Republicans in Congress. Let me introduce you to Catalina Lauf. ****
---
|
---

clean_body: With voters across the Palmetto State heading to the polls to vote early now through June 10th, | | [ [RUSH $15]]() Hey , Just over a year ago, we made history by launching this campaign, our campaign--our movement! It's been an incredible ride so far... and I'm so excited about what's possible for every person in South Carolina in the days, months, and years ahead! | But before we can get to the work at hand, we've got to close out the last 8 days of this election with a strong finish. The time for talking is over, and now it's time for action. Many of you have been part of this movement with us since the beginning and we are going to make history together again! We need your help getting every voter we can to the polls! Your support means the world to us and ensures we get our folks out to vote. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for everything you do to support this movement. Let's go win this! subject: Tomorrow Is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Block for New Mexico](https://blockfornewmexico
body:
Here is where you can vote near you.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/968552f7eab2/tomorrow-is-election-day?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=61d86f6e2d&e=102b599530)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Tomorrow is June 7th, Primary Election Day!

It’s hard to believe I’ve met so many incredible New Mexicans since my campaign kicked off. I’m grateful for every single one of you for showing support in various ways and the ripple effect of outreach has been truly incredible, thank you.

I wanted to share where you can VOTE throughout the state by clicking [Here](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=04539c80f7&e=102b599530)
**& **
New Mexico law now provides the opportunity for people to update their voter registration immediately before voting on Election Day!
[(Section 1-4-5.7 NMSA 1978).](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=9d6552d84b&e=102b599530)
_Please bring a photo ID and a current utility bill, bank statement, government check, paycheck, student identification card or other government document, including identification issued by an Indian nation, tribe or pueblo that shows your name and current address._

If you know anyone who mentioned they wanted to VOTE FOR BLOCK - make sure they're _Registered Republican!_

I can't wait to be _Your Next Governor of New Mexico._
---
| [Volunteer With Us! CRUNCH TIME!](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=e67339ee03&e=102b599530 "Volunteer With Us! CRUNCH TIME!")
---
| Let’s Do This, Team! Thank you for being passionate citizens who want to see New Mexico be prosperous, safe and a desirable place to live. I couldn’t do this without you!
---
| Sincerely,

**_Jay Block_**
Candidate for Governor
Lt Col (Ret) USAF

[](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=93420f8d9f&e=102b599530)

Dear Friends, Thank you for your continued support and your vote!
As many of you know, Penny has put more than 7,000 miles on her car since February as she has traveled Montana's 2nd Congressional District. She has driven the miles herself and met with people in person. This is who she is and how she will continue to represent Montanans - in person and meeting with folks firsthand.
And, this is why we are excited to invite you to our Primary Election Night Watch Party in Billings TUESDAY night!

| Peter,

We only have a few short months to put together a winning strategy in this new battleground district. That’s why our team put together a list of our top supporters to help us pave a path to victory – _and you were one of them._

[_**Will you take our brand new NY-19 priorities survey today? It will only take 2 minutes of your time and will help ensure our campaign strategy is guided by the support and input of grassroots supporters like you →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46203229/349264885/1671658498?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDk4MTlkZi1mNGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=143hlJBGz-OG6zTJd_YElxNMIPplPLnZ0B6HLeIm44c=&emci=c74a671f-c9e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=a49819df-f4e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4588596)

Fellow Conservative,

**Democrats plan to take away our guns AND control what we do in the comfort of our homes?**

_Not on my watch._

In a hearing discussing Joe Biden’s attempt to ban magazines of more than ten rounds of ammunition, I utilized my own firearms to show my colleagues that the legislation makes ZERO sense. **Here’s why:**

The majority of guns you and I use every day to protect ourselves, our families, and our homes use magazines that are greater than ten rounds of ammunition, which isn’t that much. But if Biden **_BANS_** them, **he might as well ban all of our guns because we won’t be able to load them.**

**Biden and the Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough!** [**See for yourself as I speak with Tucker Carlson on the subject:**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e20c4b23d3f54663b6a19f2c525fe6a3&_e=kXZwcW6VUlQLiEPV9MDr1Qct5zambZhYR6zLEZcZZkxzlQTP4uV-QlONQgEsuTNyCG6HIor0ljBpNBk4YBkRQo4_U0cTajbkqquYW795zBGzKXAozyB_7cj5bNeTdaxz2yobPsNA7NZAONbW-1HaQhodEzUK2hPddJKJi8ec0FFij8KkdxsYFFMARMSy3LVxt_n_fxCrs9gGfP7GqQSBSVXxLJftt24DNEXrIPNpuGs-ZEWdclLUvwtIccru5yanW57CEHz4NFWaQYRLrhbU9kmBRrTNqEa1CJTXKVL5x21l5KEFjqlI7y_LYDzWFW-BAc3vdePdKiXtin1FspJplSWZaoqCZ_A5wLN5r-POPCTiEDUwm0-MV2C7uZeBi-zKJKHLrXgoQswn1ydu9RWk6qsuKm9RJdtLx_cDaqMl5AIajAVIRWwKzcDQZ_wQvwEA)

What blows my mind even more is that Democrats have spent **HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS of dollars** for their personal use of heightened security and bodyguards. _But do you know what guns the bodyguards carry to protect them?_ **Ones that require more than a 10-round magazine.**

**I’m sick of the hypocrisy and the Democrats' games.** Again and again, the elitist D.C. swamp imposes rules on every day Americans, but the rules never apply to them.

[**So please, stand with me and support my efforts to protect our Second Amendment rights, but more importantly, the right you have to defend ourselves and our families.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e20c4b23d3f54663b6a19f2c525fe6a3&_e=kXZwcW6VUlQLiEPV9MDr1Qct5zambZhYR6zLEZcZZkxzlQTP4uV-QlONQgEsuTNyCG6HIor0ljBpNBk4YBkRQo4_U0cTajbkqquYW795zBGzKXAozyB_7cj5bNeTdaxz2yobPsNA7NZAONbW-1HaQhodEzUK2hPddJKJi8ec0FFij8KkdxsYFFMARMSy3LVxt_n_fxCrs9gGfP7GqQSBSVXxLJftt24DNEXrIPNpuGsPyZebkKrBRaxiE-UZINKXEtUFoxSVvGGTpaagcN0nupY7_xHWzGKQWqlzqbzH1wZDJt2ORx9_1wzq1VP-82pk6A_g5Z_k995amahFelp7iifbPOPBHkZN56zIxxqg2gYAnZjpg7Z9zdlApCbt9UZpyMxKi3GV-cVc3SxPuK4QXdLuMu5m3LPPoJY5obki8Cfs-p8-lfN2Tp9YVwIrTiQQ)

Hello,
As a three-star admiral in the United States Navy, I had the honor of protecting our nation, our citizens, across the globe. Commanding a destroyer, participating in the majority of the operations since September 11th, to include leading U.S. forces in East Africa in the struggle against pirates, terrorists, and anarchy... I know what it means to serve our country.
But after Donald Trump was elected, I retired from the U.S. Navy. If you don’t respect your boss, it is time to move on, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue such as Trump.
**Now I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs, and we need stalwart Democrats bold enough to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, and rein in Wall Street.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, even though I’m a hard target having been raised in rural Iowa and dedicated my life to service. So I need you in this fight if we’re going to turn Iowa blue. We must expand our Senate majority.
[**Please, may I count on you to join my campaign today with a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46203602/349267333/-42398318?refcode=em20220606pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2ExZTE3ZC1mNWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPL9lbkGqFhf-t78CzZKZeO1XUxt4vIAix_CGz8N6eI=)
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020 – and Chuck Grassley’s approval ratings are abysmal here. Polling from the Des Moines Register shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters think “it’s time for someone new.”
**We can win this race, and we _must_ win it. Senate control is on the line here in Iowa.**
After over 36 years in the Navy, twenty-plus moves, deployments galore, and service throughout the world, I am well prepared for the fight ahead. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m relying on grassroots donors like you if we’re going to win.
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you make a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford now and help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46203603/349267334/-42398318?refcode=em20220606pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2ExZTE3ZC1mNWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPL9lbkGqFhf-t78CzZKZeO1XUxt4vIAix_CGz8N6eI=)

Team,

Thank you for your support in the primary election! Together, we beat the odds and showed that we have what it takes to run a winning campaign.

Now that I am officially the nominee for Oregon’s 6th, it’s time to start looking forward to the general election in November. We have a lot of work to do, and only a few months to get ready.

[**Today, I’m launching our Founding Donor Fund to help us get the head start we need going into November. When you join our team as a General Election Founding Donor, you’re sending a clear message that our campaign is built with people like you, friend. Can you join our campaign in the general election as a Founding Donor with a $10 contribution?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46197547/349239624/-1979597812?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.06_b1_AS_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI1ZmU5OS1kNGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gYCeW_MhQyBq54e6YEMI-XHi4bK4lIS4R2tEeXJgYw=) | _[Become a Founding Donor »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46197548/349239625/-1979597812?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.06_b1_AS_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI1ZmU5OS1kNGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gYCeW_MhQyBq54e6YEMI-XHi4bK4lIS4R2tEeXJgYw=)_

Together, we beat the odds and showed that we have what it takes to run a winning campaign. = Team, Thank you for your support in the primary election! Together, we beat the odds and showed that we have what it takes to run a winning campaign. Now that I am officially the nominee for Oregon’s 6th, it’s time to start looking forward to the general election in November. We have a lot of work to do, and only a few months to get ready. = | = By becoming a General Election Founding Donor, you can send a message that our campaign is ready for the mission ahead by helping us build the warchest we need to win in November. We’re only keeping our Founding Donor fund open for a limited time, and I hope that you can join during this pivotal moment for our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = I’ll be looking for your name on our Founding Donor list, friend. Over 3 MILLION illegal border crossings have occurred since they took office – larger than the population of 18 states! Don’t be fooled, the Left’s radical open borders agenda is about one thing and one thing only... manufacturing Democrat votes. But we don’t have to sit idly by. We can and we will FIGHT BACK. By winning the 5 key seats needed to take back the House from Pelosi’s control, we can END this madness and SECURE our border. Not only have Biden and Kamala allowed this unprecedented number of border crossings, but they’ve single-handedly created the crisis. In 2021, they were directly responsible for a 379% increase in illegal migrant encounters. And as I pointed out in my op-ed for Fox News , those numbers have now DOUBLED compared to 2021 over the same time frame... ...All while Biden pushes to TERMINATE Title 42 – the last remaining tool Customs and Border Patrol has to expel illegal immigrants. subject: It's official. Dr. Oz is our opponent.

body:
Let me just say that I ACTUALLY LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA!
#
Derek,
Did anyone predict that a quack celebrity TV doctor was going to run for U.S. Senate in 2022?
You know, I wouldn't believe you if you said you did. But here we are.
**Dr. Oz is now the *official* Republican nominee for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. 👇👇👇**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220606-2?refcode=em20220606-6123&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6123_434096_JcusC0&akid=6123%2E434096%2EJcusC0)
[**_Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now? We need ALL the online support possible now that Dr. Oz is officially our Republican nominee in the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate Seat of 2022._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220606-2?refcode=em20220606-6123&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6123_434096_JcusC0&akid=6123%2E434096%2EJcusC0)
There are a lot of BAD things about Dr. Oz.
He’s a self-funded multi-millionaire. He’s a fraudster who made a fortune by lying to people on TV. He called Roe v. Wade “wrong” + supports an extreme total ban on abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest.
**And look, Derek, I never thought this would be a flex, but <checks notes>**
**I ACTUALLY LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA!!!**
[**_Now that we know we’re running against Dr. Oz, can you make a $5 contribution (or more if you can swing it) to help us flip this seat blue? This race is going to be incredibly expensive, and it’s critical that we keep up with Dr. Oz’s spending._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220606-2?refcode=em20220606-6123&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6123_434096_JcusC0&akid=6123%2E434096%2EJcusC0)

Thank you for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

subject: Sealing our border is non-negotiable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden isn’t even pretending to care about our border crisis.

| | | |
---
| |
---
| Sealing our border is non-negotiable

---
Patriot,

Biden isn’t even pretending to care about our border crisis. When radical Democrats allow an invasion of our southern border, they’re not the ones who bear the consequences. It’s you and I.

When I’m in Congress, the safety and security of our own citizens will always be my **TOP** priority. _**That is why Sheriff Joe Arpaio, the patriot who made illegal immigration a national issue, endorsed me.**_

Sheriff Joe took the fight to Barack Obama, fearlessly standing up to the most powerful man in the country. When it comes to border security, Biden is even worse than Obama— Biden's decision to end Title 42 health protections will dramatically increase the crush of people breaking into our country. I will continue Sheriff Joe’s fight in Congress, putting the safety of Americans FIRST!

But I can’t do it without you, I need your support to make it happen. **Can you rush a contribution TODAY? **

This president has refused to enforce the laws he took an oath to uphold. It’s long past time that Republicans get tough and stop allowing Biden and Washington Democrats to destroy our borders.

**I am the last guy the liberals want in Washington fighting for you – that’s why Nancy Pelosi and her gang will spend millions trying to defeat me – don’t let them get away with it – because America is worth saving. **

name: Derrick Van Orden, conservative Ret. Navy SEAL
subject: Boldness be my friend 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
I'll never apologize or back down for what I believe in--and the woke liberal Twitter mob will never silence me.

---
Peter, We've never met before - but my story is just like the story of so many Americans. My brother and I didn't have much growing up, but my mom taught us to work hard, speak plainly, and never back down from a fight. So, I joined the Navy when I was 18, **and went on to become a Navy SEAL Senior Chief and defended our amazing nation in Europe, Afghanistan, and Iraq.** Serving America was the honor of my lifetime--and I even had the privilege of showing the world our Navy SEALs when I later starred in the movie _Act of Valor._ [__](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60532240:6igMBXoN5:m:1:3253819041:DC2B7E6972433D462ADA1556633D4272:r) It was during my time in the service that I saw what poor leadership in Washington does - especially after my former SEAL teammates were killed in the attack in Benghazi. And after I retired and returned home to raise my family in Wisconsin, I decided enough was enough...and now I'm called back to public service and I'm running for Congress in the most important battleground race in the country. **Look, I 'm not shy, so I'll just say it: I'm pro-Trump, pro-Capitalism, and most importantly, pro-America.** I'm also a proud father, grandfather, and Christian. I'll **never** apologize or back down for what I believe in--and the woke liberal Twitter mob will never silence me. [**That 's why I'm personally asking you to chip in just a few bucks to help fuel our grassroots campaign and help me restore some common-sense to Washington.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60532240:6igMBXoN5:m:1:3253819041:DC2B7E6972433D462ADA1556633D4272:r) Pelosi, Biden, Harris, and the bigmouths in the media will do EVERYTHING they can to stop me. They don't care about us - they only care about transforming our country and having everyone think like they do. Like you, I'm not some career politician who delivers poll-tested lines. I'm not a phony elitist. **I 'm just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything** -- _and that 's why the radical left hates us the most and is hell-bent on silencing us._ But I'm a Navy SEAL and I don't back down from challenges. [**So, I 'm hoping you will join me by supporting our conservative campaign by chipping in just a few bucks right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60532240:6igMBXoN5:m:1:3253819041:DC2B7E6972433D462ADA1556633D4272:r) **[**CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60532240:6igMBXoN5:m:1:3253819041:DC2B7E6972433D462ADA1556633D4272:r)** **[**CHIP IN $20 TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60532240:6igMBXoN5:m:1:3253819041:DC2B7E6972433D462ADA1556633D4272:r)** **[**CHIP IN $50 TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60532240:6igMBXoN5:m:1:3253819041:DC2B7E6972433D462ADA1556633D4272:r)** Together, we can save the America we both love. Thank you for all that you do. For liberty, - Derrick Derrick Van Orden
Ret. Navy SEAL
Conservative Candidate - Wisconsin's Third District
**[**CHIP IN TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60532240:6igMBXoN5:m:1:3253819041:DC2B7E6972433D462ADA1556633D4272:r)**
Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
---

Prairie du Chien, WI 53821

It also allows us to commit valuable resources to turning out every Republican voter who hasn’t already made it to the polls. Click below to find your early voting location. | Vote in-person at your county or city registrar’s office from now until June 18th during their regular weekday hours or, on the weekend, Sat. June 11th & June 18th – or Request an absentee ballot by mail. Absentee ballots can be returned by mail to your local registrar’s office. Our district is in dire straits right now, and we desperately need fighters who are not afraid to stand up for fiscal responsibility, individual rights, and our Constitutional rights. I would be honored to earn your support on June 21st – or before in the early vote – so that I know I have your support revitalizing the sixth district. | We thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to the coming months. Sincerely, Friends of Merritt Hale Merritt Hale for Congress PO Box 302,, Clear Brook, VA 22624 \- = |

Friend,
On Saturday, I had the privilege of securing my spot on the ballot for MA Secretary of State, AND with 63.5% of delegates’ votes at the convention, the endorsement of the state Democratic Party!
Help us celebrate this large milestone in the campaign by making a contribution today!
This office cannot settle for good enough...it must actively work for more to expand voting access, bring more transparency to public records, reduce the financial and administrative burden on small businesses looking to incorporate in Massachusetts, and encourage more citizens to participate in their government.
Our democracy is at an inflection point. Voters now have a choice between accepting the status quo or delivering a more forward-looking democracy for all in Massachusetts.
Donate Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tanisha4mawebsite?amount=25%3Frefcode%3Dsoleemail]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
This is going to be a tough fight and I need your urgent help to fight the latest political attack against me and conservatives across this country. It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=76f8273f96eb4f90b950e73bd2ed54e7&_e=-tpjMzNaOYg78Yk4YWkLMm6fJpbF5jmsEykBXvaLNjygHklJ_gNDcVrN2Lzh7SE1BBcpUnmza2H-mFkYn9yGXl88i3tou2xu_CUYcSb4xQ_6m6yWggEBxh_goLEW30mT5HPxBVuZiGuVe919rn-DMuEF_8pY7cdnqzcxipgSM-SuqYJQN7qWIXTC9fS5thV2olj3ops-6YF9kFFdl1hB32hnGzVnRkCwhSeQ-UEj6RMfTht54Q7dwLv-B8UaZevZXtfiKOXDUjq0oJCOSRa4bI6njURs0U1_DYMgVJWwpwXw2IXPyRPz1o_s0I1ZU_K6Xl0RILf8JLk_yWqs5SiBtFUobEA3kV7wC9ALhnmKich71sheUWAcVd8Gy1lNpcbJ)

**I've been subpoenaed by the January 6th Committee**

Peter,

Their witch hunt is getting out of hand. Make no mistake, they’re only coming after me because **I’M FIGHTING FOR YOU!** Because I won’t back down and I fight for the people who elected me trusting that I would spend every waking moment in office serving our Country.

Attack me on TV, attack me in the New York Times but to question my legal integrity with a subpoena?! I’m going to need your help, Peter **[Can you chip in $10, $20, $30 or more today to help me defend myself from this vicious attack so that I can get back to doing the job I was elected to do?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=76f8273f96eb4f90b950e73bd2ed54e7&_e=-tpjMzNaOYg78Yk4YWkLMm6fJpbF5jmsEykBXvaLNjygHklJ_gNDcVrN2Lzh7SE1BBcpUnmza2H-mFkYn9yGXl88i3tou2xu_CUYcSb4xQ_6m6yWggEBxh_goLEW30mT5HPxBVuZiGuVe919rn-DMuEF_8pY7cdnqzcxipgSM-TR_2VaEcml7HmgHpAhaoWKMvBSb-UMaVCFVoKlDVm6ai4mRQElNI3Mqwt4OSFwGLeklT0ZtrWbvLErDN91O68FAbWDUb-s3QGwQSJ9AABpSR8L_O5bP87IHEUUZunF6J82Y28hp1oV4hymylfQN24-mx4sLO_tfAKegVezVSXIhRt2ac0q6S1RO2yf4aResxheeVqzMstLidKbIVkfa8fk)**

[**COME TO JIM'S DEFENSE

There’s no question why this is happening so close to an election . . . Midterms are in November and THE LEFT WANTS ME GONE.

Well, I’ve got news for them: **I won’t back down without a fight.** But I need all of my supporters to rally together today so that I can show the Left that they’re not just coming after me, they’re coming after the American people that voted conservatives into office.

All they’re trying to do is distract from the real issues at hand. Whether it be inflation, record high gas prices, or moms unable to find baby formula, they want to make sure I don’t have time to do the job the American people trusted me to perform.

Let’s show the Left that an attempt to slander my name will be in vain. **[Send in $5, $10, $20, $30, or whatever you can spare today to help me get past this and back to my job serving the American people.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=76f8273f96eb4f90b950e73bd2ed54e7&_e=-tpjMzNaOYg78Yk4YWkLMm6fJpbF5jmsEykBXvaLNjygHklJ_gNDcVrN2Lzh7SE1BBcpUnmza2H-mFkYn9yGXl88i3tou2xu_CUYcSb4xQ_6m6yWggEBxh_goLEW30mT5HPxBVuZiGuVe919rn-DMuEF_8pY7cdnqzcxipgSM-QW_V-MxEJMrDfQcrRsaHN0YVQEebvoMkOAAbry9UGhsG7ybo1S77fxQ_0vanEkR1LAtCDtKmPAx24d0igSdKZmaustHU2L3b6hVTHgkH-tl-LnvVL6hf__af8AJFQojZlSzlF3lFmob0r_ZcFx4xC0r4Z5s-Pq_XrFGrpXv2LywHwId31T2IqUPwsmt-VAx7Y2_fLGGBxsRjk-XVfvZFvJ)**

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: The 8 goals of the Global Elite
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj7tuxCAURL_G7rB4gwsXkSJ3myKKlBLB5e4uCn4IsPL7IfmBSFOdYuZMXCJEz2BMC6ecU001p0pIPkmg0UrLKJ_VXaIaJPUZS5sKnlfICfzefP26HwVwgmMbn0sQqNEoKyQDHaWI3nCBFuyMQlOjxs-bu_mU0_548xsupd1dqc6ja-dVPSlYsVWniSacOzbm5dnaWQfxMvC1pyJcBSe_Yzza72Zn7Sp77yPnkfZGektnJgBSVEiMD5xIqRkJyijCQpCzBQ1xVoNY63F1dwdHxEG8vn-s3ArLxrLE8zvlnKo2_fRj68Z_B9t_wj-4QGol)
---
Fellow American, Global Elites are gathered just days ago in a small town in Switzerland to plan to force their "Great Reset" agenda on the rest of the world. _It sounds like a B-list movie -- but it is horrifyingly real._ **The World Economic Forum (WEF) has declared war on Western values with their "Great Reset" agenda ... and they brought together Elites for their annual summit to discuss their radical scheme LAST WEEK.** Make no mistake, Fellow American: what the WEF is labeling as “Western values” are, in reality, Judeo-Christian values -- and the biblical values that MILLIONS of Americans cherish and live their lives by. [**I must urgently reach as many Americans of faith as possible with the TRUTH about the WEF's Great Reset ... which is why I'm giving away my new book -- "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset" -- for a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj7tuxCAURL_G7rB4gwsXkSJ3myKKlBLB5e4uCn4IsPL7IfmBSFOdYuZMXCJEz2BMC6ecU001p0pIPkmg0UrLKJ_VXaIaJPUZS5sKnlfICfzefP26HwVwgmMbn0sQqNEoKyQDHaWI3nCBFuyMQlOjxs-bu_mU0_548xsupd1dqc6ja-dVPSlYsVWniSacOzbm5dnaWQfxMvC1pyJcBSe_Yzza72Zn7Sp77yPnkfZGektnJgBSVEiMD5xIqRkJyijCQpCzBQ1xVoNY63F1dwdHxEG8vn-s3ArLxrLE8zvlnKo2_fRj68Z_B9t_wj-4QGol)
---
[**Get your book now**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj7tuxCAURL_G7rB4gwsXkSJ3myKKlBLB5e4uCn4IsPL7IfmBSFOdYuZMXCJEz2BMC6ecU001p0pIPkmg0UrLKJ_VXaIaJPUZS5sKnlfICfzefP26HwVwgmMbn0sQqNEoKyQDHaWI3nCBFuyMQlOjxs-bu_mU0_548xsupd1dqc6ja-dVPSlYsVWniSacOzbm5dnaWQfxMvC1pyJcBSe_Yzza72Zn7Sp77yPnkfZGektnJgBSVEiMD5xIqRkJyijCQpCzBQ1xVoNY63F1dwdHxEG8vn-s3ArLxrLE8zvlnKo2_fRj68Z_B9t_wj-4QGol)
---
It speaks volumes to me that many of the people rising up against the Great Reset are Americans of faith. You and I are able to see right through the WEF's sinister plans, because we have the light of Scripture, and because we know better than to blindly follow the princes of the world with all of their empty promises.
---
[](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj7tuxCAURL_G7rB4gwsXkSJ3myKKlBLB5e4uCn4IsPL7IfmBSFOdYuZMXCJEz2BMC6ecU001p0pIPkmg0UrLKJ_VXaIaJPUZS5sKnlfICfzefP26HwVwgmMbn0sQqNEoKyQDHaWI3nCBFuyMQlOjxs-bu_mU0_548xsupd1dqc6ja-dVPSlYsVWniSacOzbm5dnaWQfxMvC1pyJcBSe_Yzza72Zn7Sp77yPnkfZGektnJgBSVEiMD5xIqRkJyijCQpCzBQ1xVoNY63F1dwdHxEG8vn-s3ArLxrLE8zvlnKo2_fRj68Z_B9t_wj-4QGol)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: A new enemy has emerged
body:
Our country is currently facing a great threat.| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=a3ea0adf66ec40e0986dfe2616683ea0&_t=IpXarYiLSuOA-V6CKI0PqJxvI8UXc09uR2oBUO5vO8z1vMDsQA0J9FzcYz2ihzDr9Qk8oei_oXtSyawSmI6OUs3q_-k_i241uLsR8oR78aBB1brJU_Arkxy0luCtQAelMvstJ1XXfzYK_6CmqRVH1ModShDAVe9CwN5Ho98zYRI%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3ea0adf66ec40e0986dfe2616683ea0&_e=6J-9C-vcJI3DLc73c6vpyBoMSW3H9c9kOPHX6fsuUcDxwtqBwIlE72mpUSx_MdWAUq7L2M21lrz1XN9Igdj8uTvlXduD6i4U0J4t4tF5DQpD4DKfUg4NlZexjd4Q-jn0OiguzGoA5xAU8QNjEYa7LAc75mf3MFqfrQQhCWp5WgsmODQgTY14eiSKQP32yRF9gtE83jXFBa55DYPBtZebogmQEn64UTffyd2zxR7qvXPXU17D7Z_ic24fpZ_eK8kT2arZImdaeSWEBvM02B-MSQ17S1_VnKQc1owHnhJ0Rxw6gDSom4crkJtrH34hf07AevFnovzM6jkYL_f2YiLuGs0knBzSzWNwBcGf5r8cnfacAizof3Te8q6VkkDTdfM8PNoPdj_j9tuFVNP7q1NkaA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, **Our country is currently facing a great threat.** A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I would hardly recognize. This enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the American way of life are clear and intensifying: _stifling dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted version of history._ A group that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but — perhaps in an even more sinister way — tear down the American spirit itself. They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education. Over the past few years, we’ve watched horrified as this group has attempted to _brainwash our children_ into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country. We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while _trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution._ We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were “mostly peaceful” and “passionate.” We watched _Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth_ – deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square. We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn’t align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time. **Well, Peter, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over.** This enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched. _But all hope is not lost._ **We The People still have a say.** We know the truth, you and I, about America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives. **I am choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it down.** Together we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the world, and that they have an opportunity to continue making them even greater. __
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3ea0adf66ec40e0986dfe2616683ea0&_e=6J-9C-vcJI3DLc73c6vpyBoMSW3H9c9kOPHX6fsuUcDxwtqBwIlE72mpUSx_MdWAUq7L2M21lrz1XN9Igdj8uTvlXduD6i4U0J4t4tF5DQpD4DKfUg4NlZexjd4Q-jn0OiguzGoA5xAU8QNjEYa7LAc75mf3MFqfrQQhCWp5WgsmODQgTY14eiSKQP32yRF9dPcD1Jol2JK_IQ2HjT_Wo4n30ftaMBXIdHpetNHqdfdY-GrRSwxUDfWZ6a5lLvUT-9OaMx_Nzvv_ZBG942AnWJfynTPMXIf5B55Y4hdUE8x58nwBIAHZ3D8hel0Vzc7l6A0HWddxRd-i8tTurIm-MH0AF-JyxM3FJqaVj_8JD6ndUjwb-GxtAxY6P_e9K3WJb2sr8Q-feDDVQFXD0VMBXw%3D%3D)
---
**_[If you’ve been waiting for the right time to get off the sidelines and fight for the rights you know were given to man by God Himself – the time is NOW.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3ea0adf66ec40e0986dfe2616683ea0&_e=6J-9C-vcJI3DLc73c6vpyBoMSW3H9c9kOPHX6fsuUcDxwtqBwIlE72mpUSx_MdWAUq7L2M21lrz1XN9Igdj8uTvlXduD6i4U0J4t4tF5DQpD4DKfUg4NlZexjd4Q-jn0OiguzGoA5xAU8QNjEYa7LAc75mf3MFqfrQQhCWp5WgsmODQgTY14eiSKQP32yRF9fAoKLl6vfKtpFBskxS3cJITKJXHgthlgdFninR2FMHeFXDMslNg9eMmT4HiedUS7pm3uvYIVEqN4jzrd43L5aGfWBumlCn_4LkLtEKdjscj26Zm8mQC4ictmbjVAEllUdomwblgv-VHoFLpx1AjmhJiQH_wS6Ssmr2GtrRVLD7jiqlS60_qp_x18LgHF9y6_4KKlpC7HX5hsT_lcPSGI7Q%3D%3D)_** _**[If you’re with me, Peter, chip in any amount to help me defeat this enemy.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3ea0adf66ec40e0986dfe2616683ea0&_e=6J-9C-vcJI3DLc73c6vpyBoMSW3H9c9kOPHX6fsuUcDxwtqBwIlE72mpUSx_MdWAUq7L2M21lrz1XN9Igdj8uTvlXduD6i4U0J4t4tF5DQpD4DKfUg4NlZexjd4Q-jn0OiguzGoA5xAU8QNjEYa7LAc75mf3MFqfrQQhCWp5WgsmODQgTY14eiSKQP32yRF99vSk7-4DcnbBNk3VI88pj9cPOWmYlGhpHZhyqfrBtGfQnfH4p9WfkAF5gZ6UOvq6UpduPFkr_bksVCY2RThmQ_4FWn1DMcC1fqtK7MlPgRWCnMnrk9XpMLr2G1loc_JunbNep599ecOf6q-_0hHsZCSDz9Gr_-_40LKfr4fLW4KAiUocHl9pmwtqlBUrMhO8FR82kbgD4LV0cyUyMr8Vcw%3D%3D)**_ I can’t do it without you. I promise you; I will **never** stop fighting. Sincerely,Ron DeSantis

clean_body: Our country is currently facing a great threat.| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | Peter, Our country is currently facing a great threat. A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I would hardly recognize. This enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the American way of life are clear and intensifying: stifling dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted version of history. A group that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but — perhaps in an even more sinister way — tear down the American spirit itself. They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education. Over the past few years, we’ve watched horrified as this group has attempted to brainwash our children into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country. We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution. We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were “mostly peaceful” and “passionate.” We watched Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth – deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square. We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn’t align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time. Well, Peter, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over. This enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched. But all hope is not lost. We The People still have a say. We know the truth, you and I, about America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives. I am choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it down. Together we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the world, and that they have an opportunity to continue making them even greater. I can’t do it without you. I promise you; I will never stop fighting. Sincerely,Ron DeSantis | | | | | | | | | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| Team, while the nation mourned the tragic mass school shooting in Uvalde, Texas, the AZ GOP showed their true colors by fighting to the extremes over who loves guns more.

**One AZ GOP candidate even went so far as to run a TV ad trying to prove they were the biggest NRA backer in Arizona!** _It's disgusting and shameless._

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQ3QpuC2LelTJ73a9uCS8a2F3_mkdyf6KfbXDLb5EUCBJKXocdyXhu2quo4KvVvzXF7ARcsK33X8elLmx9z2O1-4kjtfFPZ0ViPIkVa2PjrQJ8vyPgQNrFTt25lEee2g1JDLOgF5EZdbAtowMfhfAZh_itpsIJtdr3pJ8X5Y4EKtsj1cyFS2qElEJuqW2I8nza1Z8Xeq8V-aALcRZVc7hmCH9j1MTuAqj_Zzpf-DdmM5akP1vjNOrdzsA4TyIKu0vKjH8mEyzc1b5NXc1Gi2oxzEny18ULgnjNcUkqwYEfeyD83-DcZ05brbPbJkNKBidMw8M11AqQReEh69aK1Zk74sO78GQ6l1mET9ZiLd1ZYNOCLq5Bbn7iSfBiErfVdyV7NkOg7ksBQzLvJhBmOSkkPxa-V5j8SfD0aCpquUOeel_A-f-lrupN2thbG4IdmzjKnMHGQDGjxxJo7sEq1N_fSOgLkq7CYnBDOVHXRf4BODNTRasAuJcDXzPMR9kYWpM3qjzT98y-se_KSI5r3vjw/3mo/xwkaFoy1QSaesSQKM9J8Dw/h1/RIu2wTuwUixOYGETUaahSmA0gHK8l15JcTYZY3mixgs) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-81-percent-of-az-gop-legislators-involved-in-the-big-lie-2&email_referrer=email_1563581___subject_2029632&email_subject=az-gop-candidate-runs-gun-ad-the-day-after-texas-shooting)
It shows there are no limits to the extremism of the AZ GOP.

**[Team, we HAVE TO flip Arizona blue this November. Can you donate $10 today so we can defeat these extremists who care more about who’s the biggest supporter of the NRA than a school shooting?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQ3QpuC2LelTJ73a9uCS8a2F3_mkdyf6KfbXDLb5EUCBJKXocdyXhu2quo4KvVvzXF7ARcsK33X8elLmx9z2O1-4kjtfFPZ0ViPIkVa2Pjrc2Xb3uctNn0sdhlfi6-uiYsBOoexKDnhflZpo1NcHvskhnLsRwEl-I5BnYC_jP32h9z_zIyORCMTySCf33cFqFMRNqTygrLPBn35QkxgzMqK8WkdlfqE7D9Z52QHab20zDpSH0_LrSer69nL53UQdmLcDumaGkpq74mDsjBcKP0KMaGycdwfyHkU6xWC13qw_aFfaUX9E6FNw-S-1tpamN4TnwHTubWzjPFXQOoIfH7RPgcHG5adMHIfZXNjvZLoUk7jW5fkxTbJ92H50ns7dtYuIiYdz6SB-FGBbxEbO7M_zk5YG73VNf3diK8bldbmX5YVPyCDM5LAaYmyqKR-MmkTdcTS5qlKExbsDtpeVJTGysN5Ei-WGC2A1W0fBHLTAa_gVj4M6rYAtmY9nqUiLRcnZCWg_ThxQIEBFiP81ww/3mo/xwkaFoy1QSaesSQKM9J8Dw/h2/enAffG8Lg7VGjpkRHvXNIENUNM31ISAKPPgRuTNqdWY)** [

The fact is, **there is broad, national support to do something** when it comes to guns and preventing mass shootings.

But the AZ GOP and their candidates want nothing to do with that conversation. They care more about the NRA, and gun manufacturers’ support for their campaigns, than they do about what happens at your child’s school, your church, or your local grocery store.

These same candidates will say we shouldn’t politicize school shootings – and then run TV ads doing just that.

Enough is enough.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Why I wear orange
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

How was your weekend,
Peter?

Yesterday, I attended a protest calling on our leaders to pass common
sense gun safety laws. Together, we wore orange in solidarity to end gun
violence and our children led us in marching and lifting our voices to
fight for the future they deserve.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220606.e_5m7Q&refcode=em20220606-2029&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=2029%2E346206%2EBlsV6_ ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220606.e_5m7Q&refcode=em20220606-2029&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=2029%2E346206%2EBlsV6_ ][IMG]

I wear orange because I am a survivor. I wear orange because enough is
enough. I wear orange for TJ, Buba, Cortez, Kevin, Ayriana, Tae, Zarek,
and all of my family who lost their lives. I wear orange because I love
you, and I’m fighting for you.

We can’t keep accepting inaction. Every member of Congress who refuses to
prevent another massacre needs to resign right now.

That’s why I’m running against Rand Paul, a Senator with a 92% NRA rating
who’s accepted more money from the gun lobby than any other Senate
candidate this year. Rand Paul has made it clear that he will always vote
to please his donor friends from the gun lobby rather than save lives.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220606.e_5m7Q&refcode=em20220606-2029&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=2029%2E346206%2EBlsV6_ ]Will you help me retire Rand Paul this November by chipping in today?
The only way we’re going to end this cycle of violence is if we replace
every Senator in the pocket of the gun lobby.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220606.e_5m7Q&refcode=em20220606-2029&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=2029%2E346206%2EBlsV6_ ]Donate $5 now →

Peter, I have
directly seen and felt the impact of gun violence. On Easter Sunday in
2016, my younger cousin TJ was shot and killed during an attempted
robbery. And since then, I’ve lost another cousin to gun violence each
year.

Guns are the leading cause of death for children in the U.S., and I’m
determined to dismantle the corrupt foundation that the gun lobby has
entrenched with Congress. Now more than ever, legislative and executive
action is necessary to prevent future mass killings, of our children or
otherwise.

I believe we deserve to live in peace. I believe weapons of war should not
be in our classrooms or in our streets. But Rand Paul does not give a damn
about our safety or survival.

In fact, he’s the number ONE Senator funded by the gun lobby and has
blocked every bipartisan bill that’s been introduced to keep our
communities safe.

Peter, we
don’t have to keep accepting inaction from Senate Republicans like Rand
Paul. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220606.e_5m7Q&refcode=em20220606-2029&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=2029%2E346206%2EBlsV6_ ]Will you chip in $5 right now to show Rand Paul
that this movement is rising up to end his political career?

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220606-2029-footer&t=1024&refcode2=2029_346206_BlsV6_&akid=2029%2E346206%2EBlsV6_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2029%2E346206%2EBlsV6_

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: $2.5 million
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
That’s how much Kyrsten Sinema has taken from corporate PACs since 2021. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q94LJFSVn44TWAavYgysbvJmnjiuI0D1LM-y-xFITHebLGs02aVEdehGBOlUtoMm7rdMPvcUCOFVLk52Nb-Y5YSfB5I36SCR-jnYOVvzVgUTGLUNtVoJ1wt1dAqzFst9d0Q723ldnG2klTyQ2oWD4a4MRxv_YMfNuH7oT7nKYjqGw/3mo/apKVfQExSweSB64mrG5dHA/h0/YIh9PgLmMiF46xPvxwLvGLvR4qlEsaUTsK7aGk7BRTM)
**** Peter, to understand Kyrsten Sinema’s un-Democratic actions, you just have to take a closer look at who’s funding her campaign and her PAC. Sinema has accepted over $2.5 million dollars in corporate money to fund her campaign and her PAC. _The same PAC that she used to spend thousands of dollars on wine, pay for a personal trip, and rent out a resort in Sedona_.1 **No wonder she helped kill Build Back Better, stands firm in her commitment to an unpopular private equity tax loophole, and does anything she can to protect mega-corporations and the wealthiest 1%.** **** Her blatant disregard and disrespect for the Arizonans who elected her is unacceptable. And all we can say is: **it doesn’t have to be this way, Peter.** Sinema may have a war chest of millions in corporate donations, but we have the people. clean_body: That’s how much Kyrsten Sinema has taken from corporate PACs since 2021. | | | ** Peter, to understand Kyrsten Sinema’s un-Democratic actions, you just have to take a closer look at who’s funding her campaign and her PAC. Sinema has accepted over $2.5 million dollars in corporate money to fund her campaign and her PAC. The same PAC that she used to spend thousands of dollars on wine, pay for a personal trip, and rent out a resort in Sedona.1 No wonder she helped kill Build Back Better, stands firm in her commitment to an unpopular private equity tax loophole, and does anything she can to protect mega-corporations and the wealthiest 1%. Her blatant disregard and disrespect for the Arizonans who elected her is unacceptable. And all we can say is: it doesn’t have to be this way, Peter. Sinema may have a war chest of millions in corporate donations, but we have the people. Peter,

If we’re going to beat the socialist Democrats in November, then we sincerely need you on our team. Without your immediate support, we’re not sure we’ll be able to meet all of the commitments we’ve made thus far. WOULD YOU WANT TO SEE US HAVE TO CANCEL OUR ADS IN KEY BATTLEGROUND STATES AT THE LAST MOMENT DUE TO LACK OF FUNDING? name: V. Demings
subject: an update on my race

body:
I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority
| | |
---
I wanted to share an update on my race, friend, and I hope you'll read this through to the end.
A Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll showed that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – nearly every single way you can imagine. But I'm a few points behind Marco Rubio and the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points.
Does it worry me? Absolutely. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. **It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate. **
I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so, _so_ much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's fundraising goals.
Every single dollar will make a difference in this must-win race, so I'm asking: Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority. name: Gail Ewing via Team Gansler-Hollingsworth
subject: These are just a few of the reasons Doug has my endorsement:
body:
As the former President of the Montgomery Council Council, I have known Doug Gansler for more than 20 years. He is an honest, hardworking, intelligent man. He is also a strong, accomplished leader and the best person to be our next Governor. Over | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnrbX48rtyZKDgfG4uTIuAkVGK4UdrmFlokRA4DqEE2-oudPk0FN3lFQpui2DuUwm0BZV1ITWOUBUSgkgFAnpsYgO1gk4SeySgvIo2flurLA08ZC80-9p9hZ_IP4a4bb2nfHE3vHVJP3p08evFoHRDZ6psrgS8V8X9xjmc36j-DVivt8zsw78htj2xlX9MVuuA3qCW6iH70UrsW7ExtrUF3E28J_e1RNAXEbVs1v0cViy03EknXdrdXLiNpNkkOLTTz_NXgoE1GvtGDkrCojjyt0HDXPOk6hPozT-NsC87v0A/3mo/br0dieRMSECpxH5uZ_ytLQ/h0/5D43O2zqvmTiQ6gUSb32x5b0tB69mwtWK-qMmWQRTpE)

friends, As the former President of the Montgomery Council Council, I have known Doug Gansler for more than 20 years. He is an honest, hardworking, intelligent man. **He is also a strong, accomplished leader and the best person to be our next Governor. ** Over the years, I have watched as Doug earned prestige as an outstanding people's representative in our state. These are just a few of the reasons Doug has my endorsement:
* **Doug is determined to make Maryland safe.** From hiring 1,000 more well-paid and well-trained police officers to installing 10,000 street lights in Baltimore City to implementing community prosecution in every jurisdiction, Doug's [Safe Maryland plan](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7XTsEmUAegbPULqCVpnZ-BzRJur289GwNlOUbFHj3OATWQU_mTU2ke4ZzW6oVILWaxMoLCSdza61F4JZrOx26A8703htp6uyGtSKiRcMI2rHMU8QLaA_QxC-nFwjz068tKxHpMaq6pvQe_KaU6Lz4GFAHWGPW9TiVcKDtNHYo2J0pGzqVB4LyZRfkxh7JFJHSbETOUhBtjWpRTXy3YT0Wwp-3-fMyehw1Z3-qW8FeAfQZdSoXSsskBl6Z9kUL_LODymgkQg472AweKFtfUmcOME/3mo/br0dieRMSECpxH5uZ_ytLQ/h1/pi1n7dhIXgh17PlZlAM9YeGJrfY07kXhN42HBZ3Emv8) will bring crime down while lifting justice up.
* **Doug has a broad background in working to improve the environment and to stay ahead of the effects of climate change.** His strong [32 point Green Maryland plan](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vU0oIKHN0m1DDk6npYG3DUNl7hkCzOh72ZIur8Qw-F8z_rBqS2dRomc8mDIVgDGKC6h5nRef6wj16M0gsovTly84FTTufUisdrrSukL8To8bPlDt0-FeXcYdVa8uKOSzcEMzUYAVVjjGoqa2lEEyxu4ieGT0bwvEpsT9YjHijqa1fvbOb2mjOVzwIWq6IXy4BpNlIAT4juzBjEFAxTskSB0lMN_p0NYyjToQLrgY6JDt_VSZGz6xzhFmVE-g-sdsyqsKbL_OJ-tflXtC4toERPg2R0ST2Ld3k5VVwCt4pGU/3mo/br0dieRMSECpxH5uZ_ytLQ/h2/2uH4CYr-BrvrE5dKNRrfpnb3QNHZ7mzjOND31tktZOU) will keep us right-on-the-mark in dealing with the challenges of climate change.
* **Doug took on the hard fights as Montgomery County State 's Attorney and as Maryland's Attorney General. **From leading the Joint Task Force that caught the Beltway Sniper to securing a billion dollar settlement to help Marylanders stay in their homes during the mortgage foreclosure crisis, Doug Gansler has delivered time and time again.
* **Doug took caffeinated alcohol off the shelves.** As the founder of the Drawing the Line on Underage Alcohol Use program, I particularly appreciated that Doug took on the alcohol industry and won concessions - including taking alcohol "energy drinks" off the shelves and curtailing the marketing of alcohol aimed at teenagers.

**That kind of success awaits us when Doug Gansler is our state 's first Governor from Montgomery County.** Doug has my wholehearted endorsement and I am honored to join the growing list of fellow Montgomery County endorsers, including a sampling of current and former elected officials, below:
* Karen Bushell (Clerk of the Court)
* Greg Chernack (Chairman, Section Five, Chevy Chase)
* Josh Galper (Councilmember, Section Five, Chevy Chase)
* Larry Levitan (State Senator, District 15)
* Ana Sol Gutierrez (Delegate, District 18)
* Bill Bronrott (Delegate, District 16)
* Dana Dembrow (Delegate, District 20)
* Barbara Meiklejohn (Clerk of the Court)
* Loretta Knight (Clerk of the Court)
* Molly Ruhl (Clerk of the Court)
* David Antonelli (Mayor, Village of Drummond)
* Ari Antonelli (Mayor, Village of Drummond)
* Steve VanGrack (Mayor, Rockville)
* Bob Dorsey (Rockville City Council)
* Jim Marrinan (Rockville City Council)
* John Britton (Rockville City Council)

---

clean_body: As the former President of the Montgomery Council Council, I have known Doug Gansler for more than 20 years. He is an honest, hardworking, intelligent man. He is also a strong, accomplished leader and the best person to be our next Governor. Over | | friends, As the former President of the Montgomery Council Council, I have known Doug Gansler for more than 20 years. He is an honest, hardworking, intelligent man. He is also a strong, accomplished leader and the best person to be our next Governor. Over the years, I have watched as Doug earned prestige as an outstanding people's representative in our state. These are just a few of the reasons Doug has my endorsement: Doug is determined to make Maryland safe. From hiring 1,000 more well-paid and well-trained police officers to installing 10,000 street lights in Baltimore City to implementing community prosecution in every jurisdiction, Doug's will bring crime down while lifting justice up. Doug has a broad background in working to improve the environment and to stay ahead of the effects of climate change. His strong will keep us right-on-the-mark in dealing with the challenges of climate change. Doug took on the hard fights as Montgomery County State 's Attorney and as Maryland's Attorney General. From leading the Joint Task Force that caught the Beltway Sniper to securing a billion dollar settlement to help Marylanders stay in their homes during the mortgage foreclosure crisis, Doug Gansler has delivered time and time again. Doug took caffeinated alcohol off the shelves. As the founder of the Drawing the Line on Underage Alcohol Use program, I particularly appreciated that Doug took on the alcohol industry and won concessions - including taking alcohol "energy drinks" off the shelves and curtailing the marketing of alcohol aimed at teenagers. That kind of success awaits us when Doug Gansler is our state 's first Governor from Montgomery County. Doug has my wholehearted endorsement and I am honored to join the growing list of fellow Montgomery County endorsers, including a sampling of current and former elected officials, below: Karen Bushell (Clerk of the Court) Greg Chernack (Chairman, Section Five, Chevy Chase) Josh Galper (Councilmember, Section Five, Chevy Chase) Larry Levitan (State Senator, District 15) Ana Sol Gutierrez (Delegate, District 18) Bill Bronrott (Delegate, District 16) Dana Dembrow (Delegate, District 20) Barbara Meiklejohn (Clerk of the Court) Loretta Knight (Clerk of the Court) Molly Ruhl (Clerk of the Court) David Antonelli (Mayor, Village of Drummond) Ari Antonelli (Mayor, Village of Drummond) Steve VanGrack (Mayor, Rockville) Bob Dorsey (Rockville City Council) Jim Marrinan (Rockville City Council) John Britton (Rockville City Council) Thanks, Gail Ewing Former President Montgomery County Council | By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . clean_body: Our community isn’t done fighting and neither am I. | | | Peter, The results for Texas’ 28th runoff election were certified today — and there is only a gap of 281 votes. And today, we’re officially filing for a recount. Our movement was never just about one politician — it was about taking on an unjust system that rewards corruption and corporate profits at the expense of the needs of working people. With a vote margin of just under 0.6 percent, I owe it to my community to see this through to the end. Regardless of the outcome, we’re proving that South Texas isn’t satisfied with the business as usual anymore and they’re ready for fundamental change — this is just the beginning. To help cover the cost of the recount, we launched a new fund to raise what we need to make sure every vote is counted and every voice is heard. We know Cuellar is going to spend as much money as possible on legal challenges, and we need to be ready to counter these challenges. This is our opportunity to ensure we elect a fresh voice, a pro-union leader, a champion for reproductive rights who reflects the future of the Democratic party. We are done with the status quo. Thank you for fighting with us, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: BREAKING: Huge progress for clean energy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It's the direct impact of your advocacy.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4315?t=2&akid=12979%2E53494%2E7UEj-Y) Friend, We just won two massive victories. President Biden is invoking the Defense Production Act to accelerate domestic clean energy. He's also using his authority to pause the solar energy tariffs that had been crippling the industry. **Together, these wins mark huge progress for the clean energy transition. And we couldn't have done it without you.** [**_I just recorded a quick video message for you from right outside the White House. Watch it now and then share the news!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4315?t=3&akid=12979%2E53494%2E7UEj-Y) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4315?t=4&akid=12979%2E53494%2E7UEj-Y) Earlier this spring, we published and shared our policy paper "6 Ways President Biden Can Use Executive Action to Take on the Climate Crisis"—which included calls for him to use the Defense Production Act. _Countless advocates like you shared the paper online and made calls to deliver the message._ Just last week, we partnered with climate groups across the country to gather signatures demanding an end to the solar tariff investigation. _Over 4,000 advocates like you signed on and put pressure on the administration at a pivotal moment._ **These clean energy victories are yours.[_Will you celebrate them with us by sharing this news on social media?_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4315?t=5&akid=12979%2E53494%2E7UEj-Y)** | | [SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4316?t=6&akid=12979%2E53494%2E7UEj-Y)
---
| | [SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4314?t=7&akid=12979%2E53494%2E7UEj-Y)
---

| [SHARE ON EMAIL](mailto:?subject=Did%20you%20see%20this%20massive%20clean%20energy%20victory%3F&body=President%20Biden%20just%20delivered%20on%20affordable%2C%20reliable%2C%20clean%20energy%20for%20Americans.%20I%E2%80%99m%20proud%20to%20have%20answered%20Evergreen%20Action%E2%80%99s%20call%20for%20advocacy%20that%20helped%20make%20this%20happen.%20Read%20more%20about%20these%20two%20massive%20victories%E2%80%94then%20sign%20up%20for%20Evergreen%E2%80%99s%20email%20list%20and%20join%20me!%20%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fwww.evergreenaction.com%2Fpress%2Fevergreen-applauds-president-biden-for-using-emergency-powers-to-tackle-the-climate-crisis%20%20)
---
Every time you take action, it makes a difference—but it's not every day that we get to see the direct impact of our advocacy. This is one of those days. I'm so proud of what we're accomplishing together.
Deeply appreciative of all you do,
Lena Moffitt
Chief of Staff, Evergreen Action

He's also using his authority to pause the solar energy tariffs that had been crippling the industry. Together, these wins mark huge progress for the clean energy transition. And we couldn't have done it without you. Earlier this spring, we published and shared our policy paper "6 Ways President Biden Can Use Executive Action to Take on the Climate Crisis"—which included calls for him to use the Defense Production Act. Countless advocates like you shared the paper online and made calls to deliver the message. Just last week, we partnered with climate groups across the country to gather signatures demanding an end to the solar tariff investigation. Over 4,000 advocates like you signed on and put pressure on the administration at a pivotal moment. These clean energy victories are yours. | | | | | mailto:?subject=Did%20you%20see%20this%20massive%20clean%20energy%20victory%3F&body=President%20Biden%20just%20delivered%20on%20affordable%2C%20reliable%2C%20clean%20energy%20for%20Americans.%20I%E2%80%99m%20proud%20to%20have%20answered%20Evergreen%20Action%E2%80%99s%20call%20for%20advocacy%20that%20helped%20make%20this%20happen.%20Read%20more%20about%20these%20two%20massive%20victories%E2%80%94then%20sign%20up%20for%20Evergreen%E2%80%99s%20email%20list%20and%20join%20me!%20%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fwww.evergreenaction.com%2Fpress%2Fevergreen-applauds-president-biden-for-using-emergency-powers-to-tackle-the-climate-crisis%20%20 Every time you take action, it makes a difference—but it's not every day that we get to see the direct impact of our advocacy. This is one of those days. I'm so proud of what we're accomplishing together. Deeply appreciative of all you do, Lena Moffitt Chief of Staff, Evergreen Action

Hey Peter! I wanted to introduce myself and let you know what I’m all about and why I am running for | | | [](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=ded91c4cd04848b5bbadf89c5c0999a7&_e=ADOF8FF8q3mXw_mIjesLriQsF4jY6OAFf02C-GRbRfrxYSNvM-KF3h9hSrudS7OOQ3W_FNAi-Z7R9vUlxYyiulW_4XNVaEwTHerTU7enqjUwF2ts2yQxnfBDe2Ln6wzxy7_4VvfOwjqZ_ZNpcVFhJOb42J85jOhoy6VMZtEDcasl7PKwTMNJhG6ri6lONOnnZ-3X_NloUr08gBZso3fMFDA2bB8kVY7VklDF9GKaLo2yO7hz_fIHtsyO5ocj6BAUTSTlfXjoKh32HTgOyYvLMYgS8X80wdTYrS84xmBYtVHsAPAHMrwCmU-hoi6-WX_NUzVAYalXHLU-bTc-zjFH71aYlp0PTeGUcsKLOkGAx3RoNgzWPEdUZVqEVj4WJKJwjks95zBMlfNtgs6cazR4lKPxOtxGI8ht7xPD4qwmJBX6NjFdQqd78P0-gfCOSCQoa1O4rdJ_SjvgiWN3SteT8GrEcHD5U6cFHPXh56VVdwQv6HmAlPGl3bMBnk106c_2) Hey Peter! I wanted to introduce myself and let you know what I’m all about and why I am running for Congress. I am fighting for a fairer economy, a functioning healthcare system, and real solutions to the climate crisis. **No more corporate welfare for the rich while the rest of us have to pull ourselves up from our bootstraps.** I am running for Congress because I am a real person with real problems, dedicated to ending corruption and fixing our broken system. **[Before I get into more of my background, please join me by chipping in whatever you can to help me win this race!!](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=ded91c4cd04848b5bbadf89c5c0999a7&_e=z3glJuqCYgf3vyy5a9Cjxf74jJrQ8kKVniCefxCxgBqmTRELRzmQCdjX4-RUjieIFSkI4q5zD9hjt5-6SsSi4iol4QZ4wN54-9S8QWl7Rfilvm8srIoGiZQFaOSbYalmZpLVjfqS75BajkAzr_DVddbxM4t-eGximlT2dgD6ButPQ95QiF9IirQzNXQbzdEMcpITVLi89pHw4bhofzoiUDQktFqEo7y8nTELV7c5gmz4nrYDyHZGb_IzB9ymdVBTJ0chKcoU-moy43oHW6qaRO1zc6HwnsTUZ7SB5yDpXVp83MXrV6eAxjZSZ-6WCp14ibDL-Ud-qQggeLALCn8LHXTwWmHjLsJwykUKQUOc9cm7CMp-3xXUza30yOw8yw9KtIjvZ9dbMQ-XmWYB3shd3pJq0tBuUjIZDGF2Ziwu7h3L0Hm0Xml1jC-tC96nuWG897x11YG_A6LI1g60PFOJ_lHzmRvyq8R0UchcTAJfACoAnSZuEHKgOrLWRIB8WD1-)** Sacrifice and dedication are the key motivators in my hope to serve in the United States Congress. I believe in public service and dedicating my time and energy to making the world a brighter and more just place. My commitment to service began with my experience as an officer in the Air Force. While I served, I discovered my innate ability to act under pressure and enact efficient and logical strategies to change the big picture for the better. Most importantly, during my time in the Air Force, I learned the necessity of fighting for my troops and always standing up for justice. [](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=ded91c4cd04848b5bbadf89c5c0999a7&_e=ADOF8FF8q3mXw_mIjesLriQsF4jY6OAFf02C-GRbRfrxYSNvM-KF3h9hSrudS7OOQ3W_FNAi-Z7R9vUlxYyiulW_4XNVaEwTHerTU7enqjUwF2ts2yQxnfBDe2Ln6wzxy7_4VvfOwjqZ_ZNpcVFhJOb42J85jOhoy6VMZtEDcasl7PKwTMNJhG6ri6lONOnnZ-3X_NloUr08gBZso3fMFDA2bB8kVY7VklDF9GKaLo2yO7hz_fIHtsyO5ocj6BAUTSTlfXjoKh32HTgOyYvLMYgS8X80wdTYrS84xmBYtVHp4ulsT314JPCyJ1K9-PtDniBOi61zh8rXHuw5A2hL-TvWWoLP0Q7xhuvA7AykWyq6hP9g5q20we4n5egINzMRdj7miUEUGNNcKUPRLon0VQPIGYcFxw84bl1hvC4ogg6rsIyv6uUzzVTiXjYREHxV6Cy1FUVx5OUFQogGPpTqMOwB-iFB8I3wUyzNSNWMgtbGZzkQf6xlXLnWDdak0l4w) _Sarah Klee Hood Jones was a member of the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense._ **[I am running a grassroots campaign and I am focused on helping to forge a brighter future for New York and for America. Will you join my team?](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=ded91c4cd04848b5bbadf89c5c0999a7&_e=z3glJuqCYgf3vyy5a9Cjxf74jJrQ8kKVniCefxCxgBqmTRELRzmQCdjX4-RUjieIFSkI4q5zD9hjt5-6SsSi4iol4QZ4wN54-9S8QWl7Rfilvm8srIoGiZQFaOSbYalmZpLVjfqS75BajkAzr_DVddbxM4t-eGximlT2dgD6ButPQ95QiF9IirQzNXQbzdEMcpITVLi89pHw4bhofzoiUDQktFqEo7y8nTELV7c5gmz4nrYDyHZGb_IzB9ymdVBTJ0chKcoU-moy43oHW6qaRJN6wdmEXss_SVBVH3V8ylevd7FLIpcYiqnLoCb9UtQolN1ea2so1o6QlYDWxMMGavrjA7Yu36oB9Pq7s5lY4T_28URYjdl69PQw6bdn4zHixp9zx-m8BENk3SRQPqpDa8O4jdj_WOomvcISh3EVQBM3lv7DKW71bCtwohPRAvU49NTIMgHXAaLevaReW1SdeymOJrZL1Pql_oPyc27r9KsdIm_terRZhiRQkj6xeMAX)** I decided to step away from the Air Force and focus on my family when I had my second daughter. Pregnancy and childbirth take an incredible toll on one's mental and physical health. Enduring four traumatic miscarriages, I developed a fiery passion for reproductive health and women's rights. I know firsthand what life-saving reproductive healthcare can mean for people and their families. As a stay-at-home mom, I also learned the importance of mental health and the need to improve coverage for Americans struggling. After completing my M.B.A. at Syracuse University, I longed to return to community service, so I took the pay decrease and went on to work for a non-profit in economic development. **Currently, I work as the Director of a clean technology incubator where I collaborate with scientists and small businesses to address climate change.** **[We need people in Congress with real-life experience and a proven commitment to fairness, justice, and equity. I have proven myself to be committed to public service, but I need your help to win this race and keep my work going.](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=ded91c4cd04848b5bbadf89c5c0999a7&_e=z3glJuqCYgf3vyy5a9Cjxf74jJrQ8kKVniCefxCxgBqmTRELRzmQCdjX4-RUjieIFSkI4q5zD9hjt5-6SsSi4iol4QZ4wN54-9S8QWl7Rfilvm8srIoGiZQFaOSbYalmZpLVjfqS75BajkAzr_DVddbxM4t-eGximlT2dgD6ButPQ95QiF9IirQzNXQbzdEMcpITVLi89pHw4bhofzoiUDQktFqEo7y8nTELV7c5gmz4nrYDyHZGb_IzB9ymdVBTJ0chKcoU-moy43oHW6qaRMVFSMBhNUXaqmZ85GMdvX3NLec6v5lBNSt-Q-qFKnhs-zV9wCrIvXZqjjiLCgv9D0LwomMx7zU65aX38tAxLlrsE9iMGs6fUvnjSSG6GxU-AP6vEP-Gila-TuA_G2mw-J7PBXHTue_DdBHjDAcPl1Hvrs8GrpGg59cQAa4d_IpX-DNn3YpksXYAv4R0RhWUFl-Gcs_rlbKoqm3PCMgVtobraMryehQF0vzq6o01Pdj_)** **I am running for congresswoman in NY-22 as a local who knows exactly how we can put people first.** As a veteran from a working-class background, I know that all Americans deserve to have the same benefits that our military provides service members. **That means single-payer healthcare, accessible and affordable education, and a habitable planet for generations to come.** Fighting for our future means fighting to protect Americans now. Thank you for your support; I’m glad to have you on our team! ****[**DONATE**](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=ded91c4cd04848b5bbadf89c5c0999a7&_e=ADOF8FF8q3mXw_mIjesLriQsF4jY6OAFf02C-GRbRfrxYSNvM-KF3h9hSrudS7OOQ3W_FNAi-Z7R9vUlxYyiulW_4XNVaEwTHerTU7enqjUwF2ts2yQxnfBDe2Ln6wzxy7_4VvfOwjqZ_ZNpcVFhJOb42J85jOhoy6VMZtEDcasl7PKwTMNJhG6ri6lONOnnZ-3X_NloUr08gBZso3fMFDA2bB8kVY7VklDF9GKaLo2yO7hz_fIHtsyO5ocj6BAUTSTlfXjoKh32HTgOyYvLMYgS8X80wdTYrS84xmBYtVGD1ynsPKID6D39P-sBjGytXe88PcMXH_BTpHUygnKUzoU7yvdhZ111-vk-Y1A3EXJEftd8VDRlZ40rIEG7BPIHiXUPIwuz1ViKVrBcUxviYuhY5B_W--kawML8XQO0DOYwBMKlMtBZcVQlFt6jTViKawor9yHufng-hNcQ__oZvStFqSK7-YmRSQR_bj8dS-1C84ipUMgysME-2n3Z0ZjW)**** – Sarah Klee Hood, Candidate for Congress **** **** Sarah Hood is a mom, wife, leader, problem solver, and Air Force veteran. She's running for Congress to fix our sidewalks and roads, fight for a fair economy and greater access to healthcare, and defend the foundations of our democracy that are under attack. clean_body: Hey Peter! I wanted to introduce myself and let you know what I’m all about and why I am running for | | | Hey Peter! I wanted to introduce myself and let you know what I’m all about and why I am running for Congress. I am fighting for a fairer economy, a functioning healthcare system, and real solutions to the climate crisis. No more corporate welfare for the rich while the rest of us have to pull ourselves up from our bootstraps. I am running for Congress because I am a real person with real problems, dedicated to ending corruption and fixing our broken system. - Sacrifice and dedication are the key motivators in my hope to serve in the United States Congress. I believe in public service and dedicating my time and energy to making the world a brighter and more just place. My commitment to service began with my experience as an officer in the Air Force. While I served, I discovered my innate ability to act under pressure and enact efficient and logical strategies to change the big picture for the better. Most importantly, during my time in the Air Force, I learned the necessity of fighting for my troops and always standing up for justice. Sarah Klee Hood Jones was a member of the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense. I decided to step away from the Air Force and focus on my family when I had my second daughter. Pregnancy and childbirth take an incredible toll on one's mental and physical health. Enduring four traumatic miscarriages, I developed a fiery passion for reproductive health and women's rights. I know firsthand what life-saving reproductive healthcare can mean for people and their families. As a stay-at-home mom, I also learned the importance of mental health and the need to improve coverage for Americans struggling. After completing my M.B.A. at Syracuse University, I longed to return to community service, so I took the pay decrease and went on to work for a non-profit in economic development. Currently, I work as the Director of a clean technology incubator where I collaborate with scientists and small businesses to address climate change. I am running for congresswoman in NY-22 as a local who knows exactly how we can put people first. As a veteran from a working-class background, I know that all Americans deserve to have the same benefits that our military provides service members. That means single-payer healthcare, accessible and affordable education, and a habitable planet for generations to come. Fighting for our future means fighting to protect Americans now. Thank you for your support; I’m glad to have you on our team! ** – Sarah Klee Hood, Candidate for Congress Sarah Hood is a mom, wife, leader, problem solver, and Air Force veteran. She's running for Congress to fix our sidewalks and roads, fight for a fair economy and greater access to healthcare, and defend the foundations of our democracy that are under attack. **** Follow Sarah Online: Paid for by Sarah Klee Hood for NY **

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Pay raises for CEOs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
What we deliver for the working people of this country in the next few months could decide control of Congress.
#
Peter,
While the CEOs of America’s largest corporations got 17.1% raises last year — an average of $14.5M each — workers only saw a 4.4% increase.
We need to rein in corporate greed AND empower all workers to unionize, so they can fight for the raises they need, want, and deserve.
[**Contribute $3 today to fuel my efforts to take on corporate lobbyists, tax billionaires and corporations, and empower workers »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14078?refcode=em20220606-1326&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1326%2E420207%2EV8CzOG)

We’re in the middle of a critical and difficult midterm election year. What we deliver for the working people of this country in the next few months could decide control of Congress.
Now is the time for us to pass the PRO Act to empower workers to unionize their workplaces and pass legislation to tax America’s largest corporations and billionaires.
**The time is now, we can’t wait any longer, not while the CEOs of America’s largest corporations get richer, and working people fall even further behind.**
[**Can you step up today and help me fight back with a donation of $3 or anything at all? We must come together and fight the corporate greed dominating our politics.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14078?refcode=em20220606-1326&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1326%2E420207%2EV8CzOG)

Thank you for being with me in this work.
In solidarity,
Pramila

name: Larry Elder
subject: Herschel Walker goes against their narrative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Democrats and their media machine have a clear story they want to tell. Folks like Herschel don’t fit their narrative. |
---
Peter,

I wish I was surprised by the media attacks on Herschel Walker, but sadly, it's more of the same. Few things scare the left, the Democrats, and the media more than a proud, freedom-loving conservative, who happens to be black, and who does not think of himself as a victim.

Take a look at this quote from _The New York Times_ :

| _**"But why? Why [Herschel] Walker? ... Well, there were a few reasons, all of them part of a callous racial calculus, one in which Trump is well trained. First and foremost, Walker is Black."**_
---

And another recent article from _The Nation_ :

_**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."**_
---

When I was running for governor of California against Gavin Newsom, I saw first-hand the havoc that the media can wreak against a candidacy. They called me every name in the book - including "the Black face of white supremacy."

**The media would never have called me that if I were a Democrat.**

_Unfortunately, they are doing the same thing to my friend, Herschel Walker._

He's running in one of the most important races in the country - the Georgia U.S. Senate race. Herschel is our best chance to DEFEAT a liberal Democrat incumbent and help us FLIP the United States Senate.

name: Rick Scott
subject: It’s time to rescue America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
I think it’s an important question to ask: As a country, are we heading in the right direction?

Under Joe Biden, families across the country are living paycheck to paycheck, wondering if they can afford to fill up their cars with gas.

You are being thrown under the bus by the ivory tower in Washington every day, and it’s only getting worse.

_But America isn’t too far gone to turn around._

**Even under Joe Biden, I still believe in our great country. That’s why I wrote an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA and get us back on track to TRULY live up to our name as the greatest nation on Earth.**

[**Read our plan to RESCUE AMERICA now!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=2b20e9b58e0148729aafd5440fddca0d&_e=QiOUqO7LOoXaEgRNoFSX0ULtE2sHSPWayDBPmdR_VhLloVghhJfDPupfm8wWMTpNapix18KHmuVzVrg-4nplYa7yd_fJe1sqJ_0J7M3LXeSSySmKLtwcwTCZCDnqZnTPUySIyGEJo540WaVGzuN0meOHXC9LzK8C9GTfuWlxNqwm4WBOyZ08NTUwvq1qKkNyQLIlCyCS4XTR4_9TPn5rVI60AT7FFpma4U8RGu-QalmqVPwEPPjaGyL6jGiHj6L0CTlFkokBNgsT4_m5rgZ_0sVLoOL5p1XSVL_u8mkgrpuNi1SjrGhzazkuQkmR9Pv1O8gIQo8lvWKBAnhFaPuBLQP8MYHBi2FxrGlN9bfKG0Oh8XT_xwN3M3gyUTztXtxwjQ2WhibhThVewkCVJO2p-LxkuKmmBNyhHUM4Ldm3TZH-vJ-5qXrrlafJbjNuAHUb)

The hour is dark in our nation, Peter.

Things that we never thought were possible - socialism, censorship, and indoctrination - are happening every day.
The truth is, if we don’t take action now, America may become too far gone to repair.
But I won’t stand by idly and watch our nation sink. My 11-point plan CAN rescue America from the radical Left, but if we’re going to succeed, I need every patriot on board.
[**Read our plan to RESCUE AMERICA and bring our country back from darkness now!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=2b20e9b58e0148729aafd5440fddca0d&_e=QiOUqO7LOoXaEgRNoFSX0ULtE2sHSPWayDBPmdR_VhLloVghhJfDPupfm8wWMTpNapix18KHmuVzVrg-4nplYa7yd_fJe1sqJ_0J7M3LXeSSySmKLtwcwTCZCDnqZnTPUySIyGEJo540WaVGzuN0meOHXC9LzK8C9GTfuWlxNqwm4WBOyZ08NTUwvq1qKkNyQLIlCyCS4XTR4_9TPn5rVI60AT7FFpma4U8RGu-QalkCWe7lVYab3rLagvbWxXATv-NuWV0hxaW3RM66pZ3_BJ6RvAEJsgy2duJabKE4YD0zUfKSb9RfU2ZIA_yjcp7hC_R6BK2buN6-RFgRXu8gRFTUf_aU4FzJdbBxYQOwQek1wDP38F_i2Ol6EuxeWrZMdSPUtLTLzOjED-kYaDQse4-nW4tbS04T2Mr216V6JKS71XThJWmYCRiLfNaFHqYx)
