name: Laura Loomer
subject: Unbelievable . . .
body:
What I saw was so stunning, that I recorded a quick video of it for you to see for yourself
****
| | | **[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/7XLqa2u8G892FotJxwojHUdw/2s9i1FgcMBjTgQYpDSJWGA)**
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/7XLqa2u8G892FotJxwojHUdw/2s9i1FgcMBjTgQYpDSJWGA)Over the weekend, I stopped by the local Republican Headquarter office to drop off campaign literature and signs, and while I was there, I took a moment to look at the campaign literature of my opponent, Do-Nothing Dan.

Whoa!

What I saw was so stunning, that I recorded [a quick video of it for you to see for yourself](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/7XLqa2u8G892FotJxwojHUdw/2s9i1FgcMBjTgQYpDSJWGA).

The effort that Daniel Webster is putting into his reelection campaign for Congress is no different than what we've seen from him during his 10 years in Congress . . . **He . . . Does . . . Nothing.**

[Watch here, and please support my campaign with a donation today](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/7XLqa2u8G892FotJxwojHUdw/2s9i1FgcMBjTgQYpDSJWGA). We have 25 days left until the end of the fundraising quarter, and we're less than 80 days away from the Republican Primary!

Our expenses in June will be **ENORMOUS** as we need to reach as many voters as possible before absentee ballots are sent out in July.

I really need your help . . . [right now](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/7XLqa2u8G892FotJxwojHUdw/2s9i1FgcMBjTgQYpDSJWGA). [Any amount you can donate is really appreciated](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/7XLqa2u8G892FotJxwojHUdw/2s9i1FgcMBjTgQYpDSJWGA).

Thanks so much.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer ** ** ** ** **** ** ** **** **Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc** **** **Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Uncovers Dozens of Records of Illegal Molecular Research Reported to NIH
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 2369 pages of records from the National Institutes of Health (NIH) revealing over two dozen cases where research involving recombinant or synthetic nucleic acid (r/sNA) molecules was conducted in America without proper approval and in violation of NIH guidelines.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 6, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59077&L=27447&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1tb2xlY3VsYXItcmVzZWFyY2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Judicial Watch Uncovers Dozens of Records of Illegal Molecular Research Reported to NIH](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59077&L=27447&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1tb2xlY3VsYXItcmVzZWFyY2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** The incident was discovered during a pathogen inventory, and Xiang was told to cease any further work. During the investigation, it was determined that Xiang was assisted by student researchers and that the experiment had continued until enough virions were created to complete the experiments that were testing novel peptide inhibitors of viral entry. The report states that Xiang completed NIH Guidelines training in 2012, 2018 and 2019 on responsibilities of obtaining approval prior to engaging in these types of experiments. This research was funded by NIH under contract 1R2 1AI126299-01A1. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59077&L=27447&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1tb2xlY3VsYXItcmVzZWFyY2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59077&L=27460&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcnVzc2lhLWNvbGx1c2lvbi1zY2FuZGFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[DC Court Case Exposes Clinton, FBI Targeting Trump in “Russia Collusion” Scandal](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59077&L=27460&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcnVzc2lhLWNvbGx1c2lvbi1zY2FuZGFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** Hillary did it. And the FBI helped. That’s the Occam’s Razor conclusion behind court action in Washington last week that added new details to a growing mountain of evidence about the true forces behind the sensational “Russia collusion” allegations that nearly brought down the Trump presidency. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 2369 pages of records from the National Institutes of Health (NIH) revealing over two dozen cases where research involving recombinant or synthetic nucleic acid (r/sNA) molecules was conducted in America without proper approval and in violation of NIH guidelines. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 6, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == The incident was discovered during a pathogen inventory, and Xiang was told to cease any further work. During the investigation, it was determined that Xiang was assisted by student researchers and that the experiment had continued until enough virions were created to complete the experiments that were testing novel peptide inhibitors of viral entry. The report states that Xiang completed NIH Guidelines training in 2012, 2018 and 2019 on responsibilities of obtaining approval prior to engaging in these types of experiments. This research was funded by NIH under contract 1R2 1AI126299-01A1. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Hillary did it. And the FBI helped. name: Tim Ryan
subject: humbly asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4060%2E3611125%2EnpVpdr ][IMG]

April 26, 2021

Do you remember, folks? That’s the day we launched this
whirlwind campaign for Ohio’s open Senate seat.

Over the past year, we’ve built an incredible movement together—meeting
with folks in all of Ohio’s 88 counties, securing the Democratic
nomination for Senate, and countering the far right’s BS lies. I’m proud
of what we’ve accomplished so far and hopeful for the fight ahead.

137,411

That’s the number of folks who have chipped in their hard-earned dollars
to this campaign. Without your donations, we wouldn’t stand a chance
against JD Vance’s billionaire backers and the GOP’s dark-money machine.

This is exactly the kind of grassroots power it will take to win this
neck-and-neck race, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you in my
corner.

$5

That’s the amount I’m asking you to chip in today—because it’s not about
how much you give, but how many people we have on the team.

There’s power in numbers, and I’ll take thousands of
hardworking folks chipping in what they can, when they can over a blank
check from some corporate billionaire any day.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14210?t=1009&amount=5&akid=4060%2E3611125%2EnpVpdr ]So, I’m humbly asking: will you please make a $5 contribution to our
campaign right now? We have a major fundraising deadline this month, and
we can’t afford to come up short. Trust me, I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t
important.

clean_body: [ ][IMG] April 26, 2021 Do you remember, folks? That’s the day we launched this whirlwind campaign for Ohio’s open Senate seat. Over the past year, we’ve built an incredible movement together—meeting with folks in all of Ohio’s 88 counties, securing the Democratic nomination for Senate, and countering the far right’s BS lies. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished so far and hopeful for the fight ahead. 137,411 That’s the number of folks who have chipped in their hard-earned dollars to this campaign. Without your donations, we wouldn’t stand a chance against JD Vance’s billionaire backers and the GOP’s dark-money machine. This is exactly the kind of grassroots power it will take to win this neck-and-neck race, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you in my corner. $5 That’s the amount I’m asking you to chip in today—because it’s not about how much you give, but how many people we have on the team. There’s power in numbers, and I’ll take thousands of hardworking folks chipping in what they can, when they can over a blank check from some corporate billionaire any day. [ ]So, I’m humbly asking: will you please make a $5 contribution to our campaign right now? We have a major fundraising deadline this month, and we can’t afford to come up short. Trust me, I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. subject: Tales From the Trail

body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0c456f6d597a/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7236153?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
This was a busy week for Team Tanya. Tanya visited Fresh Start Women's Foundation to learn how they help women get the skills they need to build better lives for themselves and their families. She also attended the Arizona Federation of Republican Women Summer State Meeting and spent the rest of the time meeting with, and talking to voters about how she will tackle important issues like out-of-control spending and making life more affordable for Arizona families.

If you want Team Tanya to stop by your group next time or you are interested in volunteering, email us at [info@tanyaforarizona.com](mailto:info@tanyaforarizona.com "mailto:info@tanyaforarizona.com")

**Tanya in the News...**

Tanya spoke with the **New York Times** about how East Valley’s families are struggling, but they trust Republicans to handle the big issues: economy, border, safety. Read the full article [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=8bbf472593&e=bd2b55b0e3)!

Tanya is looking forward to flipping AZ-04 and working with leaders like Senator Tim Scott and Nikki Haley to encourage other diverse GOP candidates to run for office and help them to victory. Hear from all three [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=4554e17ca1&e=bd2b55b0e3) in an article by the **Christian Science Monitor**!

Tanya caught up with **Bill Brady from KFNX** on what she is hearing on the trail and why she is running for Congress. Listen to the full interview [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=aef736e09b&e=bd2b55b0e3)!

**From Tanya's Desk to Yours: Tanya Calls Out the Biden Administration on their Shortcomings in Handling the Baby Formula Crisis**

In Biden's America, gas prices are soaring, rent is through the roof and now babies don't have food. The Biden administration is more focused on finger-pointing than on fixing any of the problems facing American families.

Hear directly from Tanya on the baby formula crisis [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=d24b62ead5&e=bd2b55b0e3)!

**Get your Tanya for Arizona yard sign!!**

BIG NEWS! Team Tanya officially has yard signs!

If you live in the district and would like a yard sign, hit REPLY and someone from our team will connect with you and coordinate getting one to you.
---
| **Don't Forget!**
* Follow the campaign trail on [Instagram](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=4b2d63daef&e=bd2b55b0e3).
* Get news and updates on [Twitter](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=e2a2aecc10&e=bd2b55b0e3) and [Facebook](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=22728bcd3a&e=bd2b55b0e3).

---
| **Tales From the Trail**

name: Ric Grenell
subject: Message for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
Here’s my plan to take back Congress this November>>> | | |
---
| | Peter, I’m on the ground with former Army Ranger and current Republican congressional candidate Jesse Jensen with an important update for you, Peter.
---
[**WATCH HERE**](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=2141ac1751e54f908a8c4d2512d3e355&_e=z9dyvNQ1UHTqos7qNsGptkP8Kwp8E2uctgdISsp4ZKINK1qLazjHqcATzISucvC1xB5rZn6VRUF8nnE2SA5ay4ncscQ6Y7KDh5rOH8S8_wzLNx1De8ZVQodO2-gnuXGFzbyOaZGG9CbFXHnRcrinWvpUfiHQAKzlTHYnLrL_izEXbcJV5oP5JpYgFxWxeZ0d-wVQ3uoxPUO8d9YadRrorRh3huKEXk0Stgjhrkm-wjJFzge1ewmHy3vUxGsz4cbwj9OZWQvNpXF-qd6P9ffjencnaq4AteHzGtTD9M36PNMNxlrlPWgCTqpRsOxo4uWW4D8NI5meA0pxqf_rZ4h_-KIEp8QWICDYhnroqv2rXsTOGj6TN1ZMpoFG2JofCGH77oH0Ugxvq27aN-joUx2odGi0d0W3zTg4-IrEh-kL0SMlAYQvN1r0pSzDDueTkyzg35QMmTVjyabNhYO27L-Ynu70CyJGPGqZt8EDWexKkSK2RC-wlKCvfjRWhzppGjmE)
---
Jesse’s on the verge of flipping a seat currently held by one of Nancy Pelosi’s puppets, and now is not the time to get complacent. **This race is still too close to call** and Democrats could potentially hold onto this district.
Republicans only need five seats to reclaim the majority and this purple district is a **must-win. **Jesse’s a fighter, but he’s going to need your support to pull out a victory. clean_body: They failed. Let’s keep proving them WRONG!!! | Friend, Recently, my campaign advanced to a runoff that the media and RINO Right said was impossible. For MONTHS, they sought to portray me as a racist, a bigot, and even more. But they failed. The people of this District care about SOLUTIONS, not preferred pronouns. | That’s why MY team is trying to raise $10,000 in the next 3 hours to kick off Vernon’s runoff election efforts! Will you help? I will enforce our Southern Border’s security and FINISH THE WALL. I will be tough on Communist China and keep our jobs in AMERICA. I will PROTECT LIFE against the Left’s Socialist Agenda. I will always support our military because I know that the way to have peace is by showing it through our MILITARY’S STRENGTH. Thank you for supporting Vernon when he needs it most! Team Jones Representative Jones is an America- First candidate and one of the most visible and impassioned supporters of President Trump. Vernon Jones is the only Trump-endorsed candidate in his race. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Tomorrow is my primary election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, tomorrow is California’s primary election day.

No matter how many elections I run in, the anticipation — and nervousness
— the night before never goes away. And if the last few years have taught
us anything, it's that nothing in politics is guaranteed. I never a single
vote for granted.

With that in mind, my team and I are trying to get out every vote. Talking
to everyone who will listen. And pushing back against the Trumpist smears
that have seeped into this jungle primary from the fringes of the far
right.

There is no doubt in my mind that with you by our side, we will prevail.
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]But I'm asking one last time before the polls open: Please pitch in any
amount.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2022_abs_em.MhlmI3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2022_abs_em.2a1SBO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2022_abs_em.rfaCVT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2022_abs_em.DoGQ0c&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2022_abs_em.P8MHmG&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

It's not just about tomorrow's election. It's about carrying the momentum
forward to the general election in November, and that effort is about to
get underway.

It’s clear that Trump is endorsing candidates at every level of the ballot
this year in order to accomplish one thing — get right-wing majorities in
place in state legislatures and Congress so they can overturn the 2024
election if Trump runs and loses again.

This means that we need to be working overtime to defeat his hand-picked
MAGA cranks and get pro-democracy candidates elected who will uphold truth
and the people’s vote.

And the first step in doing that is winning tomorrow’s primary.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]Contribute any amount today to help us finish this race strong and win
big in November.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2022_abs_em.MhlmI3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2022_abs_em.DoGQ0c&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=330%2E5257348%2EMcswPV ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

subject: I’m behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
The only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
Hey Fellow American,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=94fcf45fa86a4e5f9de893969725bf66&_e=QdFvLoeo20ATeV_A-ILD6WSbveMP14Pq6cyLZFPzU15qhcBlgL9bzgHf35ejYaqTirQSznY3OEXaBYz2dKbBmXuAX8f_pEdPddPtwBk8Q5EJaiZyM1WVy9z47ntO_wNTQVyBtzz9lRnWdGw-yqq7_AXSva3bTYUbJ_Gdv4V_YQCDJafgeNY-ZRMV6SSmXJ3qJp7S_aoh_lEkmLdlftcY9zAVjXahV9zly63dWQ9KN85yrbyDqxpAs-Jr_RF1otmsbhvfZ25f_3S-DzLleY82cz9we0zQDMMHeRcqj_grcajTQnVjCIWRJdMMqZ0p7I3wB3Mb7AX570v9xVMAxB1MK6Re4jVh8DulDZZPMkKWB0OcnKdG1RRSYy2g6DQ-mwuq)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=94fcf45fa86a4e5f9de893969725bf66&_e=QdFvLoeo20ATeV_A-ILD6WSbveMP14Pq6cyLZFPzU15qhcBlgL9bzgHf35ejYaqTirQSznY3OEXaBYz2dKbBmXuAX8f_pEdPddPtwBk8Q5EJaiZyM1WVy9z47ntO_wNTQVyBtzz9lRnWdGw-yqq7_Lx6z-o416vt84vEiibTIeoBMoce_0n8n496F10XC_J7VdYr1tpGKyc72-WkpUylwB5VDcV0ZByne3MfIMd-XKn5GgGW68Pc51RNpGZz9gYCqB8P22Zw4XWeYfEBISu-Y5MoFXOM88JKFFCxQYT58W6pZyzS4O6qcceOy1c74h9iDM08ZPVsvqSKRrKLxWIKMBZHRDaRl3hw4gNAQP7S1hgYOL5VLym9PaOYqJBFxI4s)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=94fcf45fa86a4e5f9de893969725bf66&_e=QdFvLoeo20ATeV_A-ILD6WSbveMP14Pq6cyLZFPzU15qhcBlgL9bzgHf35ejYaqTirQSznY3OEXaBYz2dKbBmXuAX8f_pEdPddPtwBk8Q5EJaiZyM1WVy9z47ntO_wNTQVyBtzz9lRnWdGw-yqq7_INS96tyERqPnEPRmx1FBEnBpS5PC6Mwd_sjrYAlugiXegQTYrntVxROJy2L5wFh2dhA3UBBAiLtJSj7Ao2Z_kRtq85IyCX9NnA60O_f_MQ5GNhJ4LNBYqzikoCRY5UyQ6uVI0F4QWC1KBe7r4UYF_6R3Uyk_78OcKCQ0ESsolUlv62VFhWxGig4y6__-IMwGNU02w5NyuNDowvhxxxRhzcdpW_8APf3UBMzTnn5A8TS)

body:
“Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3e5ba1dc4f9c4194b742bf318662052a&_e=NQizBzWH2HvypsoNDZfevUwBJhYNh9mbN5ek8_Q_t7MdjCX8lTGKhc03OOD0hSmF0_EgGZDw8sSBj_BECzt5jFBaiizBi9rg0QThdwca99tNAHg4awhdLk2LzcSh1ZIQttR-ysJvvJS_mFvJ2loze7WMudhpjBqxGyLz5krk7fgi5lIEUsA9u5HI-BHTy7Ca4MkKTE2UjdOhPPhaWs4FAFyumLHuKwRcerrboP7Z2KA9h_Z2oV1yNgkERYd3AEmjlVPGxMoY6NN-i_cfDz10gyNPJykXkFkk8AL0bZrpBR3r2N13GRfxU97hA2s9W0SZX7UZn-V532yCjVOYJsOsGhw1PFzCZ1QbJNNlNjG0Tj28-TWa7tAS6ufoSurkUQg-AuUFTqAefAwe5mkDY6V4sNixj9XwqgiAQBhxp38k1GOvNgzpaZyzv9gOdp73KtmVM_cDrUils981ie0ysaodftt6XRau9buCM--BO9ORuEGLilSyNMkwNC8wdBGzj7kr)

Fellow American,

Two weeks ago marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

clean_body: Today, U.S. Senator Tim Scott endorsed Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas! Tim Scott is a fearless leader for South Carolina small businesses and th| | | | | Friend, Today, U.S. Senator Tim Scott endorsed Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas! Tim Scott is a fearless leader for South Carolina small businesses and the men and women who run them. He knows freedom and opportunity are the tickets to success. His work in the U.S. Senate has been instrumental in preserving liberty & advancing prosperity for all Americans. Here’s what he has to say about Derek: “Throughout his time in public service, Derek has made it his mission to protect all Kansans and ensure they have a shot at achieving their dreams. Bringing back a common-sense, conservative approach to the state is critical for its future. Best of luck to Derek Schmidt!” Derek is honored to have Senator Scott's support in this race. He is a strong voice in the U.S. Senate for South Carolina and for our national conservative movement, and his backing shows the real momentum we are building to take back the governor's office in Kansas. Senator Scott is a true American patriot. Team Schmidt is stronger with him on board as we prepare to defeat Laura Kelly and KEEP KANSAS RED! With your help, we can bring pro-growth America First policies to Kansas. We can’t wait to see what the future holds, and most importantly we are so thankful to have YOUR support on this journey to make Derek Schmidt our next Kansas Governor. Thank you, friend! Team Schmidt | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Stop the Democrats
body:
[](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qhjkyo-jrhhjlljll-r/) Dear Friend,Late last week, I worked the fields to finish up the planting season. As a family farmer in Brown County, we work hard every spring and this year we faced a lot of weather challenges.I'm wishing the best to my fellow farmers in southern Minnesota for a productive growing season and harvest. I'm running for Congress because we need to change the course of our country. We cannot afford the Biden-Pelosi agenda of higher taxes, more inflation, out-of-control spending, and endless regulations.I need your help because I'm up against DFLer Jeff Ettinger, a multi-millionaire ex-CEO who is self-financing his campaign. In the past, he's given hundreds of thousands of his own money to Democrat causes in Minnesota and across the country. The National Democrats, Nancy Pelosi and Tim Walz recruited him to run in this race.Every contribution - large or small - will make the difference in making sure we keep this seat red and defeat the Biden-Pelosi agenda. [>> Donate Today to Help Stop the Democrats <<](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qhjkyo-jrhhjlljll-y/) Thank you for your support. Sincerely,
Brad Finstad [](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qhjkyo-jrhhjlljll-t/)[](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qhjkyo-jrhhjlljll-i/) | | [Unsubscribe](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-qhjkyo-jrhhjlljll-d/)

---
| | Peter,
Tomorrow is election day in one of the most critical races to take back the House _in the entire country!_

I am a lifelong Republican running to defeat far-left agitator Katie Porter. If Republicans come up short in this race, it will seriously damage our nationwide efforts to flip control of the House of Representatives.

That’s why, as we were putting the finishing touches on our get-out-the-vote plan for tomorrow, I asked my team what it would take to **reach an extra 10,000 undecided voters between now and when polls close tomorrow. **

I love the plan they put together, but unfortunately, we don’t have the funds to execute it. That’s why I’m reaching out to a handful of my most dedicated supporters like you, Peter.

**Do you think you could help us raise an extra $5,000 ASAP so we can expand our reach tomorrow to 10,000 more undecided voters?**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Jessica just filed for a recount!
body:
We need your support to keep Jessica’s campaign going in TX-28.
#
Peter, it’s official — Jessica Cisneros just filed for a recount in her race against corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar.
[Rush a contribution to her recount fund and Justice Democrats right away »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110273?refcode=em20220606-23724&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=23724%2E1203867%2E_KXpoV)
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110273?refcode=em20220606-23724&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=23724%2E1203867%2E_KXpoV)
Recounts are expensive but we must ensure that every vote is counted. We know that Cuellar, the anti-abortion, NRA “A-rated” conservative Democrat, will have the money he needs from his corporate and right-wing backers.
**We haven’t come this far with Jessica, through 2 primaries and 1 runoff, to stop now.**
[Can you help fuel Jessica’s recount and Justice Democrats right now?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110273?refcode=em20220606-23724&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=23724%2E1203867%2E_KXpoV)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110273?refcode=em20220606-23724&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=23724%2E1203867%2E_KXpoV)**
Thank you.
\- Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=23724%2E1203867%2E_KXpoV) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=23724%2E1203867%2E_KXpoV) and your state public health department.
---

name: Larry Elder
subject: They don’t want you to read this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Democrats and their media machine have a clear story they want to tell. Folks like Herschel don’t fit their narrative. |
---
Peter,

I wish I was surprised by the media attacks on Herschel Walker, but sadly, it's more of the same. Few things scare the left, the Democrats, and the media more than a proud, freedom-loving conservative, who happens to be black, and who does not think of himself as a victim.

Take a look at this quote from _The New York Times_ :

| _**"But why? Why [Herschel] Walker? ... Well, there were a few reasons, all of them part of a callous racial calculus, one in which Trump is well trained. First and foremost, Walker is Black."**_
---

And another recent article from _The Nation_ :

_**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."**_
---

When I was running for governor of California against Gavin Newsom, I saw first-hand the havoc that the media can wreak against a candidacy. They called me every name in the book - including "the Black face of white supremacy."

**The media would never have called me that if I were a Democrat.**

_Unfortunately, they are doing the same thing to my friend, Herschel Walker._

He's running in one of the most important races in the country - the Georgia U.S. Senate race. Herschel is our best chance to DEFEAT a liberal Democrat incumbent and help us FLIP the United States Senate.

**[Will you help us fight back against media bias and stand with Herschel Walker today? I've already endorsed him, but I am hoping you'll join me by sending $5, $10, $15, or even $20 to Herschel's campaign today.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=8345adeaf0ac4c2896acd22a157e31ea&_e=aAPBmfh3Yvwn1lvEQdygE0AbNwGhLmN1ZZTk62rwpfwm4h9Nc5Wkb-el5hBzaLDXKlZPwuYhjaIbCGMmmcebRtxFrfzaRqcdpSPZqqOUBGik_TbOagaBDVBBscUm_nwGVt3Ke3BWnuq-YxblMFlPWp8PIC38_LsLwfXXzVoOzR4IcQbTrPG3eyG5KHKj6fAXnMKGyu61yV818SxusR9uT9QFrxtj6q7_DZuK_9XUppQllgl1PaM6bcSOx2RNMWijms0U8Qs4ipl7GfhlA03wVX-Upo2xN7VsQAlkvwuQXbrl96eRU5Sv_8kki2KopTASCut85GAU6HU_0MpxIIYpdPeGZahAuvgYeUr8fRWpt-69GX_rtPUIJrJG2lav3OEqazdy1RsOyZu2Au3xBE6mfQruNMYN8M2RBY2UwJ6KyjicSxZGn2ZCtcaXTadaiHqB1C-9vmcY_wMoAAoi19nkNj5vaSIIOXDBEMbPexczBGFifcFRQRAUUWqSQ3LNvgf3)**

clean_body: Democrats and their media machine have a clear story they want to tell. Folks like Herschel don’t fit their narrative. | Peter, I wish I was surprised by the media attacks on Herschel Walker, but sadly, it's more of the same. Few things scare the left, the Democrats, and the media more than a proud, freedom-loving conservative, who happens to be black, and who does not think of himself as a victim. Take a look at this quote from The New York Times : | "But why? Why [Herschel] Walker? ... Well, there were a few reasons, all of them part of a callous racial calculus, one in which Trump is well trained. First and foremost, Walker is Black." And another recent article from The Nation : "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." When I was running for governor of California against Gavin Newsom, I saw first-hand the havoc that the media can wreak against a candidacy. They called me every name in the book - including "the Black face of white supremacy." The media would never have called me that if I were a Democrat. Unfortunately, they are doing the same thing to my friend, Herschel Walker. He's running in one of the most important races in the country - the Georgia U.S. Senate race. Herschel is our best chance to DEFEAT a liberal Democrat incumbent and help us FLIP the United States Senate. We have a chance to stand up against the Radical Left and the media by supporting Herschel Walker. Please don't let us down, Peter. Thanks, Larry Elder | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: 5 common sense solutions to end gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
Our children shouldn’t be forced to grow up wondering — are they next? | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrfKrHWNyblUEJakoMBzmE7uajrV7feO-bmcPLS989qrATrCI9KNXSWky2-enwnNxVo_8VT6nsyHQjmSjhRubib8woLVbcGpzQPS0FeR48C5XUal_f9BXoAF1MZwk1O4IRYehrh7-NGJsKtIi5tUZy-tteA-g7qM0J4R_q03ihmt0-bt5WxPWetrbRpmRiVvaIcmGgSNY7bVB4x86o9xYi7p37a-QYQw2BWmsikD7x8j8JnztvswyqfHiCo0-Ka1MQk4vnjEOh8G4eeDDUUO4c24KuDkbkzoHbnUxvNf_pVel6GW1wwfEh6jgjN_4Q7N8hv_zUDcSSOnyFSqxDk9gSmVTQZrDw-LtBmWWww72R2K631MTt0xWZqchpRp-217zz/3mo/MyH4HlUjQ4-lgVMvVrPP3Q/h0/sPeSRotbEHuzBrCAxdQmfoq3TJ6_7Kya99agCZfLCBI)

_Content warning: This email addresses the topic of gun violence. Please skip this email if the content is too distressing._
Peter Willis,
While the nation is still reeling from the massacre in Texas, and subsequent mass shootings in recent days, **Sen. Joe Manchin says he will do “anything he can” to move common sense gun legislation forward, but still refuses to eliminate the filibuster to get gun legislation through the Senate.**
**An estimated 119 people die each day in the United States from gun violence. Each day we wait brings additional deaths that could have been prevented.**
I have been educating, organizing, and bringing more voters into the fight for common sense gun reform for years, and cannot even express to you how frustrating and enraging it is to have made so little progress on this issue due to Republicans and people like Manchin acting as roadblocks in Congress.
Our children shouldn’t be forced to grow up wondering — are they next? **[Please sign my petition calling for an end to the filibuster so that we can pass common sense gun laws.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnniF0EMn2JChAQpIXGHOkOjwz3_TJA7U6FK3UC2kMBXx2cLYqsAA7eT4CWfbuIbDo7lShSeyrx_TSKFG27ljCIzJ6yNp7dfVMLCUTIDsK4vsoMtvPnkVzO0L459-v6QOIFvbEJ7zM9aNpVD-5Q2zMQPCPFFn7pobuLrFgTE2qf7JhSl2PoQXetdUyjGfr8ILyEB0F3bDY6P3SmcXSdNZ1u0R-cxuw4RguKOpeS99AOvDLM8a_JLBjwpCHjeRiYOWZc_MsqRXAq3n6V0WyISCNvD5sKUz_tR7URsDOO1_cSPQgkp2ncM_leHJcyh7CLgHbE/3mo/MyH4HlUjQ4-lgVMvVrPP3Q/h1/YDaGWzC3_1OTVfuiQatpjcg4seEug-vpepetggt7piM)**
[Add your name](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnniF0EMn2JChAQpIXGHOkOjwz3_TJA7U6FK3UC2kMBXx2cLYqsAA7eT4CWfbuIbDo7lShSeyrx_TSKFG27ljCIztdrajASduWVZcHSMC9b6ck5MbUul_gqP1MLijhvFQmpibJRBVA221v_F4ZZ9V_snnpVTrbGGaAUURL4YkzPJLgM2rp0jCefLLStMaFAXkdnTjbkPumJvJfe-d_gmhd79APMf3X5RqaM9of4SX6HNB6d72ZAL4keAGe78jezh30WedCQD03SBddIE-VKAmUJzzibEmCnjGZfMamsR1rSgDCypjCrd6qyxLdHWzQ9PY1I/3mo/MyH4HlUjQ4-lgVMvVrPP3Q/h2/A0xUM_ytfsPjGU10rg6_Sqs36TeNP1UjK16bff5cTq8)
---
In 157 days this year, the U.S. has had over 200 mass shootings and lost over 18,700 lives to gun violence. Here are five common sense laws Congress can pass to end gun violence:
1. **Universal background checks** to require all gun transfers and transactions be recorded through the National Instant Criminal Background Check System (NICS).
2. **Red Flag Laws** to allow police or family members to petition a state court to order the temporary removal of firearms from a person who may present a danger to themselves or others.
3. **Ban Assault Weapons and High Capacity Magazines.** Weapons of war have no place in our communities. Full stop.
4. **Ban Ghost Guns** — homemade, untraceable, and unserialized, their parts can be acquired or produced without a background check. They can be assembled by an individual in about an hour.
5. **Implement a National Licensing Program** to obtain a license from the Department of Justice before purchasing or receiving a firearm.

We have the solutions. It’s past time to end the filibuster and finally pass legislation on ending gun violence. **[Please sign the petition today!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnniF0EMn2JChAQpIXGHOkOjwz3_TJA7U6FK3UC2kMBXx2cLYqsAA7eT4CWfbuIbDo7lShSeyrx_TSKFG27ljCIzQ1z-omqs3V9eK5E-oQ8K414n7dMH0FfEOE6fhQbH3QhMWb7R7KFf6JK1Br9KMoaPu9ioH9QiHrPmvqhXWic7vkH2pYBBz_XufV4bhMbnIDXbPVm2AkG2TgJOBnOO9GZavsk14XIFLetnr9SU8vrXOfKer0YqY-lcR8CtpF-VkggM1I2Rr_XMYLxd9snU62PldXjtY0vzS0swYMIrW144Mw1SWSWBTiAy1wpumooumXo/3mo/MyH4HlUjQ4-lgVMvVrPP3Q/h3/xs2J8dOXjZRG0ULpctKXYrGxQfdMWBvh32SZTDef2RU)**
Thanks,
Melanie
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrfKrHWNyblUEJakoMBzmE7uajrV7feO-bmcPLS989qrATrCI9KNXSWky2-enwnNxVlMskrxiak0iH3kE3V6VBmdoE2ku5Edsr4-N1bCSHwRAwFeesiugxeewuoHKI0NAwf0qgC5xiR1o2bvcCNkua-N4U-y18bYoH3dDTZVtg6cpKL9iaRg-LOTaBtgYfRCf5wqTaUnMc7UrgH-9GJaSqwJfT3sBW8Dp1xu_juqCoujV9C6PaKLzWdeLOqunFa-eqeluoAzk_YKEowWXhv2wb3pEIrhLmawIqMDKucaDXtGsLmhpMzKR_OwUbGXqwHM9kXR0_Q0zDjfv8LXjaIxG_LwPXCySWkAijreZNvw7bRDSWkXfitbpvExB0xDvQz4Mn/3mo/MyH4HlUjQ4-lgVMvVrPP3Q/h4/TKPb4RZmIx_e6J0_qMs7D34VLd9lYTJY-goH7SoADek)

Peter Willis —

subject: With only three weeks until the election, we have a few upcoming events where you can support Neal and the campaign.
body:
Ballots will be arriving in mailboxes soon so every effort counts! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e1837993ce65/with-only-three-weeks-until-the-election-we-have-a-few-upcoming-events-where-you-can-support-neal-and-the-campaign?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | | |

| | | |
---
|
#### Come join us for this week's upcoming events!
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | This Wednesday, come by and engage with Neal on the issues while also enjoying good food and drink!
---
|
---
|
---
---
| [Podcast (2 pm)](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=39f2caffd7&e=e67cbb3f92 "Podcast \(2 pm\)")
---

---
| For Thursday, we have two virtual events! Join us for the livestream podcast with Brother Jeff at 2 PM on Facebook. Later in the evening we will have a live discussion with Marianne Williamson on Instagram at 7 PM.
---
|
---
|
---
| On Saturday, we have your excuse to treat yourself and canvass with us to encourage others to vote with ballots being sent out!
---
|
---
|
---
